Fellow Conservative,

I'm the latest recipient of Rolling Stone’s anti-conservative wrath - and I can only imagine it's because the liberal LEFT sees our campaign as a threat to the two Democrats I’m up against in the battle for Arizona’s Senate seat.

If you’ve read any of the emails my campaign sent you before today, then you’ll know I’m tougher than a $2 steak, but I couldn’t not respond to the hit piece Rolling Stone put out. This article’s attacks are not just about my candidacy but about me as a person and about YOU as a conservative. _**Read a few of the comments for yourself:**_

| _**"Mark Lamb, Republicans’ first big-name candidate for the seat, is a whole new brand of extreme."** _
---
* * *
_**"Lamb has, for years, been allied with a fringe movement of ‘Constitutional Sheriffs.’ These extremist lawmen are effectively conspiracy theorists with guns."** _
---
* * *
_**"...infamous for flouting enforcement of state-level gun-control and covid-public-health measures."** _
---
* * *

Fellow Conservative, this is exactly why I am running for the U.S. Senate, because _we need leaders in this country that aren’t too politically correct to protect us._ **[We need warriors who are willing to stand up and fight for our American values and leaders who refuse to retreat when confronted by cancel culture, sensationalism, and anti-Americanism.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e41f692fd81d46aa9533842eaccdc6f7&_e=FXd5I634i1uinMImLY1HVcXmZ6CluMLe_iNtsfwbeoIP4OSQApVSvybExX8kxS-JaRM_YZvW7vmxUqEOmjbSjmy1fX4mArTYRPr-d0iCVRcQWyCpfYIS3DyJJrlk6zUFqXeJ4zDOYbCXA2jCwebcDjR3mLxGaVMbF6rxlhYf5p5SByCzYCyIS3H2fVg3PSksCXtFYqMY_4vWG3SQflGW0ilrB7DQyTenk6m4RFwXSNEvzp99MBmJeHQrKEr-2xiFsR4CzFwOLX0Jk9R6OwFXxUHHCE14XNd7qQZybBDnnlU-C2-mSFi9nDxFTorMh40zyIzMCtda_mrfuK9qNJSL5Tf0QDrXeDW04xtL5JAe8OwW3mQnhdwye8_DTU0J8yjcDDnWH7T3kohx4pxL-ikUwS_yvFkcou3CLp0wmnM6O92b6Cdp4w0BbVtCZtghnzN_gQ-SFDmRnICUG_biNnEFmB3EkOqPePkYZCV2348CSI1CKFcgFuLvdYwN8A73vorNlgsum0wk676Hx5QBKDLUk_pGdhjGwvESE80X7Hbjw_0-vyEfiVEt2Y2iTbskvwkN)**

**I'm asking you to help me send a clear message today: the personal, nasty attacks only increase our resolve to win this critical U.S. Senate race.**

**[Will you add your name to my petition demanding that Rolling Stone issue an apology for their personal attacks on me and our conservative movement as a whole?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e41f692fd81d46aa9533842eaccdc6f7&_e=FXd5I634i1uinMImLY1HVcXmZ6CluMLe_iNtsfwbeoIP4OSQApVSvybExX8kxS-JaRM_YZvW7vmxUqEOmjbSjmy1fX4mArTYRPr-d0iCVRcQWyCpfYIS3DyJJrlk6zUFqXeJ4zDOYbCXA2jCwebcDjR3mLxGaVMbF6rxlhYf5p5SByCzYCyIS3H2fVg3PSksCXtFYqMY_4vWG3SQflGW0ilrB7DQyTenk6m4RFwXSNEvzp99MBmJeHQrKEr-2xiFsR4CzFwOLX0Jk9R6OwFXxUHHCE14XNd7qQZybBDnnlU-C2-mSFi9nDxFTorMh40zyIzMCtda_mrfuK9qNJSL5Tf0QDrXeDW04xtL5JAe8OwW3mQnhdwye8_DTU0J8yjcDDnWH7T3kohx4pxL-ikUwS_yvFkcou3CLp0wmnM6O90_o8f3JuFgHTDyZcmp1V48mvTkOK28OJnhpjPCTOljj_1dLG6MGA89n7bgt4v_pB8vt6au-rU0FU52yxeoK50Q7twYPs9hMfmmeESSllyydNPQcxXquwUuQFd32QskCTs2ilh9LyLZHflEAMnNZoNV)**

**It’s not _‘EXTREME’_ to want a secure southern border.** What’s extreme is having to carry dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescue children from sex trafficking rings, and stop gang members and drug dealers daily.

**It’s not _‘EXTREME’_ to stand up for American families** who cannot afford to put food on the table because of Joe Biden’s inflation. Watching hardworking families suffer while the political elite eats ice cream on live TV is extreme.

**It’s not _‘EXTREME’_ to defend our Second Amendment or the right to life.** It’s extreme to infringe upon these liberties simply because you don’t like them.

**And it sure as heck isn’t _‘EXTREME’_ to be a God-fearing, freedom-loving, family-first American PATRIOT, Fellow Conservative. The attempt to spread anti-American ideology into every area of American life is extreme. **

America is at a crossroads, we can allow these vultures to pick our values apart and change the fabric of our nation, making it unrecognizable, or we can stand up for the America we love, the world’s bastion of liberty.

**These are the fights we must win, Fellow Conservative.[I hope you'll stand and show your support for our conservative movement.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e41f692fd81d46aa9533842eaccdc6f7&_e=FXd5I634i1uinMImLY1HVcXmZ6CluMLe_iNtsfwbeoIP4OSQApVSvybExX8kxS-JaRM_YZvW7vmxUqEOmjbSjmy1fX4mArTYRPr-d0iCVRcQWyCpfYIS3DyJJrlk6zUFqXeJ4zDOYbCXA2jCwebcDjR3mLxGaVMbF6rxlhYf5p5SByCzYCyIS3H2fVg3PSksCXtFYqMY_4vWG3SQflGW0ilrB7DQyTenk6m4RFwXSNEvzp99MBmJeHQrKEr-2xiFsR4CzFwOLX0Jk9R6OwFXxUHHCE14XNd7qQZybBDnnlU-C2-mSFi9nDxFTorMh40zyIzMCtda_mrfuK9qNJSL5Tf0QDrXeDW04xtL5JAe8OwW3mQnhdwye8_DTU0J8yjcDDnWH7T3kohx4pxL-ikUwS_yvFkcou3CLp0wmnM6O90QC05BrRubR9M5V22xcmGpXWwDTy7gDrjikOopncNOnphBKLsLlKkdy8iOn-2ni81OTWhnmKnsxY3W3JljeT8uobii2dbom6UWiVI7FTDT2DhulLLKkChfXbeCELNQcb3he9di8BCzKkrQ3BYYCe6A)**

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

name: John, Team Haley
subject: Friend - why we set monthly goals
body:
First and foremost, the monthly fundraising goals we set help us stay on track financially.

| |
---
| | |
Friend,

With the last day of April fast approaching, I wanted to take a couple moments to explain why we set goals each month and why hitting these goals is essential to elect Nikki Haley as the next President of the United States.

First and foremost, the monthly fundraising goals we set help us stay on track financially. Running for president is an expensive endeavor! It is amazing all the costs that pop up when trying to talk to hundreds of millions of voters. We need to make sure that we have the resources we need to reach everyone with Nikki's positive message. Setting a goal each month helps us stay focused and stay accountable to Nikki and the entire team.

Our monthly fundraising goals are also a way for us to measure our progress. Every time we meet or exceed our fundraising goal, it shows that Nikki's message is resonating and gaining traction with voters. The confidence we build when we reach or exceed our goal allows us to bring on new staff, launch new ads, and invest in new ways to reach every American.

Finally, the monthly fundraising goals we set are a way for supporters to get involved and make a real impact. **Every dollar you give helps us spread Nikki 's message, and ultimately elect Nikki Haley as the next President of the United States. **

We know that setting and meeting monthly goals is a big and stressful task, but we also know that it's essential if we want to compete at the highest level. That's why we're asking for **[your help today](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92a391c1801c4f8d92e38408cd9256ff&_e=MA0pMJtNf893dM8xZKkU81uw9BOLvEJFTQtHCYdHjCJIhqBl0oTqtGHHQSv8yOWpUeTr9Cv9fZ_kQh-GBc03AhEDfrgW9WuuzIXnF5H9gDCs6m6i0QMsSC6Ddo9k6m0KeQv1qtqSzprs7cBOoX3RCV-jV-uTb30Log6YwnIsAYLSh291CO-kCjRyY9zJyhzFXhN1gr2E2AvIGagcQbOEo1Yr0mxM6V3hhlMFmGeFCmiJlXDNt9SX4uXAeK_Z7_PSbt1-xFn3K_CcnVuvLAyz_f-zDatOfqA3P0gwZnZTi2EkTKuHQh2jOrp5Z5WMuGIfImSh7xxzhMVk3p7U9XGIdI0hLZ22DH8LCizRdFxA3e4%3D "your help today")**. **April is only a couple days from being over and we still need some additional support to hit our April goal. **

**[Will you chip in $10 or more today to help us reach our April goal?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92a391c1801c4f8d92e38408cd9256ff&_e=MA0pMJtNf893dM8xZKkU81uw9BOLvEJFTQtHCYdHjCJIhqBl0oTqtGHHQSv8yOWpUeTr9Cv9fZ_kQh-GBc03AhEDfrgW9WuuzIXnF5H9gDCs6m6i0QMsSC6Ddo9k6m0KeQv1qtqSzprs7cBOoX3RCV-jV-uTb30Log6YwnIsAYLSh291CO-kCjRyY9zJyhzFXhN1gr2E2AvIGagcQbOEowM33m1gcKtVs-q5CRgCRFRXDxwjsy0nepZ_9ackPTCTsvsS5Cprr2OO1nYFcuA-mA5AFmJ9R5l3Eg3kjuRWJH03vQx4KKQ1LYfsg3wwiQM-sh6PWqw35tUEYjr6JyLWcAVvO3sCgzMy-UimiTKi9QA%3D "Will you chip in $10 or more today to help us reach our April goal?")** Your support will help us build momentum, reach new voters, and ultimately win this election.
**[CHIP IN NOW - >>>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92a391c1801c4f8d92e38408cd9256ff&_e=MA0pMJtNf893dM8xZKkU81uw9BOLvEJFTQtHCYdHjCJIhqBl0oTqtGHHQSv8yOWpUeTr9Cv9fZ_kQh-GBc03AhEDfrgW9WuuzIXnF5H9gDCs6m6i0QMsSC6Ddo9k6m0KeQv1qtqSzprs7cBOoX3RCV-jV-uTb30Log6YwnIsAYLSh291CO-kCjRyY9zJyhzFXhN1gr2E2AvIGagcQbOEo73eQrLQYMNVmaO7efe6F43DRJA3HSMLOUeEvtS8gz5NqFKak1PW2aCWNJLSNjh52c5xcwqRO_pSNgIOEnV3qXEnENinTKMwevkC_8U9Xt0pN6yIP69Hlf8Qm_Y4bsQ2IIDt2wXIqITpnHmlr9XuJwM%3D "CHIP IN NOW ->>>")**
Thank you so much for considering our request, and for all the support you've given us so far. **None of this would be possible without you!** Together, we can elect Nikki Haley and save our great country.

Sincerely,

John Hall
Team Haley

Friend,
Before Joe Biden even announced his re-election campaign, George Soros had _already_ snuck $50,000,000 into 2024.
But just hours after Biden launched his campaign and only DAYS before the FIRST end-of-month deadline when our fundraising numbers will be compared head-to-head, **a shadowy Soros-linked Super PAC pledged another $75,000,000 to BUY the White House for Biden. **
This is what we’re up against in 2024...
Biden and the radical Left Democrats have no intention of running a _real_ campaign.
_Crooked Joe intends to hide in his basement all while his Department of Injustice persecutes yours truly and Soros’ globalist cabal buys him another 4 years in the White House._

name: Moms for Katie Porter
subject: fw:UNLOCKED triple match for Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Hey Peter,
We are reaching out to make sure that you saw this email yesterday. We received an update just 5 minutes ago from our finance team and we need 3 more people from your area if we want to meet our triple match goal tonight before it expires. Will you rush a donation before our triple-match offer expires? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Thank you!
FWD:
Our finance team just informed us that we need to work overtime to meet our goal at the end of the month. Our April fundraising deadline is just 3 days away . We need to raise $10,000 to help boost our grassroots funded movement in the next 72 hours.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/88265/images/IMG-7616%20%281%29.jpg]
Asking for money is our least favorite part of the job, but we’ve got to close the gap.
If we fall short in the next 72 hours, it could put us behind at this crucial time when we need to help Democratic women like Katie Porter build the infrastructures they need to win.
This deadline is so important that a generous donor is TRIPLE-matching every donation up to our $10,000 end-of-month goal. Please, don’t let us miss this opportunity. Will you rush a donation before our triple-match offer expires? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
We are counting on Democrats like you to power our movement because now more than ever we need to elect women to the US Senate who know first-hand what American families are up against today. This is the time to pass legislation like gun control, paid leave and universal free preschool.
Moms like Katie get it and with your help, we can fight for the change American families long deserved.
Will you join us and help send a champion for working families to the US Senate? Triple your impact today and don’t let us miss this opportunity! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Your $25=$75 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Your $100=$300 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Your $500= $1500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Your $1500=$4500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Thank you for everything!
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office
#momsforkatieporter
TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
https://www.facebook.com/momsinoffice [https://www.facebook.com/momsinoffice] https://twitter.com/momsinoffice [https://twitter.com/momsinoffice] https://instagram.com/momsinoffice [https://instagram.com/momsinoffice]

name: Jon Tester

body:
| Peter,

I just got a call from my fundraising team, and to put it simply, **I need your help.** We’re behind on our 1,000 donor planting season goal and need a serious boost in donations today to catch up.

This is the last thing I wanted to hear since Sharla and I are busy finishing up prepping equipment and getting everything ready to start planting. So unless you're willing to get your hands dirty and spend 16 hours on a tractor with us, I need your help chipping in whatever you can.

**[Any amount you can contribute early in the campaign goes a long way in helping us grow our movement and reach these critical fundraising goals. subject: 2023 Legislative Session Recap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
A look back at this years' long 105 day legislative session

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Biden FBI Targets the Church!
body:
Biden Secrets on Trump Raid!

[INSIDE JW]

Judicial Watch and CatholicVote Sue FBI and Justice Department for
Records of Targeting Catholics

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63128&L=29417&F=T&&hash=2696db5f0529f9da6ad174ec205e5f2fcace4a7ba9c3681a4b2a1940799a03a9]

The Biden administration is shredding the First Amendment –
censoring our freedom of expression by colluding with Big Tech in a
massive effort to suppress speech on social media under the pretext of
removing “misinformation” and “disinformation” and
“protecting national security.” And now, the Biden FBI is going
after our freedom of religion – targeting Catholics who adhere to
traditional beliefs on abortion and other cultural issues.

That’s why we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
along with CatholicVote Civic Action against the FBI and the
Department of Justice for records containing keywords and records
about an FBI intelligence memo targeting ‘radical traditionalist’
Catholics (_CatholicVote Civic Action and Judicial Watch, Inc. v.
Federal Bureau of Investigations and Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63128&L=29411&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LWNhdGhvbGljdm90ZS12LWRvai1mYmktY29tcGxhaW50LTAxMTY2L11fP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=34fe9444455bcd88cdccb4f73cf32067e6e88dc3bffeead5df06603302bb49f9
_(No.
1:23-cv-01166)).

In February 2023, an FBI intelligence document was leaked
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63128&L=29412&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudW5jb3ZlcmRjLmNvbS8yMDIzLzAyLzA4L3RoZS1mYmktZG91Ymxlcy1kb3duLW9uLWNocmlzdGlhbnMtYW5kLXdoaXRlLXN1cHJlbWFjeS1pbi0yMDIzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=5b55fd3ba4f5a51ec8eed8c58bf3e0e1e40d244c3fec48c216fead1e5e93536f]
that
revealed FBI targeting ” of Catholics who adhere to traditional
beliefs on abortion and other cultural issues. The _Catholic News
Agency _reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63128&L=29413&F=T&&hash=7a6e969aa0f731762885e38cb90d17da5299a15468f6af845ed39d2f26ca8669
“The leaked document has been condemned by several federal and state
officials, as well as clergy, including Bishop Barry Knestout

BIDEN GREATLY EXPANDS PROGRAM TO OFFER ILLEGALS “TEMPORARY”
REPRIEVE

Regular followers of our reporting will not be at all surprised by
anything the Biden administration destruction of our sovereignty and
open borders. Our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog has the latest
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63128&L=29410&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tZ3JlYXRseS1leHBhbmRzLXByb2dyYW0vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=829b83cadcbddb4f1cbf797850ef40853996f2c85bc324abec5c52021e35c939]
insult
to U.S. citizens and the rule of law:

> Besides condoning record-breaking illegal immigration (2.4 million
> migrants in fiscal year 2022), the Biden administration is quietly
> protecting hundreds of thousands of foreign nationals who for years
> have lived in the U.S. illegally by multiplying a program designed
> to offer temporary reprieve. The provisional amnesty is known as
> Temporary Protected Status (TPS), a humanitarian measure designed to
> shield undocumented aliens from deportation during emergencies. It
> is supposed to be a short-term solution for foreigners that do not
> quality as refugees but cannot immediately return home because of
> difficulties caused by factors such as violence, natural disasters,
> or political and economic instability. TPS, which is typically
> granted in 18-month increments, not only protects foreign nationals
> from deportation it also allows them to work in the U.S.
>
> The Obama administration went crazy with TPS
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63128&L=29418&F=T&&hash=5e91ae4252671269fe92f921355147c36706af835a5dc540a05238e5aed64702],
> renewing it for tens of thousands of Hondurans and Nicaraguans more
> than a decade and a half after a hurricane hit the Central American
> nations, prolonging it for Africans two years after originally
> issuing it due to Ebola, and repeatedly restoring it for tens of
> thousands of Haitians years after an earthquake struck the
> impoverished island. During its two terms the Obama administration
> never missed an opportunity to offer illegal immigrants reprieve,
> using inclement weather in the U.S., a virus, natural disasters and
> tainted water in an American city to extend the perk. Nationals of
> Yemen have been protected by both Democrats and Republicans,
> receiving TPS over “ongoing armed conflict” under Obama and two
> extensions under Trump. It is worth noting that Yemen is a hotbed of
> terrorism that serves as the headquarters of Al Qaeda in the Arabian
> Peninsula (AQAP).
>
> In an apparent effort to keep its promise of rebuilding a safe,
> orderly and humane immigration system that Biden asserts “was
> gutted by the previous Administration,”
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63128&L=29419&F=T&&hash=1aceaf572b70d1c9194f97d030de4a5f1053bbbea1f461597341e4c8969051b5]
> the president has greatly expanded the number of immigrants who
> qualify for TPS, a new report
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63128&L=29420&F=T&&hash=4bed3d4a75951f59ff10d5ff60a53aa35e93f8fbe756aae3780dcfd7f28db540]
> reveals. Using figures obtained from the government, the report,
> published by a well-known nonpartisan think tank, estimates that
> 670,000 individuals from 16 countries are either registered for TPS
> or newly eligible for it. Illegal aliens from the following
> countries currently benefit from the temporary reprieve:
> Afghanistan, Cameroon, El Salvador, Ethiopia, Haiti, Honduras,
> Myanmar, Nepal, Nicaragua, Syria, Somalia, South Sudan, Sudan,
> Ukraine, Venezuela and Yemen. El Salvador leads with more than
> 190,000 TPS beneficiaries in the U.S. followed by Venezuela
> (171,550) and Haiti (105,000), the figures show.
>
> The moment he got elected president, Biden worked to broaden the TPS
> program adding several countries including Afghanistan, Cameroon,
> Myanmar, Ukraine and Venezuela. The administration has also extended
> the terms of eligibility for those that were already covered by the
> amnesty, according to the report. The commander-in-chief has also
> fought to get Congress to pass a law allowing TPS recipients to
> receive legal residency (also known as a green card) that would
> eventually allow them to become American citizens. “The Biden
> administration’s expansions stand in contrast to the Trump
> administration’s efforts to end TPS for nearly all beneficiaries,
> which were blocked by a series of lawsuits,” the report states.
> “Those lawsuits are ongoing and continue to threaten the future of
> the TPS program and create uncertainty for its participants.”
>
> Most illegal immigrants protected under TPS have lived in the U.S.
> for decades and have settled in every state with California,
> Florida, New York and Texas seeing the largest numbers. The
> humanitarian relief was approved by Congress as part of the
> Immigration Act of 1990 and gives the Department of Homeland
> Security (DHS) secretary the authority to designate a country for
> TPS to offer safe haven to foreign nationals who do not qualify for
> asylum but claim to be fleeing a potentially dangerous situation
> back home. The government is required to announce 60 days before any
> TPS designation expires whether it will be extended. If it does not
> the TPS automatically extends for six months.

clean_body: Biden Secrets on Trump Raid! [INSIDE JW] Judicial Watch and CatholicVote Sue FBI and Justice Department for Records of Targeting Catholics [] The Biden administration is shredding the First Amendment – censoring our freedom of expression by colluding with Big Tech in a massive effort to suppress speech on social media under the pretext of removing “misinformation” and “disinformation” and “protecting national security.” And now, the Biden FBI is going after our freedom of religion – targeting Catholics who adhere to traditional beliefs on abortion and other cultural issues. That’s why we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit along with CatholicVote Civic Action against the FBI and the Department of Justice for records containing keywords and records about an FBI intelligence memo targeting ‘radical traditionalist’ Catholics (CatholicVote Civic Action and Judicial Watch, Inc. v. Federal Bureau of Investigations and Department of Justice [ (No. 1:23-cv-01166)). In February 2023, an FBI intelligence document was leaked [] that revealed FBI targeting ” of Catholics who adhere to traditional beliefs on abortion and other cultural issues. The Catholic News Agency reported [ “The leaked document has been condemned by several federal and state officials, as well as clergy, including Bishop Barry Knestout [] of the Diocese of Richmond, who recently called the memo a ‘threat to religious liberty.’” On March 8, 2023, we teamed up with CatholicVote and sent four FOIA requests to the FBI, which is a division of the Department of Justice) for: (a) All emails, Lync messages, and text messages sent to and from the following FBI Headquarters officials: Director Christopher Wray, Deputy Director Paul Abbate, Asst. Director George P. Beach, II, General Counsel Jason Jones, Chief of Staff Jonathan Lenzner, Executive Asst. Dir. Larissa Knapp, and Asst. Dir. Timothy Langan for the period March 1, 2022, to the present referencing: “Catholics” “Latin Mass” “Radical-Traditionalist Catholics” “RTC” “Church Militant” “Catholic League” “Southern Poverty Law Center” “SPLC” “Pope Francis” “Vatican II” (b) All emails, Lync messages, and text messages sent to and from the following FBI Richmond Field Office (RFO) officials: SAIC Stanley Meador, ASAIC David Lewis, ASAIC Stephen Farina, and the FBI Richmond Chief Division Counsel for the period March 1, 2022 to the present referencing: “Catholics” “Latin Mass” “Radical-Traditionalist Catholics” “RTC” “Church Militant” “Catholic League” “Southern Poverty Law Center” “SPLC” “Pope Francis” “Vatican II” “Second Vatican Council” “Rosary” “FSSP” (c) All emails, Lync messages, and text messages sent to and from the following FBI Headquarters officials: Director Christopher Wray, Deputy Director Paul Abbate, Asst. Director George P. Beach, II, General Counsel Jason Jones, Chief of Staff Jonathan Lenzner, Executive Asst. Dir. Larissa Knapp, and Asst. Dir. Timothy Langan for the period March 1, 2022, to the present referencing: actions taken to remove the Intelligence Note from FBI systems; the FBI review of (1) the basis for the Intelligence Note and (2) any official FBI actions taken pursuant to the Intelligence Note (d) All emails, Lync messages, and text messages sent to and from the following FBI Richmond Field Office (RFO) officials: SAIC Stanley Meador, ASAIC David Lewis, ASAIC Stephen Farina, and the FBI Richmond Chief Division Counsel for the period March 1, 2022, to the present referencing: actions taken to remove the Intelligence Note from FBI systems; the FBI review of (1) the basis for the Intelligence Note; (2) any official FBI actions taken pursuant to the Intelligence Note Also, on March 8, 2023, we and CatholicVote sent similar FOIA requests to the U.S. Department of Justice; Office of the Attorney General and Office of the Deputy Attorney General. “Our weaponized and corrupt government agencies have demonstrated a pattern of contempt for justice and the rule of law by prioritizing partisan ideology and agendas over the protection of the American people – in particular those with whom they disagree politically,” said CatholicVote President Brian Burch. “We are demanding transparency from our government and are determined to uncover just how high up the anti-Catholic bigotry goes.” In a brazen attack on the First Amendment and Christians, the Biden FBI planned to treat Catholics as potential terrorists and spy on them in their churches, and now, as our new FOIA lawsuit shows, the FBI and Justice Departments are trying to cover their tracks by hiding documents about this growing scandal. (CatholicVote.org [] is a community of patriotic Americans who believe that the timeless truths of the Catholic faith are good for America. It makes its mission “to inspire every Catholic in America to live out the truths of our faith in public life.”) BIDEN NATIONAL ARCHIVES HIDES OVER 85% OF TRUMP RAID RECORDS The Biden administration’s National Archives is hiding almost every record it has about its manufactured records dispute with President Trump. As of March 31, the agency has released only 1,276 pages of over 8,000 [] records about the unprecedented document dispute and raid on the home of former President Trump. Click here [] or here [] to review the records. The records were released as the result of our August 2022 FOIA lawsuit [] filed after the National Archives and Records Administration unlawfully failed to respond to a February 2022 FOIA request (Judicial Watch v National Archives and Records Administration [] (No. 1:22-cv-02535)) for: All records regarding the referral from NARA to the Department of Justice regarding the records management procedures of former President Donald Trump ( ). This request includes all related records of communication between any official or employee of NARA and any official or employee of the Department of Justice and/or any other branch, department, agency, or office of the federal government. * All records regarding the retrieval of records from President Trump or any individual or entity acting on his behalf by the National Archives and Records Administration. This request includes related records of communication between any official or employee of NARA and President Trump and/or any individual or entity acting on his behalf. The records uncovered by our lawsuit include information further confirming how the Biden White House was directly involved [] in the dispute by initiating “special access request” that spurred an FBI investigation of Trump’s records. Gary Stern, general counsel for the National Archives wrote to his colleagues on August 23, 2022: And, this evening the Post just published a new story detailing an April 12, email that I sent to the Trump reps concerning the DOJ special access request for the 15 Trump boxes, along with many other details concerning the DOJ request and the overall issue. [Redacted] “On April 12, an Archives official emailed Philbin [former White House deputy counsel Pat Philbin] and John Eisenberg, another former deputy White House counsel, to tell them the Justice Department, via the Biden White House, had made the request. The email offered the lawyers the opportunity to view the documents as well, but said the documents were too sensitive to be removed from the agency’s secure facility.” We are in the forefront in the court battle for transparency regarding the abusive and unprecedented Biden administration raid on Trump’s home. In August 2022, we forced the release [] of the raid affidavit through its court request [] to unseal the warrant materials used in the unprecedented raid on the home of former President Trump. In September 2022, we filed [] lawsuits against the DOJ for its records and the FBI’s records about the Mar-a-Lago raid search warrant application and approval, as well as communications about the warrant between the FBI, Executive Office of the President and the Secret Service. In October 2022, we sued [] the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for all communications of the U.S. Secret Service internally and with the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) regarding the raid on Trump’s home and for any video or audio recordings made during the raid. In November 2022, we sued [] the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for all communications between the Secret Service and Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) regarding the search warrant that precipitated the raid on former Trump’s Florida residence at Mar-a-Lago. The Biden administration’s abuse of Trump (and the rule of law) will only expand and you can be sure Judicial Watch will stand fast for the rule of law at every turn. BIDEN GREATLY EXPANDS PROGRAM TO OFFER ILLEGALS “TEMPORARY” REPRIEVE Regular followers of our reporting will not be at all surprised by anything the Biden administration destruction of our sovereignty and open borders. Our Corruption Chronicles blog has the latest [] insult to U.S. citizens and the rule of law: Besides condoning record-breaking illegal immigration (2.4 million migrants in fiscal year 2022), the Biden administration is quietly protecting hundreds of thousands of foreign nationals who for years have lived in the U.S. illegally by multiplying a program designed to offer temporary reprieve. The provisional amnesty is known as Temporary Protected Status (TPS), a humanitarian measure designed to shield undocumented aliens from deportation during emergencies. It is supposed to be a short-term solution for foreigners that do not quality as refugees but cannot immediately return home because of difficulties caused by factors such as violence, natural disasters, or political and economic instability. TPS, which is typically granted in 18-month increments, not only protects foreign nationals from deportation it also allows them to work in the U.S. The Obama administration went crazy with TPS [], renewing it for tens of thousands of Hondurans and Nicaraguans more than a decade and a half after a hurricane hit the Central American nations, prolonging it for Africans two years after originally issuing it due to Ebola, and repeatedly restoring it for tens of thousands of Haitians years after an earthquake struck the impoverished island. During its two terms the Obama administration never missed an opportunity to offer illegal immigrants reprieve, using inclement weather in the U.S., a virus, natural disasters and tainted water in an American city to extend the perk. Nationals of Yemen have been protected by both Democrats and Republicans, receiving TPS over “ongoing armed conflict” under Obama and two extensions under Trump. It is worth noting that Yemen is a hotbed of terrorism that serves as the headquarters of Al Qaeda in the Arabian Peninsula (AQAP). In an apparent effort to keep its promise of rebuilding a safe, orderly and humane immigration system that Biden asserts “was gutted by the previous Administration,” [] the president has greatly expanded the number of immigrants who qualify for TPS, a new report [] reveals. Using figures obtained from the government, the report, published by a well-known nonpartisan think tank, estimates that 670,000 individuals from 16 countries are either registered for TPS or newly eligible for it. Illegal aliens from the following countries currently benefit from the temporary reprieve: Afghanistan, Cameroon, El Salvador, Ethiopia, Haiti, Honduras, Myanmar, Nepal, Nicaragua, Syria, Somalia, South Sudan, Sudan, Ukraine, Venezuela and Yemen. El Salvador leads with more than 190,000 TPS beneficiaries in the U.S. followed by Venezuela (171,550) and Haiti (105,000), the figures show. The moment he got elected president, Biden worked to broaden the TPS program adding several countries including Afghanistan, Cameroon, Myanmar, Ukraine and Venezuela. The administration has also extended the terms of eligibility for those that were already covered by the amnesty, according to the report. The commander-in-chief has also fought to get Congress to pass a law allowing TPS recipients to receive legal residency (also known as a green card) that would eventually allow them to become American citizens. “The Biden administration’s expansions stand in contrast to the Trump administration’s efforts to end TPS for nearly all beneficiaries, which were blocked by a series of lawsuits,” the report states. “Those lawsuits are ongoing and continue to threaten the future of the TPS program and create uncertainty for its participants.” Most illegal immigrants protected under TPS have lived in the U.S. for decades and have settled in every state with California, Florida, New York and Texas seeing the largest numbers. The humanitarian relief was approved by Congress as part of the Immigration Act of 1990 and gives the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) secretary the authority to designate a country for TPS to offer safe haven to foreign nationals who do not qualify for asylum but claim to be fleeing a potentially dangerous situation back home. The government is required to announce 60 days before any TPS designation expires whether it will be extended. If it does not the TPS automatically extends for six months. Until next week, [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2023, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

body:
You helped make it happen! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-quhtktl-trhiujldw-u/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhtktl-trhiujldw-r/) _*The following message is from a sponsor_ [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhtktl-trhiujldw-y/) Last week, The Colorado State Shooting Association played a major role in defeating the "Assault Weapons Ban" in Denver. This is a huge win for the Second Amendment and for all Coloradans. To celebrate this victory, we are sending free bumper stickers to all of our members.

Our members are the reason that we won. Read more about the win **[here.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhtktl-trhiujldw-j/)**

See below for how the sticker looks. [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quhtktl-trhiujldw-t/) Whether you are already a member or just signed up, to redeem your free sticker simply send us an email to **[Executive_Director@CSSA.org](mailto:Executive_Director@CSSA.org)** with the address you would like us to mail it to.

If you are not a member already, you can sign up for only $5 per month, $50 a year, and $140 for three years by clicking on the button below.

We have an all-volunteer board of directors which means that every dime raised stays in Colorado and goes directly to defending the Second Amendment. \- April 28, 2023 -
President Trump Draws Thousands of Fired Up Supporters in New Hampshire
On Thursday, thousands of fired up supporters and grassroots activists from across New Hampshire welcomed President Donald J. Trump to Manchester. At the event, President Trump announced endorsements from over 50 members of the New Hampshire legislature, signaling the overwhelming support he has in the Granite State. President Trump’s remarks emphasized his strong record of building the greatest economy in the world _twice_ , and his comprehensive plan to do it a third time once back in the White House. _Members of the New Hampshire legislature who have endorsed President Trump joined him on stage._ __ "When I left office, we handed Joe Biden the fastest economic recovery ever recorded — all with no inflation," President Trump said. "He took that booming economy, and he promptly blew it to shreds." __ **Under President Trump, America was roaring back with the No. 1 fastest economic recovery ever recorded.** On President Trump’s [ _last day in office_](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kT-TmzAUxD-N6PDAkwBTUJxDKOyZS3FFLtdoZPSwlKA_I4kw3KfPQJy0u5rfavcJ42c9bR1pLgRAaRkJAKEvBODGLu-v9e37rc_Nx4_PvK8rtu4ufCEAafP4_-mTckIj9LyrTZ_JDsYzjGOGXVmfoaFt3Zwz1bVTVbOyBZimEkXRVKxBqO4t3O-sqkSR6Q4KoAWDtqCsLOuTEHimDLHFpoWKFoQVq7Yn6ayY5c8UFuNPozPZ3KmUfDy-NBAYkkKl53n3CAzOa6udJTBM2go7IoGhagtWlblya37XEm2eXBgVyjwpzA9wHnB0vzFsO5IOSzLcoNSLIbR_tq13MboljEhob8eZP-d4WqMwXuiHJbQ_ap1zHzDucYkfGVwGsUaelFuisDJyN_FJB5R88Twu3ruQMESuLbe4ciWMj0oH_Md3NqFNf7Pzj-36eHsVtL0RqLmdtSS0py_N7e3XRab3QzzOTPvr17Cl_tv1Mwud9KueZx3rhrDisRfbZ_sTAAD__yggsGY), GDP was growing at 6.3 percent, inflation was 1.4 percent, the price of gasoline was $2.39 a gallon. But Joe Biden has brought President Trump’s booming economy to a grinding halt. [ _According to a new report released Thursday_](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kcGO2ywUhZ8G72zhCzFk4cWfn7GqidSqq05ngwjgmMpgClhu5ukru2l36Dvo3HPuVT7Obnz0iF0QwORMRgCI_IcArvTy9rm7fruK2r9__6hFd6LbrsL_CKA8ov339enSWK_cvFMmKtOD5qB1Zfu248DIuWO8mvqW69Hwc3u6YXLimBPcqvbExhuAZpzRyvWAgWAKZ0xo23aNUpYTau3ZsjOcCEYUby40ZglqNj9KWn1s9OKruZ9KifmINCAYtm1rdLjpXUQw7K4IBkz3N0Mw3E2sf7b1zutmKn5GZFiLl94at3pExLNOt8O8rElbRETQs3z2fUpa-ajcPSAijty8jslmZ2wo8kgnTVJblmVa1qyCyXIZ5eiSNXKNMq8xLqnYlKULMthNTsrHPLlk__ovodhQ_syu7-IX-0TG6StF0MkwO4OIyJeNv6355V0f8LgjEa8v6VHEl9ePKvUmbm6eXe4Yovi-F9vX8jsAAP__sf6iGw), U.S. GDP rose at only 1.1% in the first quarter of 2023, only half the projections. President Trump created 7 million new jobs—**triple** what was projected. These new high-paying jobs led to [ _the lowest unemployment rate in nearly 50 years_](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc1u3CwUhq8G72xhYLBn4UXy8c0iltJuqnayQQSOx1TmR4BjTa6-sjvp9n3Qe85zUC4udroPqHtGhMzWZEQIok-IkJE9_3rl489R1O7t-lkLfmLbTsl_iJByj_Dv6aOlAafssqedqMxAdE-0rmBoeU86euZdX82D6nTfTrjrMZ7wiQE37-1Zt-xdacIxbys7EEwoZuSMKWtb3igFPWUAZ-jO5EQxYnizvjHBq8X8Lml1sdHBVcswlxLzsdIFkctBttkWmMOaoVFJz_YDcnMLH1-4VsZZb3NJqtjga6V12GXy7MCXvBfRy1qcdGDs6hAVD0e-hzmsSQOiwutFPo7wQFq5qOzNIyoOmb6OCbI14Is8JkuT1JZl2XdT3mQZJjnZBEauUeY1xpAKpCytlx42OSsX82wTfPUHX8CXv7Pr75GObHwd7xERLv1iDaLiqscfl-v09iSO8PhcKl7-T_civr18VmkwcbPLYjPvEMO3XWw_5J8AAAD___C9sBQ). Income rose in every single metropolitan area for the first time in three decades. body:
“Increasing the homestead exemption has failed to stop property tax bills from rising in TX &, I’d argue, is nothing but a political stunt.”

Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## **Huffines in the Houston Chronicle: Property tax cuts proposed by House and Senate are Band-Aid solutions**
## _" Increasing the homestead exemption has failed to stop property tax bills from rising in TX &, I'd argue, is nothing but a political stunt."_
[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zlkjtdk-yuddtktydi-y/) DALLAS, TX, April 28, 2023 -- Don Huffines published a timely [op-ed in the Houston Chronicle](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zlkjtdk-yuddtktydi-j/) this morning on the tax fight brewing in the Texas Legislature. The stakes could not be higher.Take a moment to imagine the liberty and prosperity in Texas if we had the ability to actually own our property. Because in a way, we don't. And this is the dirty secret about the Texas property tax. You never -- ever -- finish making payments on your property. Huffines details the two "solutions" proposed by the Texas House and Senate, then shares his plan to permanently lower taxes, and closes with shocking legislative backing. [Read Here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zlkjtdk-yuddtktydi-t/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.###

body:
| | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTg2n19ru0yBXyiZTiH7dtUIqCFviRutFmfFMdET7B_5_DpkfLPw04cqBm-6USh6IAGS9zNCHeZxmTU592acMTqcCospM7bwgP7U2HWhBdNiqx-aytwzjoYYqF6cQLw4sq4Gxx6SNEWFPo4lDHuteE4Trv3JsqP5i3SXHplz7zPmdkF1DT5cCTriOGDqlGAXiWPMlU2ezcpImSUeE4fLYR9sS_yJXlXXEN94puRsdVAOxcY61_ZprSPxB1W0cNmY0VdA/3vr/sPNv3r6dQvm-OWRxTdqlHw/h0/Qs6TlAaDlhYcmdax99CUkDbva2Na8i2TYVwkMjahJcc) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.
---
[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yDlvnM2jBW9sbXZMScUxaDDAZib5N3I5cZ-7Y6cDGksPKXTlKvsGpCXSzqyy_eJwH5WRhl4jsOTFLOdM1474NNcth7_S9sR22NmZndwJR3bG1-NqVEgUrJmdn_bVl-Jrc1MOYbdkCwHgiIwVim6KJqgmMKPcDENqEZKUFgyQplSBnCg-b9UKUCp8O3lHHK2s6FDxeMgv4QXtZPcOZp3lquYN2XIIm1-hFyshooBTAAtQ0Piu7dOvH3xXJ2xhXqim9lEAqP12scp2DPmfcSpZ1p-iPnrGJwnexdq-piy4leqMy5J-DZ1Ix3F5Nji65_9UWCWa3HRcLKxjNS2DVUEwHe9WLOVAGeGRGJqH8rOMp-Y9rfdt5HhRKYG7QoLEpCfJJuKlSdntLfgxz49-0x-aVesqf_fIajEDHl0l60REoPsx8vB06Vmu_bws4zRM1zC9w/3vr/sPNv3r6dQvm-OWRxTdqlHw/h1/L149URvFfeGJHOVdrswmy4jjDi8AqgpQIj4X24ux0CI)
Friend, it’s Raul.

Last Friday night, the Supreme Court ruled to temporarily preserve access to mifepristone, a safe and commonly-used abortion pill, after a Trump-appointed judge in Texas unilaterally decided to ban it.

The judge's ruling had no basis in science or medicine, and was nothing more than a political decision of the most cynical nature. **And despite our temporary victory in the Supreme Court, it’s clear that we must constantly prioritize our fight for reproductive freedom.** [**So I’m counting on top supporters like you, friend. # FOX & Friends Features
Breakthrough Solar
Generator
_**Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans
Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness.Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms.**_And then BOOM!_**_**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars.Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures...Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-7D9y03g) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers.Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon.**But that's not why this generator is going viral...****National Security Experts
Fear Imminent Threat To
Our Power Grid**Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid...Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid!And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger...**A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger...**Our Government Is
Woefully Unprepared**They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks...And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family.**Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness.Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled.Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with.This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat.**That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and **without gas, fumes or noise**.Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._SOTnBnUGJHL1o1g).**THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse.It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**...**And why over 107,000

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpogn8s1hvnd6spfh58eb8io3alovq62p3r5v0k0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob5cph2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmmvagij7tlthklmr9hg23vidi3cpf64kl27nsi0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob5cph2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3j6ns98s4on00219nikamd6ci0h5up0g01u5q88_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob5cph2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1ggrvt1lmv55cvkgleadsfttuqn0p5qq98elg8o_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob5cph2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z72792ddvvbnpt5nilu1rhp6ucavgim2thuasbmg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob5cph2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zo21o65ioe0tg7bddeghd7re6evfpf0ov0sho4mg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob5cph2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv2a5rlt8r3io1h3vbenngk5aoirlf62rkrpdut0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob5cph2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb4393t3ibct4ukdthbbidc718es76agl2864uu0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob5cph2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjhpo82ekb4293dvl7hfuo53gfagq0c9kt1jb6do_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob5cph2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znb65hrtp43to4el5ou3q04fej01a5q6igsi3ch8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob5cph2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zf93kjq36m5k07f0ajete3hmhc7g2th689rll2oo_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob5cph2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbmp5g94gqv3199n6av8ao9uufkd3ecnuthlsip0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob5cph2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdoas98tjiqeceddeqt1hno3fpa8hdlsch9om548_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob5cph2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z37pl1hb8te3rbeb66k9s8rv4maipbumjan0r1go_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob5cph2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk90sm3l7oeieu4qbeqi67nq7dkekcdr317k0ps0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob5cph2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

Deroy Murdock

| | [HELP REPUBLICANS CATCH UP](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjmpc4tsuuk8tkgoe09pnm3clmss21s51k64oqr8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob0s9h2bs)
---

As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU.

People think that they need to write huge checks to make a difference, but that's simply not the case. House Republicans are powered by the $5, $8, or $25 donations of grassroots patriots like YOU.

Asking for money is my least favorite part of campaigning, but Hakeem Jeffries has racked up some serious cash that could devastate our ranks if we don't respond in kind.

Any contribution can make ALL the difference in setting the tone for this GOP Majority and what we can accomplish, but if everyone sits out, we're DONE.

body:

| | Fellow conservative, I'm honored to be reaching out on behalf of Heritage Action. They are one of the conservative organizations I trust the most because of their track record of conservative wins for the American people. Where other groups make promises, **Heritage Action _delivers_ on them.** As a member of Congress, Heritage Action helped me and my colleagues achieve a handful of conservative legislative victories and thwart radical left-wing legislation on numerous occasions. As governor, I’ve seen just how effective their grassroots campaigns are. ➡️ Their **_ESG Hurts_****campaign** warned millions of Americans about the dangers of “woke” ESG policies across the country, **including Florida, which is now officially _“where woke goes to die.”_** ** ** ➡️ Their **_Save the Schools initiative_** highlighted the dangers of critical race theory, the necessity of parental rights, and school choice. **Florida has since passed historic legislation on parental rights and school choice.** ➡️ Their **_Save our Elections campaign_** alerted us to the vulnerabilities in our elections. **Now, Florida has the most secure and fair elections in the country.**

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpebnhn2vfa204shgtdfl7g15jb4ptceknegv6j0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob1c3h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4tdgd8p634p33587eagmpme9qb3nb570h8c8erg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob1c3h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6vhqr671qeb5dpi6aojp7b33cg7kto7mfdvklso_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob1c3h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztak532gqqh1hf06o46ml5reg149moobkchbr9a0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob1c3h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9fb52e1ese4ok4q91d5hqdcsqdnuet9sh0t2ca8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob1c3h2bs)

body:
We need to hear from you!

|

| | | |
---

Friend,

House Republicans have reached out multiple times, yet we still haven’t heard from you!

We wanted to reach out **ONE LAST TIME** and invite you to renew your 2023 sustaining membership. After today, you will be **REMOVED** from our membership roster.
**You’ve fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.**

---

---

Renewing your membership is of critical importance to the future of the Republican party.

**Here’s why renewing your membership for 2023 is so important:**
1. You will be supporting conservatives across the country as they go on offense and bring the fight to the Radical Democrats.
2. You will be supporting our efforts to hold Joe Biden and the Radical Left accountable for their corruption and failures.
3. You will be an essential part of defending our majority and fighting for conservative values.

**[We can’t do it without you. Renew your membership before it’s too late>>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2t66ge8fhaugso9k8tctnh8k70hjm5j2ihj65u8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm4ob3cth2bs "We can’t do it without you. Renew your membership before it’s too late")**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: This campaign is run by grassroots leaders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$28.99**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf0oile7lod8gsgct21ll19pvh2sf9j7c3lemfd0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm2oj0cjh2bs)
That's our average donation this month, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvr3qk8vcnch6j3nn8atghlq3ma7uuqi2tlruu40_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm2oj0cjh2bs)**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, $5, or even our average gift for this month- $28.99?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0vkj0qsn0fqa1g4hosubeu06jolg1ghqp0jjfn8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm2oj0cjh2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt8fu9bndpngegm5k01pvqdr28e67ue3rrf8df6o_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm2oj0cjh2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpmcrul2o415429gsaogn2965hg3cnglo3vgg3t0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm2oj0cjh2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbpcrvuev9tpon0fmjt1uhaqun9oq0r1840hg260_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm2oj0cjh2bs) | | [Chip in $28.99 ➔](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfpn4fesmrfviav38c0f99fe9j1lfvelbl2kmhm0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm2oj0cjh2bs)

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z467r7f7nans0eu6v57ead3nv2plbd3flgqbq3t0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm2oj0cjh2bs)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmmf20pn2c81f8vigan33r5sgiseqhan01nunr9g_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm2oj0cjh2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1splgeoljtd2ottpio6clut0al6u83l1q66gvo8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm2oj0cjh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $28.99 -> **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbmfee249epn59r69u6bj9rtmct3qt2gc3lf0100_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm2oj0cjh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zb7dnc87bdirmkeb7vs51mbj19ug7qakdc2l4b4g_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm2oj0cjh2bs)

---

| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv1608a7o1s4e83qqjemqn2a0m7n6rmaovhi9f6o_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm2oj0cjh2bs)| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv3irqo9tholh98uj5b44gg5942ruuoe6arsehto_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm2oj0cjh2bs)| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlvhipeaihtfcbm5jrl1skkv0m8f1uiqueg9gv78_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm2oj0cjh2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline. I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite. We are leading this race with actual solutions. I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. Pro Life Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:

subject: The Doug Collins Podcast Update – Saturday, April 29, 2023
body:
| [Having trouble viewing this email? Click here to see it in your browser.](http://click1.srnemail.com/ViewMessage.do?m=hnbbscsfn&r=slvkkccvcrvp&s=twbpvcddvtbttrdbbgljtsvmcsstzcgrszb&q=1682769600&a=view)

---
---
| |
###
---
| | [ NYC Chaos, Vicious Peacocks, and Pete Rose should be in the HOF: Another Friday Finest ](http://click1.srnemail.com/drcjcmllcbrfbbwlfrrntfsbzcfdmzzbpmnwzprhpmmsps_dshmmrrhrphjftmspdmjmgg.html)
### _Thursday, April 27, 2023_
James and I touch on the major topics of the week including the New York Sports teams all relevant at the same time. Also, in our continuing discussions on the happenings in our nations Zoos, we talk about the Peacock from the Bronx Zoo that is on the loose biting people. Also, for good measure we discuss the travesty that is Pete Rose not being in the Hall of Fame. All this and more for your listening and viewing enjoyment! [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/zbbfslggscbkccqgkbbtrkdcvskwlvvcmltqvmbpmlldmf_dshmmrrhrphjftmspdmjmgg.html)
---|---
| [ Do people really care about the issues? ](http://click1.srnemail.com/jrrnvmzzvptwppkzwttdbwfpcvwqmccprmdkcrtjrmmfjs_dshmmrrhrphjftmspdmjmgg.html)
### _Wednesday, April 26, 2023_
It is over 18 months till the 2024 election for president and we are off and running. I give you a look ahead at the issues that will define it as of now. Use this as your guidepost for the campaign ahead! [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/wldjgsttghwbhhmtbwwydbzhkgbnskkhlsymklwvlsszvd_dshmmrrhrphjftmspdmjmgg.html)
| [ On my Front Porch looking in ](http://click1.srnemail.com/hqnfcwllcdszddplzssgvzmdjczhwjjdqwgpjqsbqwwmbq_dshmmrrhrphjftmspdmjmgg.html)
### _Monday, April 24, 2023_
Songs can put the world in perspective and remind us of what really matters. Frank Meyers joins me today for a wonderful discussion of life and music. The man behind songs like “ I Swear” and “ I am already there” helps put life in its place. Enjoy [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/amllhpvvhcynccgvnyywmnscrhntprrckpwgrkydkppsdd_dshmmrrhrphjftmspdmjmgg.html)

name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: We Are Taking Legal Action
body:
America First Legal will continue fighting the corruption and lawlessness of the Radical Left.

| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgrnrd7v8bp13g3spkd10ej78os0au2njc2j86lg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36chh2bs)
