name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb83di5pdfsrrgdjmd5gip9ii30lj6f0rt70br5g_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36chh2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf3rrnsue4lu34gob5lbo3j5bot319ve4blcppa8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36chh2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbl99ujjrcrqluo4stnfptsept5bk2tasdgneau0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36chh2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6mt3sepc8u8lrqr5o4nvu92tgfm06rnpsac38ro_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36chh2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7j2jfb8t1eejdmmlmd3sca717ottp8butd59dog_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36chh2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9699dmjarevprq2a8796hq8p0gi83ponhjf8f80_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36chh2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo1jog1ohb53a2ak8en96odt3qdm95nooq92g0og_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36chh2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbu1ahrlicc1gde2ccbjrhhluci57ii1beihh848_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36chh2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdah9pfktrdcocpsabgmhhfgr0nidviqd6dd84p8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36chh2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zstdmpvjoa456hruffl040kee58ijcsf5ld475sg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36chh2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt6t4bodli071r5evvufpimbf5pdkr7nigo3shh8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni60p71cpjmcoh1k8gn48n24hhm1oj7cdhm0pj4c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zian55o9hi9f7upiq9d39eomu2751ht59qjtn4c0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36chh2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztqmdv1q2fktlo3fq74onouo1k03kt6nsb68opq8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or0s9jm6or0cpi649fg)

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Bank Accounts: Frozen!
body:
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, In 1990, the Brazilian government froze the bank accounts of thousands of citizens. In 2013, the victims were the people of Cyprus. In 2022, it hit closer to home -- in Canada. The government used its 1988 Emergency Act to freeze the bank accounts of hundreds of striking truckers. Think nothing like this could happen in the United States? If so, think again. |
---
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.
See front page is right here
It gives the Fed the power to track and potentially even control your checking account.
Not just the money you have in your account at the moment ...
But also, every single check, withdrawal, deposit~~,~~ and transaction.
Practically everything you do with your money!
[You can find out the eerie details by clicking here.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcfc0hc333ildu3unrm012lh8of6hvrl3ecjkhlo_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36chh2bs)
Be sure to do so with urgency.
A pilot program is already underway.
The next step is to roll it out to nearly every bank in America.
[Click here to learn how to protect your money](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqd2cgml5an7kcl3o6det5epfmubv9fdloihj8i0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36chh2bs).
Good luck and God bless!
---
Martin D. Weiss, PhD
Weiss Ratings Founder
P.S. This is not about a digital currency. It's very different. [Find out exactly what it is here.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zok44b0tqgt7orn11gkiccv4hj6i8j8r55mkj3bo_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36chh2bs)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: This campaign is run by grassroots leaders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$28.99**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3qk9hgneqbipui50rabshl1e0l4tfut77ftmvlg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36cdh2bs)
That's our average donation this month, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9t7ok9ause4pmbu6f2015gjnpf8u31js5p089dg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36cdh2bs)**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, $5, or even our average gift for this month- $28.99?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8ej76q344jicppfqjghftaa7j3v7lud18mbu85g_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36cdh2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpk9qks4usc0gr8v2lipqrerlucai54563mvrmog_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36cdh2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z62rlv2si8s79bbuh81sd4jnig3bkrb6u4a87gsg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36cdh2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4bhdd4fmmnjulmj2mlf6kct4vss1mgafdflglb8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36cdh2bs) | | [Chip in $28.99 ➔](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4jre7lnmmsorech0vi314b0jamdiq7edpvhr1i0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36cdh2bs)

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu5rfmj742et3o26fdjsq06dknt5avmbfj3rl3do_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36cdh2bs)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpt8t16f4qja5ifam814tbpjg1epv7ueq6qakqn0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36cdh2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfstiko882d5a7b6s88apcqethoskasogl0rqs1o_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36cdh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $28.99 -> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqfkud42psrhspsh83k361i4lvb283m5gauq6t30_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36cdh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvis24lk19v0oerdkn5pjctaupjhj4adlbn4bqco_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36cdh2bs)

---

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z727u28cd20cadi9gnmpicder9okaom5kg5r2970_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36cdh2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8gk7bl104clr45kdukcl2280s8np36nntmloi58_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36cdh2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5rgaha181pge9kn57r4u9m4q9a0aakffjpql3v0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm6o36cdh2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: John James
subject: Oops…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan |
body:
I forgot to mention this—but it’s important.
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=f4bcfa209ec2aae3ddd781fbf6edb61c2af836af142e429ce188c341a52705791101ca97622c2aa44448d6a80026de3a2bb4a23203f76731)
---
| | | Peter, There's one thing I forgot to say in this email: **I don 't want to simply defend this majority -- I want to EXPAND it. ** The Democrats think they are putting me on defense by calling me out as a top target this cycle. But I'm not playing defense this year, Peter: I'm on offense. I'm planning to get even more done for the American people and strengthen our majority. **[Will you help me protect& expand our majority in the House?](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=f4bcfa209ec2aae381f39d9af20a3b6a935b419e1ec970a235993afa06896f124db080f7e54982d3a5ae557e0c78414a6a2ebafa2bd4fe0a "Will you help me protect & expand our majority in the House?")**-John
---
| | | [ DONATE NOW](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=f4bcfa209ec2aae3ddd781fbf6edb61c2af836af142e429ce188c341a52705791101ca97622c2aa44448d6a80026de3a2bb4a23203f76731)
---
| \----------- Forwarded message -----------
From: John James
Date: April 28, 2023
Subject: Can you believe it's been this long, Peter?
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=f4bcfa209ec2aae3c6d8ac545147a1c26b057d8af1afffbaa924ff531aa90c62e7844921ad2ed6ece839c36593e5b963ee276d27a7d6aedf "dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
| Peter, Can you believe it's been over 100 days since I started serving in Congress? In that time:
* **I fought for American families** , passing a landmark energy bill and voting for the Parents Bill of Rights.
* **I stood up for Michigan,** leading an effort to protect our beautiful Great Lakes from a new Canadian nuclear waste facility.
* **And I passed my first piece of legislation** : a bill that protects Medicare and Social Security from cuts during any debt ceiling negotiations. We've got to keep our promises to America's seniors, and I'm proud that this is my first bill.

_Peter, I 'm doing everything I can to keep the promises I made to the American people when I went to Washington._ _And I 'm just getting started._ After 100 days, I hope it's clear: **I 'm 100% ALL-IN on America**. It's why the Democrats ALREADY have our seat on their list of top targets. They think that MI-10 is one of the seats they can flip to retake the majority. **But I 've got a surprise for them: There's NO WAY I'm backing down.** **[Are you with me, Co-Pilot? Then help me hit our April fundraising goal.](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=f4bcfa209ec2aae32d5f2bc7c7082d0698d7c27007ebe5a795612668cd8bda1c8777b78b4c9132210caad2bb47baacef0d5ee67c671190d7 "Are you with me, Co-Pilot? Then help me hit our April fundraising goal.")**
---
| [](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=f4bcfa209ec2aae3ddd781fbf6edb61c2af836af142e429ce188c341a52705791101ca97622c2aa44448d6a80026de3a2bb4a23203f76731)
---
| We're getting to work for the American people, but there's so much more left to do. **[Stand with me this month and let's keep going!](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=f4bcfa209ec2aae39de52c8510016badbec9440252487cc4969cf997b81b4ae204ba67063837df024dce21fc768cea09fadaa2e978afed5f "Stand with me this month and let’s keep going!")** Thank you,
John James
---

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Bank Accounts: Frozen!
body:
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, In 1990, the Brazilian government froze the bank accounts of thousands of citizens. In 2013, the victims were the people of Cyprus. In 2022, it hit closer to home -- in Canada. The government used its 1988 Emergency Act to freeze the bank accounts of hundreds of striking truckers. Think nothing like this could happen in the United States? If so, think again. |
---
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.
See front page is right here
It gives the Fed the power to track and potentially even control your checking account.
Not just the money you have in your account at the moment ...
But also, every single check, withdrawal, deposit~~,~~ and transaction.
Practically everything you do with your money!
[You can find out the eerie details by clicking here.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665334%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BwMR%2bzWyrZpoJ76c3yrTVg&sysid=1)
Be sure to do so with urgency.
A pilot program is already underway.
The next step is to roll it out to nearly every bank in America.
[Click here to learn how to protect your money](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665345%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f53cytF7V13saUkpxp71Gg&sysid=1).
Good luck and God bless!
---
Martin D. Weiss, PhD
Weiss Ratings Founder
P.S. This is not about a digital currency. It's very different. [Find out exactly what it is here.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665346%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hq%2bTh3%2fvV3DM1mP9QTVJ1Q&sysid=1)

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Tucker Carlson was our first fan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
In May of 2021, I launched a unique political action committee... And Tucker was a fan immediately!

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkr9881l276gff3jn51mgbhgrmljcpav28p6ilv8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm9or5cjh2bs)
---
My name is Ryan Girdusky. I founded the 1776 Project PAC in May of 2021 to take our schools back from the radical left one district at a time. 2 weeks later Tucker Carlson had me on his show to discuss the 1776 Project PAC. [_**_He even encouraged his viewers to contribute to our mission!_**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjnm9i35d15e20p5e3posgvbemrkqhivug2qhogo_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm9or5cjh2bs) But why? Well, Friend, you see... We were the first organization of our kind. **Never before had an organization been founded for the express purpose of replacing radical leftist at the school board level!** Now, nearly 2 years later, we've tallied over 100 victories and changed the lives of millions of students. But we're not done yet. This year, we plan to support 250 more conservative school board candidates- and we can't do it without your help. [_**Would you consider taking Tucker 's advice and contribute $15, $20, or even $30 dollars to our mission today?**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu0jgcn09ob8dg2ica6of0a8io36h5h15nidiocg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm9or5cjh2bs) Friend, the 1776 Project PAC isn't a billionaire-backed political action committee that has MILLIONS in the bank. When you donate, you're making a HUGE impact on students in districts across the country... ... And you're changing the future of America for the better. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky, Founder, 1776 Project PAC
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z47jvg2t3kiihuvci1onj5rivebgt9miuio27qb8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm9or5cjh2bs)
---
**[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgbuevg2edt4i677fosgjlm5nb3825gm7m1qo0t0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm9or5cjh2bs)**

name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I’m parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what’s _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze4a53hhngcmvmbted4d8ufqeilo3lgaqpn9jtao_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm9or3clh2bs "But with that in the rearview mirror, Iâm thrilled at whatâs coming next... ")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z637mjot5n5efh81olv57hgv42bsbuanknvbu2og_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm9or3clh2bs "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It’s an emergency situation and we’re running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren’t going to give us an inch ... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can’t outsmart us when we’re the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn5prsh8ggg0812i761clk127rkgm2s86h3e2hm0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm9or3clh2bs "Look – if we want to win in 2024, itâs going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. ")**_

That’s why I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it’ll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we’ve ever seen before._

**But that’s a big “if” - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I’ll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp14gntfdf7d6h3mmvdsnfrp72i1t1gb6cf2b3a0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm9or3clh2bs "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkag97k69gddulog2t6s0c2jgsv7vd8htng4tpg0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm9or3clh2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt880cj6mt9d7bddghdg1qb35fm1mmjschscsug8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm9or3clh2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsomak8c2usm7iu9b4ogan2sceatn7ghl4sbiacg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cthm9or3clh2bs)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

---

name: Gallagher Foreign Policy HQ
subject: Your Monthly Foreign Policy Briefing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:
Mike has been on the front lines, working to make America more safe and secure ...
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | [ ](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=03513bc533c58b26e518498e21ed1e46fed14e47426b44d36d3cb5dbacb0fdc63c76fc558ac6d9795cf59ba6d27e57136f5cc7b6cdac237d)
---
Peter,

Mike has been on the front lines, working to make America more safe and secure. Every month, we bring you the latest from around the globe. You can give to Mike **[here](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=03513bc533c58b2690cf9325e3ef908fb6874a71ee8f2157aad9d4633c4de164c37a79f171c00d664468e1e3a87ecadaefa16df7a68e442a "here")** , and check out his work on international issues below.
---
| [](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=03513bc533c58b2609aa517253e49e04e4a759582874c21f353f974abdaaf653a736ad4cf14e0dfc8ec2ac6af3a2a6e20dcab0332330139b)
---
| | | [ ](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=03513bc533c58b2609aa517253e49e04e4a759582874c21f353f974abdaaf653a736ad4cf14e0dfc8ec2ac6af3a2a6e20dcab0332330139b)
---
| [](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=03513bc533c58b26896c30f23648a0b2090526175bdd7ce8cde6cff98c0fafb0eae6e0b70c181999210ec2b6efa324776ce7d301f24f87cb)
---
| [](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=03513bc533c58b26896c30f23648a0b2090526175bdd7ce8cde6cff98c0fafb0eae6e0b70c181999210ec2b6efa324776ce7d301f24f87cb)
---
**Bottom Line:** _" Consider this: the CCP controls the minerals market needed for American fighter jets, lifesaving medical devices and for so many items we use daily to live and work. What happens when our biggest foreign adversary turns that faucet off? Instead, we need a smart, pro-development domestic energy policy to access the minerals we currently have underfoot for those needs."_ **_[If you believe the Chinese Communist Party is a national security threat that needs to be immediately addressed, add your name now.](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=03513bc533c58b26169f8946adae723b2eab79cd3d1aba5c659453ee3c3b8aca3b1b598c5716bc3673ccdcbb2ca929c75d83a2e1619ba2a0 "If you believe the Chinese Communist Party is a national security threat that needs to be immediately addressed, add your name now.")_**
---
| [](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=03513bc533c58b2636094041c4896bce386cf7d982ceb73a1206526400f930f529bf900d3d1e99fa790fe6d3cb1b18eef17cfead563ce992)
---
| [](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=03513bc533c58b2636094041c4896bce386cf7d982ceb73a1206526400f930f529bf900d3d1e99fa790fe6d3cb1b18eef17cfead563ce992)
---
**Bottom Line:**_" We need to be moving heaven and earth to enhance our deterrence and denial posture so that Xi Jinping concludes that he just can't do it."_
---
| [ ](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=03513bc533c58b26a671ebcea84939f2fe78e037de1d13f0dd8985bf5a4aff255be79be6e2b62dbccb7775ae4f1b00def9c2a85e75fb90d3)
---
| [](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=03513bc533c58b26a671ebcea84939f2fe78e037de1d13f0dd8985bf5a4aff255be79be6e2b62dbccb7775ae4f1b00def9c2a85e75fb90d3)
---
**Bottom Line:** _" Ideally, the members of Congress would walk out of the war game with two convictions,' the committee chairman, Rep. Mike Gallagher, R-Wis., told colleagues at the outset: 'One is a sense of urgency.'_ _" The second: 'A sense ... that there are meaningful things we can do in this Congress through legislative action to improve the prospect of peace and stability across the Taiwan Strait,' Gallagher said."_
---
| [ ](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=03513bc533c58b260cb1d886b5076fb2ce0a2425661bc013aa75a5a4917fd92bd4595d84623f1dc24dd4c7d7ccb7b442f438a26eb9a1e8c8)
---
| [](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=03513bc533c58b260cb1d886b5076fb2ce0a2425661bc013aa75a5a4917fd92bd4595d84623f1dc24dd4c7d7ccb7b442f438a26eb9a1e8c8)
---
**Bottom Line:**_"[TikTok] actually united Republicans and Democrats out of the concern of allowing the [Chinese Communist Party] to control the most dominant media platform in America."_
---
| | [SUPPORT MIKE'S CAMPAIGN](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=03513bc533c58b26ba1cf7f75b6fb1c2b47ab205281a29562fe07486aa260407a9c566eb6247aed63500f427213ede4b7271b9925315cfdd)
---
| [](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=03513bc533c58b26db214c3f732aa3abb2bcd422763f14f948038a32ddbe18f8f8a1efd91b39faffcecedefba0ba4b16b74e166bf42308ee)
---
| [](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=03513bc533c58b26db214c3f732aa3abb2bcd422763f14f948038a32ddbe18f8f8a1efd91b39faffcecedefba0ba4b16b74e166bf42308ee)
---
**Bottom Line:**_" I left [the Port of Miami] thinking this is a perfect microcosm of the challenge we face with China, which is to say, after decades of integrating ourselves economically, we now find ourselves with a dangerous dependency, and there's no easy or overnight fix."_
---
| [ ](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=03513bc533c58b263d688103887f1fa8e6cc5e34baa853b07a2f83cd6d1f8d5fef71ff1f9fbbe695162df23fd7bffd2677d0682c7fa7c69d)
---
| [](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=03513bc533c58b263d688103887f1fa8e6cc5e34baa853b07a2f83cd6d1f8d5fef71ff1f9fbbe695162df23fd7bffd2677d0682c7fa7c69d)
---
**Bottom Line:** _" When it comes to Hollywood or Disney, I'd be willing to go out and sit down with them where they are, you know, engage with them in a discussion. But we want to have a discussion in front of the American people. I think it drives the American people crazy when they see the NBA bending the knee to Xi Jinping."_ Thank you for reading this month's edition of the Foreign Policy Newsletter -- we'll be in touch as we monitor developing stories from around the globe.
---

clean_body: Mike has been on the front lines, working to make America more safe and secure ... | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter, Mike has been on the front lines, working to make America more safe and secure. Every month, we bring you the latest from around the globe. You can give to Mike "here" , and check out his work on international issues below. | | | | | | Bottom Line: " Consider this: the CCP controls the minerals market needed for American fighter jets, lifesaving medical devices and for so many items we use daily to live and work. What happens when our biggest foreign adversary turns that faucet off? Instead, we need a smart, pro-development domestic energy policy to access the minerals we currently have underfoot for those needs." "If you believe the Chinese Communist Party is a national security threat that needs to be immediately addressed, add your name now." | | Bottom Line:" We need to be moving heaven and earth to enhance our deterrence and denial posture so that Xi Jinping concludes that he just can't do it." | | Bottom Line: " Ideally, the members of Congress would walk out of the war game with two convictions,' the committee chairman, Rep. Mike Gallagher, R-Wis., told colleagues at the outset: 'One is a sense of urgency.' " The second: 'A sense ... that there are meaningful things we can do in this Congress through legislative action to improve the prospect of peace and stability across the Taiwan Strait,' Gallagher said." | | Bottom Line:"[TikTok] actually united Republicans and Democrats out of the concern of allowing the [Chinese Communist Party] to control the most dominant media platform in America." | | | | Bottom Line:" I left [the Port of Miami] thinking this is a perfect microcosm of the challenge we face with China, which is to say, after decades of integrating ourselves economically, we now find ourselves with a dangerous dependency, and there's no easy or overnight fix." | | Bottom Line: " When it comes to Hollywood or Disney, I'd be willing to go out and sit down with them where they are, you know, engage with them in a discussion. But we want to have a discussion in front of the American people. I think it drives the American people crazy when they see the NBA bending the knee to Xi Jinping." Thank you for reading this month's edition of the Foreign Policy Newsletter -- we'll be in touch as we monitor developing stories from around the globe. | | - Gallagher Foreign Policy HQ | No one has fought harder to make America safer and more secure than Mike Gallagher. He's taking on the CCP so American principles lead the way in the 21st century. "Chip in now to fuel his fight." | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin. |

subject: Will you renew your membership for the 4th consecutive year?

body:
This is your LAST chance.

|
---
| | | |
---

**Are you there? I still haven’t heard back from you ...**

Friend,

It’s Kevin McCarthy. Because you are one of our _**TOP**_ patriots, I am giving you _**one last chance**_ to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership and confirm you are a patriot willing to fight for the future of our country. **[Will you please confirm before the deadline passes?](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79001%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tn3SB%2fZC6t6unKctJNISug&sysid=1 "Will you please confirm

name: Governor Jim Justice
subject: Joe Manchin in the Senate cannot continue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Justice for U
body:
I’m challenging Joe Manchin because his failure to stand up to Chuck Schumer has put all of us in a precarious position, not to mention bankrupting our country.

|

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18437%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k6%2bpXiV%2f4NyIL7yaytqctA&sysid=1)

---
Fellow Conservative,

This is West Virginia Governor Jim Justice. I’m writing tonight to let you know that after six highly successful years as governor of the Mountain State, **I’m launching my campaign to be the next United States senator for West Virginia**.

[** STAND WITH ME
HELP ME UNSEAT JOE MANCHIN→ **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18437%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k6%2bpXiV%2f4NyIL7yaytqctA&sysid=1)
I thought long and hard about whether to enter this race. After a lot of prayer and consultation with my family, the conclusion we kept coming to was that **I must do this not only for the people of West Virginia but for every American**.

The stakes in this U.S. Senate race are high.**** Joe Manchin and I have known one another for a very long time, but I’m afraid I cannot stomach the idea of him serving in the Senate any longer. As much as I like Joe Manchin on a personal level, **as long as he represents West Virginia in DC, Chuck Schumer will continue to rule over the Senate with an iron fist.**

**I’m getting into this critical Senate race because we cannot allow a Democrat from a ruby-red state to play kingmaker in D.C. any longer.**
Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer’s agenda is too disastrous; we must take action TODAY. If you want to see this Senate seat flip Republican,**[can I count on you to chip in $10 to help me unseat Joe Manchin today?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18438%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jQAkqqTmCuqXJvHUjHcsZg&sysid=1)**

[** STAND WITH ME
HELP ME UNSEAT JOE MANCHIN→ **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18437%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k6%2bpXiV%2f4NyIL7yaytqctA&sysid=1)
**Joe Manchin in the Senate means advancing Biden’s failed liberal agenda every day.**

That’s how we got The Inflation Reduction Act with its 87,000 new IRS agents.

West Virginians don’t need the IRS breathing down their necks,_**nor do you.**_ The voters of the Mountain State have put their faith in me to be their governor over the last six years - **[now I'm asking them, and you, to put your trust in me and help send me to the United States Senate.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18439%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DguR93qlF9xwDB1IhfY%2beA&sysid=1)**

As West Virginia’s next United States Senator, I will fight for stronger borders and law and order. I’ll defend our energy jobs, cut middle-class taxes, end wasteful liberal spending, **and keep radical woke politics out of our kids’ classrooms**.

BUT - **[without your help right now](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18430%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VFYd05w0I3h7E7st9gdsEw&sysid=1)** , none of this will be possible. Joe Manchin has more than $9 million in his campaign accounts, and Democrats in D.C. will spend hundreds of millions to defend this seat because they know that without West Virginia, they can kiss their majority goodbye.

Can my team and I count on your support tonight? We need to make a big splash because Democrats are watching. **[Even if you can only chip in $1 right now](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18431%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2djFWRgZ5h5SS7%2bta%2f0kkA&sysid=1)** , I assure you it’ll be the best investment you’ve ever made.

[** STAND WITH ME
HELP ME UNSEAT JOE MANCHIN→ **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18437%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k6%2bpXiV%2f4NyIL7yaytqctA&sysid=1)
Fellow Conservative, I'm a patriot. I truly am, and our country really means a lot to me. I’m not running out of self-interest. I’m running to serve.

Thank you - **I hope you’ll come along for the ride**.

Sincerely,
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18432%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U%2bcttCNJAc%2b10xc6FS7i5w&sysid=1) Gov. Jim Justice
Republican for U.S. Senate

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

[** Join **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18433%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9lsMrbxY%2bk9F6fFYN3ELrQ&sysid=1)

---

name: Full Mag News
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24c72e1f3c40455fb836c8e656c1de1f&_e=FZkrVnDnMqnHhIqSPGg-WjZbihVxXnGJQ95KForb0Tm_iFhwpTPZT6O8gi_jzaQRkdCMMLtENhXGMbA1fGwPRNCEgm7z2MwqM79P0sGqZyF-__R_DypM92-u_fZKeqIObITuSFjYgrODLFanaM8jwTp-lCySnmijR8LH73RjvX5aJNin663X8I0pnWecEHlxfMBBvu4VBd8vhb6YEi1n-dOhTr6RMN0rA-clh0H6yv4JBHRpVQpLPHG5CVrmePjXJZKJ3T_Rx6iQL_Ztwi47viTcUe0JVgXEqhyuX5xpVbgnqmgz7sEt8TrDt21FbbPup0Os5Y3q0JCWo7nY5mq204LUEi6pdjhXAh7jTXwPEPdG5kH6Ur3Zm5CNFBDXWNW5tF9q6ekS2X2r_h0TuU289g%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24c72e1f3c40455fb836c8e656c1de1f&_e=FZkrVnDnMqnHhIqSPGg-WjZbihVxXnGJQ95KForb0Tm_iFhwpTPZT6O8gi_jzaQRkdCMMLtENhXGMbA1fGwPRNCEgm7z2MwqM79P0sGqZyF-__R_DypM92-u_fZKeqIObITuSFjYgrODLFanaM8jwTp-lCySnmijR8LH73RjvX5aJNin663X8I0pnWecEHlxfMBBvu4VBd8vhb6YEi1n-dOhTr6RMN0rA-clh0H6yv4JBHRpVQpLPHG5CVrmePjXMDEvHgbe9Wyf_nmCgihGGI3PI1wZ3DNvtQEwAb57inUVvUhlD8Idfbx9k04MHrZ0sjayQdq0QcEApO25dpZVwwb7zUVYX6eYuxU3s4JUyljlvr9s45T4-Fiz_OByVo33mAE0Em0EkygBajJTAHcmFA%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24c72e1f3c40455fb836c8e656c1de1f&_e=FZkrVnDnMqnHhIqSPGg-WjZbihVxXnGJQ95KForb0Tm_iFhwpTPZT6O8gi_jzaQRkdCMMLtENhXGMbA1fGwPRNCEgm7z2MwqM79P0sGqZyF-__R_DypM92-u_fZKeqIObITuSFjYgrODLFanaM8jwTp-lCySnmijR8LH73RjvX5aJNin663X8I0pnWecEHlxfMBBvu4VBd8vhb6YEi1n-dOhTr6RMN0rA-clh0H6yv4JBHRpVQpLPHG5CVrmePjXaQlORYPQv-S2OO29nB-p1U1YcsgOjJ31ClsB0Aj-Jf0X9SzGoO8LS7VCDAmWQ02zoXg0WhFjP59_QL_o_4EmO1TuKIYM6GE-f-osj9eMLDRpKEFHehnrEEFK6b067lz7wUMVNyJlhVkIzQ7odI9h5Q%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24c72e1f3c40455fb836c8e656c1de1f&_e=FZkrVnDnMqnHhIqSPGg-WjZbihVxXnGJQ95KForb0Tm_iFhwpTPZT6O8gi_jzaQRkdCMMLtENhXGMbA1fGwPRNCEgm7z2MwqM79P0sGqZyF-__R_DypM92-u_fZKeqIObITuSFjYgrODLFanaM8jwTp-lCySnmijR8LH73RjvX5aJNin663X8I0pnWecEHlxfMBBvu4VBd8vhb6YEi1n-dOhTr6RMN0rA-clh0H6yv4JBHRpVQpLPHG5CVrmePjXsRhDYY1H8W9rU95kQZTQL4dx01XGvWLj0YQ1TvXgKugMP0dh2HR_tX974hg117JPLsRTembKDK7C0rINLA-gi26FZNbvzBRVXPcjrLuKbAgYs721iHg6bSVsSrE4CF85R5dfwPdwWY4gyM49-vuaJw%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24c72e1f3c40455fb836c8e656c1de1f&_e=FZkrVnDnMqnHhIqSPGg-WjZbihVxXnGJQ95KForb0Tm_iFhwpTPZT6O8gi_jzaQRkdCMMLtENhXGMbA1fGwPRNCEgm7z2MwqM79P0sGqZyF-__R_DypM92-u_fZKeqIObITuSFjYgrODLFanaM8jwTp-lCySnmijR8LH73RjvX5aJNin663X8I0pnWecEHlxfMBBvu4VBd8vhb6YEi1n-dOhTr6RMN0rA-clh0H6yv4JBHRpVQpLPHG5CVrmePjXhp3OsW5nK3wfm6EIsCmK8u2yexAUuS-AEsSIy6H9tsxz3QVcgFkcCkMUuJJzfuFpqtgogmTKUD8adGAmrA5Q7pXPT3hxezKXAIpnAwQbQgniAMPqh8cJ0iZ964yDONbWSF0rZvykJ7OMTFvr8sTvsw%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY-- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump, that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1362d77ae38948cdac03cfbccdf2fa87&_e=KlQ5Pvqsth_qSmwICkBbmykxRlh0nbiz8iIZMWoYjNvUpIJxQEhtaUFw9wybuJwf6nzCXKMHpWVxofmLGeZT6oR-PnEl7bbNtS_uEudywgukFCfTFtiBVCLIHTacFVNXt9-eSQ5gjkC7wZdtwQ3WK8ebLOsvPw1KwCCVkBNB-mZjw4wKU9L_JeFaBwIexKcQRopV0M2D63hEuQadURtUThopyHXQl3SqgZGkR2GiY3RyHJLK2U8FhZDEEy0pqARcQAA8hYmMdSBmWvcfGdARqwkHQfN2Mb0ygCztokMWxyaW9fNxATjLz6SUe_6B59yf)
---
Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ -- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I 'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1362d77ae38948cdac03cfbccdf2fa87&_e=KlQ5Pvqsth_qSmwICkBbmykxRlh0nbiz8iIZMWoYjNvUpIJxQEhtaUFw9wybuJwf6nzCXKMHpWVxofmLGeZT6oR-PnEl7bbNtS_uEudywgukFCfTFtiBVCLIHTacFVNXt9-eSQ5gjkC7wZdtwQ3WK8ebLOsvPw1KwCCVkBNB-mZxqutXLLa0UdhUnF0YWsAlfPPukffXuAqG-eRkHNXEwIVJ8vPQxZZJ1KMVLh6t8K4Weq4ywzbwDNANi3RKfYKudIJXvBODaO_Z5tPIWD9bSolXupUFrcU7G_uzrR5qnvcxq7LA8jkDUg61UB-xylXj)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1362d77ae38948cdac03cfbccdf2fa87&_e=KlQ5Pvqsth_qSmwICkBbmykxRlh0nbiz8iIZMWoYjNvUpIJxQEhtaUFw9wybuJwf6nzCXKMHpWVxofmLGeZT6oR-PnEl7bbNtS_uEudywgukFCfTFtiBVCLIHTacFVNXt9-eSQ5gjkC7wZdtwQ3WK8ebLOsvPw1KwCCVkBNB-ma7A0hVDI_XfaWHAR47C9_RguJ15lWAxDIU_CoiJtgTw5Ys9adMmRJ10XyYyaZVW_DDP0UEj9fODlKY94bK-_QfMiqu5G9ly93YPWkLyoQ5YPZZbCD54EpvX8X8Kz59vTKnKim_MsHD7vlpYFOr9Apa)
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1362d77ae38948cdac03cfbccdf2fa87&_e=KlQ5Pvqsth_qSmwICkBbmykxRlh0nbiz8iIZMWoYjNvUpIJxQEhtaUFw9wybuJwf6nzCXKMHpWVxofmLGeZT6oR-PnEl7bbNtS_uEudywgukFCfTFtiBVCLIHTacFVNXt9-eSQ5gjkC7wZdtwQ3WK8ebLOsvPw1KwCCVkBNB-mYRYQraVn40eBFLqg5ZRz3YgCjay8sJDgukTfvZxWyhuRjP53JYOYAM1q-bXb1EaddfwYYGsjXQM_P-mFk1MXPykdK1ruA39j00SO4zpsvJRlA4wTnNgvXQaEtXuKzHLjWvFg6gY-m38Pw-HrOQ4Ipf)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they're bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our "Greatest Generation" heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country -- the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ -- as this year's event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation 's heroes deserve.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1362d77ae38948cdac03cfbccdf2fa87&_e=KlQ5Pvqsth_qSmwICkBbmykxRlh0nbiz8iIZMWoYjNvUpIJxQEhtaUFw9wybuJwf6nzCXKMHpWVxofmLGeZT6oR-PnEl7bbNtS_uEudywgukFCfTFtiBVCLIHTacFVNXt9-eSQ5gjkC7wZdtwQ3WK8ebLOsvPw1KwCCVkBNB-maT6JNWxuGcq4uaq1k6n7D_BTXxu6PwMqJ4EWBt5S1qluHrOLyuUHfnE_HeYdoffWOWoOvqwgTHCNR_IuZmJxcTQ7zJ2AaevyJVnjLwErqM3VdDTKzhUGyD6qR3GKNjK9qx7m0NbIbl5X0OUvuwIefx)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1362d77ae38948cdac03cfbccdf2fa87&_e=KlQ5Pvqsth_qSmwICkBbmykxRlh0nbiz8iIZMWoYjNvUpIJxQEhtaUFw9wybuJwf6nzCXKMHpWVxofmLGeZT6oR-PnEl7bbNtS_uEudywgukFCfTFtiBVCLIHTacFVNXt9-eSQ5gjkC7wZdtwQ3WK8ebLOsvPw1KwCCVkBNB-mZBrMpp4N2Rwmna7SWrN63AoSbxI7qINeNVIdTEqrvrmg5YKqcaUwgRhukzSbtMRvxFTako0ykH_ybb9olT41Ek73cRw_BnXybQQjiluyg_U_5Y7CvooZKghAoqbU8TXR1hdz-v18sPnWJ-w50sDtcO)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1362d77ae38948cdac03cfbccdf2fa87&_e=KlQ5Pvqsth_qSmwICkBbmykxRlh0nbiz8iIZMWoYjNvUpIJxQEhtaUFw9wybuJwf6nzCXKMHpWVxofmLGeZT6oR-PnEl7bbNtS_uEudywgukFCfTFtiBVCLIHTacFVNXt9-eSQ5gjkC7wZdtwQ3WK8ebLOsvPw1KwCCVkBNB-mYSczzgcPKSs8D26DUO_3PnpWXvcVS_AgjE4qvAupDyx1xVAiSXiYivtm9DmwNP9r1vMd0SqnO-9QAmHDHcv5W4zcHT2OqsMq6zmazQU5tISdgLGl9oAIFtuJ6jCZeRIMkt0_AOtOBPvYUthB0JO7HR) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1362d77ae38948cdac03cfbccdf2fa87&_e=KlQ5Pvqsth_qSmwICkBbmykxRlh0nbiz8iIZMWoYjNvUpIJxQEhtaUFw9wybuJwf6nzCXKMHpWVxofmLGeZT6oR-PnEl7bbNtS_uEudywgukFCfTFtiBVCLIHTacFVNXt9-eSQ5gjkC7wZdtwQ3WK8ebLOsvPw1KwCCVkBNB-mbQUQ0xQq1VBDESZxZKOj69060y64ldWQee0vzUYUfLC1t9fkmX85WZmjVMUZ_2jRO9yEQgL6aZ51mMyKjsGHnBSuR02pdBjyLUo2i1gTFVMQix6FEu1xz7kKHMUURddrsrP6Z4YXrmn4OHM2HstoWr)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1362d77ae38948cdac03cfbccdf2fa87&_e=KlQ5Pvqsth_qSmwICkBbmykxRlh0nbiz8iIZMWoYjNvUpIJxQEhtaUFw9wybuJwf6nzCXKMHpWVxofmLGeZT6oR-PnEl7bbNtS_uEudywgukFCfTFtiBVCLIHTacFVNXt9-eSQ5gjkC7wZdtwQ3WK8ebLOsvPw1KwCCVkBNB-mYlR0Z8vRABUiH7toe5m-bsSS4Lepa-03fD495HRFbX3ES7T7jfSYV9m4mxkkDRkXVaO8mPG3Ba466L33__hVxPWEVF5EN76_6fWquWSmm6Ut9LpY_zvu_wqcs1ipkrgZDbI95bOk_CTJvXeZSurXFr)

A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center

But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country -- the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever. Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. * Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom. But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honorary Grand Marshal National Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Ted Cruz must be prosecuted. And we must kick him out of the Senate in 2024, when he's up for reelection in Texas--where he only beat Beto O'Rourke by 2.5% in 2018.
body:
Send Ted Cruz home
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc6f8c504-0375-4fe0-accf-ad2fcd722d59/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**_BREAKING:_ _We suspected it, but now have the recording. Ted Cruz plotted to steal the 2020 election beforehand._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T55b555b8-2095-493f-9ec5-2ffa2773f4b7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_In addition to being a sleazy, cruel Senator who left Texans to freeze without power as he jetted off to Cancun, Cruz betrayed America. MSNBC broke the story last night, with tapes of Cruz talking to conspiracy nut Maria Bartiromo about a plan to create a fake commission to steal the election from President Biden._** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T686c1564-da56-4b1c-8ef0-0288c79d3c0f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Cruz must be prosecuted. And we must kick him out of the Senate in 2024, when he's up for reelection in Texas--where he only beat Beto O'Rourke by 2.5% in 2018._** **_And we have just the person to do it. Dallas-area Rep. Colin Allred's preparing to run. Raised by a single mother, Allred played in the NFL, worked in the Obama Administration and, in a huge upset, knocked off GOP Rep. Pete Sessions in 2018. He's the highest profile Black politician in Texas, and has a ton of charisma._** [**There's a candidate fund set up to go to Allred when he gets in the race. _Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to fund Allred as he removes Ted Cruz from public life?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2a90d7d-2d45-4690-b11c-28e6186e50d9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping us oust this despicable traitor._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tddf2dba0-2d5c-4bdb-9278-6efdf1c68141/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

subject: [your response needed] Colorado's ONLY wolf pack is counting on you today!
body:
| | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---
| | precious pups were found SHOT TO DEATH | |
---
| | | **Should the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service do more to protect Colorado's ONLY wolf pack from bloodthirsty trophy hunters?**
---
[ ](http://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1747708?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---

---
_**This link has been generated specifically for dpwillis67@gmail.com. Please do not share with anyone else. Deadline for responses: 11:59 p.m. _
---
**This is urgent: Three precious pups were found SHOT TO DEATH just over the state border in Wyoming. They were the first pups born in the wild in more than 80 years, and unless we act now, the entire pack could meet the same fate!**
Since the Trump administration rolled back federal protections for gray wolves, the trophy hunting lobby has pushed more cruel and inhumane laws throughout wolves’ crucial habitats. **And so even though wolves are protected under Colorado state law, they can be legally TORTURED and KILLED as soon as they cross state lines. To make matters worse, the Fish and Wildlife Service could reinstate federal protections for these creatures – but it hasn’t done so!**
**Now, bloodthirsty trophy hunters can LEGALLY destroy this majestic species for “fun,” and violent shootings, choking snares and even helicopter chases are still COMPLETELY legal in states like Wyoming. That's why we urgently need your help to save gray wolves – and the ecosystems that rely on them – before it’s too late!**
**Together, we CAN stop this awful attack on the lives and safety of gray wolves, protect this vital species for generations and fight for our planet. But first, we need to know where our top supporters stand. This poll is only open until 11:59 p.m., and we're still missing 36 responses from your area. Please answer now:**
| | **Should the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service do more to protect Colorado's ONLY wolf pack from bloodthirsty trophy hunters?** ** **

name: Shift WA
subject: We’ve been busy.
body:
The 2023 legislative session was a train wreck. Democrats passed a record amount of spending and raised taxes. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61750285:sbFyWWDdN:m:1:2610672541:A9C42203A9F0A6336E31071E0B80B2CA:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends, Let's get right to the chase - we were so busy updating you on the Democrats' legislative session shenanigans that we neglected our operational work. That's why we are still $3,950 away from reaching our end-of-month fundraising goal. **[We need your help to make up the difference so we can keep highlighting what the Democrats are up to in Olympia and local governments around the state.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61750286:sbFyWWDdN:m:1:2610672541:A9C42203A9F0A6336E31071E0B80B2CA:r)** Independent communications sources like Shift WA perform a needed role in our state. We're the only outlet working daily to hold Democrats accountable for their failed agenda - you simply cannot trust mainstream media outlets to do the same. They proved just that during the most recent session. The 2023 legislative session was a train wreck. Democrats passed a record amount of spending and raised taxes. They also prevented police from pursuing car thieves and - shockingly -legalized all drugs in our state by failing to take action to fix the so-called "Blake decision". Adding insult to injury, Democrats like Jay Inslee are pointing their fingers at Republicans who - throughout the entire 2023 session - were shut out of policy talks and budget negotiations. And mainstream media outlets allowed them to get way with their gaslighting. **[Will you consider helping us continue our efforts of informing voters about what's really going on by making an end-of-month contribution of $100, $50, or even $25 today?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61750286:sbFyWWDdN:m:1:2610672541:A9C42203A9F0A6336E31071E0B80B2CA:r)** Your contribution makes a measurable difference in our ability to keep our readers informed on what's going on in their own backyard. Thank you, The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61750287:sbFyWWDdN:m:1:2610672541:A9C42203A9F0A6336E31071E0B80B2CA:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14189880&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osbFyWWDdN).
---

---

Kansans have shown time and time again that they want their representatives to do their jobs and work for _them_ , not to increase their own political power.

Kansans are facing droughts, high costs of living, and need a new Farm Bill passed into law. But what are Republicans in the House focused on? Attacking our reproductive rights, undercutting our climate law, and launching partisan political “investigations”.

We must take action now to ensure they’re voted out of power. Will you chip in to help?

After watching Republicans dissolve into complete and unprecedented chaos to choose their Speaker...

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: There are ways we can stop these right-wing radicals — and we must.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
This is worth fighting for — and I’m going to give this fight all that I’ve got. Thank you for being by my side. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62515453/403711771/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ13J_EGR_E_20230429_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWMwZTA1NS1hNGU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYoceFbQwha83a1c-2Ak4qCv98hn8rEYLK0Yy6mm9tc=&emci=7cc0e055-a4e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7ec0e055-a4e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
I want to be direct. An extremist minority is imposing their unpopular views on the rest of America. But there are ways we can change this — and we must. I have a plan on how we can restore our democracy so that a small group of right-wing radicals can no longer drown out the will of the people.
* Expand the Supreme Court to rebalance it.
* End the filibuster.
* Fix the Electoral College so popular-vote losers like Donald Trump can’t stack the courts again. Remember: Five justices who ended the right to abortion were appointed by presidents who lost the popular vote.

**There are real solutions to the root cause of this crisis, but it’s going to take big ideas — and big, structural changes.** [_**I’m going to continue fighting for these solutions — but I can’t do this alone. If you’re in a place to give right now, please pitch in $3 or anything you can to power our movement to make our democracy work for everyone.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62515454/403711782/1737578033?amount=3&refcode=EMZ13J_EGR_E_20230429_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWMwZTA1NS1hNGU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYoceFbQwha83a1c-2Ak4qCv98hn8rEYLK0Yy6mm9tc=) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

I’ll keep working on immediate next steps — like expanding our Senate majority so we can end the filibuster, and supporting downballot Democrats and ballot initiatives to protect abortion rights at the state level.
But we’re also keeping our eyes on the big picture: a democracy that reflects the will of the people. And we’ve got a roadmap.
This is worth fighting for — and I’m going to give this fight all that I’ve got. Thank you for being by my side.
[_**There are a zillion ways to be in the fight, from joining local groups to knocking on doors — but if you’re able to make a donation today as well, it would go a long way to build our movement.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62515472/403711803/1737578033?amount=3&refcode=EMZ13J_EGR_E_20230429_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWMwZTA1NS1hNGU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYoceFbQwha83a1c-2Ak4qCv98hn8rEYLK0Yy6mm9tc=)

Elizabeth

clean_body: This is worth fighting for — and I’m going to give this fight all that I’ve got. Thank you for being by my side. | | | I want to be direct. An extremist minority is imposing their unpopular views on the rest of America. But there are ways we can change this — and we must. I have a plan on how we can restore our democracy so that a small group of right-wing radicals can no longer drown out the will of the people. Expand the Supreme Court to rebalance it. End the filibuster. Fix the Electoral College so popular-vote losers like Donald Trump can’t stack the courts again. Remember: Five justices who ended the right to abortion were appointed by presidents who lost the popular vote. There are real solutions to the root cause of this crisis, but it’s going to take big ideas — and big, structural changes.** = | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’ll keep working on immediate next steps — like expanding our Senate majority so we can end the filibuster, and supporting downballot Democrats and ballot initiatives to protect abortion rights at the state level. But we’re also keeping our eyes on the big picture: a democracy that reflects the will of the people. And we’ve got a roadmap. This is worth fighting for — and I’m going to give this fight all that I’ve got. Thank you for being by my side. = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Anti-Americanism in higher education
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vslbgWWD5N

Anti-Americanism has long been evident in higher education.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oslbgWWD5N

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
fellow American,

Anti-Americanism has long been evident in higher education. But
recently, it has spread from college campuses to other areas of
American life.

Today it
asserts itself in many forms-including critical race theory-in
our government, in our K-12 schools, in our corporations, in the
media, in sports, and even in our military.

The last
gubernatorial election in Virginia brought the corruption of
American K-12 education, in particular, to the forefront of our
national conversation.

The
breakdown (especially among younger Americans) of informed
patriotism-without which self-government is impossible-is not
something we can allow to continue.

While
there is reason to remain hopeful, there is much work to be done
to reverse the current trends in the months and years ahead.

Education
is where this attack on America began-and it is the battlefield
on which we must engage the Left in defense of liberty and
limited constitutional government.

Hillsdale
College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. We
are now determined, with the help of supporters like you, who
agree with Hillsdale's mission, to redouble our efforts at this
crucial time for our nation-no matter the cost.

That's
why we are expanding our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by
Reaching and Teaching Millions.

You can
support this vital project through this link:
https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/preserve-freedom-for-future-generations

The
Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching
Millions will give informed patriots across the country the
effective ability to defend liberty through education. And we
need your help.

The
project has three key objectives:

Expand the circulation of Imprimis, our digest of liberty, to
reach millions more Americans.

Increase the number of citizens (especially younger Americans)
enrolling in our free online courses, such as "Constitution 101:
The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The Great American
Story: A Land of Hope," and "American Citizenship and Its
Decline" with Victor Davis Hanson.

Launch additional Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter
schools nationwide and provide, free of charge, our American
classical K-12 curriculum (including the new Hillsdale 1776
Curriculum) to thousands more American teachers and
homeschoolers.

And your
generous support is critical to our success. Here's why...

Hillsdale
College conducts its educational outreach efforts on behalf of
liberty-as it does all of its work-while refusing to accept one
penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of
federal or state student grants or loans.

So, to
expand this effective program, we will need thousands of gifts
between $25 and $100. This is the range in which most supporters
give. We will also need a significant number of $500 to $1,000
donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

We
urgently need your help.

You can
safely and securely renew your support using this link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61748338:slbgWWD5N:m:3:2532013465:065AF7A5FB14880C6000C6BC088A3D85:r

As the
forces of anti-Americanism redouble their own efforts to
undermine informed patriotism in our schools and our culture, and
to subvert constitutionalism in our government, we must engage
them ever more aggressively-including on the central battlefield
of education.

That's
why I hope you'll make your most generous gift in this critical
time for America.

Every
dollar you can give will help expand our Project to Defend
Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.

Thank you
for your generosity. I hope you'll stand with us. Together, we
will work to preserve freedom for future generations of
Americans.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

body:
Join us in setting the foundations for an outstanding 2024.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/kec0ZIGKShUuP_nGxlIYmyoZ1yWHHxb6EVf6pu3n8IA=/vfINbc-tGNY03t3A5NhEfjmw3yL2ysMGfwFxvKJnadQ=?refcode=EM_FR_230429EOM2_DK_90DO_3_NG_N_Logo)
Fellow Democrats, building for success in the 2024 elections starts NOW -- not in October of 2024.

The IDCCA is already recruiting Democratic candidates, building better Democratic infrastructure with rural County Parties across the state, and giving local Democratic candidates the resources, training, and support they need to be successful in their races.

These are just the first steps of our work for 2024, but it's some of the most important of the entire cycle. The sooner we make these investments in Democrats across our state, the longer they have to bear fruit into action.

**[This is our first end-of-month goal since we finished our work in the April Municipal Elections, and we need to push hard to reach it. To kick off our preparations for the 2024 elections, I'm asking for your help in raising the remaining $3,814 to our grassroots end-of-month goal by midnight tomorrow. Will you pitch in $10 or more right now to help us close the gap and support hundreds of Democrats up and down the ballot?](https://act.myngp.com/el/kec0ZIGKShUuP_nGxlIYmyoZ1yWHHxb6EVf6pu3n8IA=/vfINbc-tGNY03t3A5NhEfjmw3yL2ysMGfwFxvKJnadQ=?refcode=EM_FR_230429EOM2_DK_90DO_3_NG_N_L1&amount=10)**
