name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Renewing American Patriotism + meeting Tucker Carlson
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8133020?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Soon after I arrived in America, I watched my first-ever game of football.** It wasn’t the NFL or even a college game. It was a local high school football game on a Friday night. **Raised playing cricket and rugby, I didn’t even know the rules of the football game I was about to watch.** Right before the game began, the crowd rose to sing _The Star-Spangled Banner _and declare the Pledge of Allegiance. I was so new to your country I did not know the words of either back then. **But I did know I was witnessing something special: a display of authentic, uncomplicated patriotism. **
**I need your help to defend these values** – and I explain the action we are taking in **our latest mailing, which you can click on below.**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=4dbe2251db&e=5703353baa)
---
| **I have learned so much about America since moving here. But the most important lesson I have drawn is that American values are precious—and worth preserving.** Take it from me as an outsider, there really is no country in the world like the United States.

**To renew American patriotism, we need to reach the rising generation of young Americans.** For far too long, progressive academics have been indoctrinating young Americans. Instead of being taught to see themselves as individual citizens of a proud republic, young Americans have been taught to define themselves in terms of race or gender.

**The mainstream media promotes the idea that the United States is always in the wrong.** Heroic figures from America’s past are vilified for not having the exact same views as those on college campuses today.

**Enough is enough. We need to fight back – and here’s how.**
* **Combating Critical Race theory:** Last year we led the campaign for a law to combat Critical Race theory. No longer is it lawful in our state to use public money in the classroom to divide America. Other states are now following our example.
* **Mississippi Leadership Academy:** Laws are not enough. We need to inspire the next generation of American leaders to think about the United States the way I do. That is why we now run the Mississippi Leadership Academy, inspiring young people in our state to become part of the liberty movement.

An antidote to progressive ideology, our Leadership Academy teaches young Mississippians about Life, liberty, & the pursuit of happiness, the principles of a free society and the morality of the free market. It equips young people to be agents for change, including training so that they can make the case on campus.

**I have never been more excited about what we can accomplish than I am today. If we scale up this initiative—and others like it around the country—we can win!**
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=7aa5424b10&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| | |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| **_Ps. Meeting Tucker Carlson._** Right before he left Fox, I ran into Tucker - one of the most articulate conservatives there is. Let’s hope we have not seen or heard the last of him. **America needs you, Tucker! **
---
|
---
_Meeting Tucker Carlson last week_
|
---

Instead of being taught to see themselves as individual citizens of a proud republic, young Americans have been taught to define themselves in terms of race or gender. Heroic figures from America’s past are vilified for not having the exact same views as those on college campuses today. Enough is enough. We need to fight back – and here’s how. Combating Critical Race theory: Last year we led the campaign for a law to combat Critical Race theory. No longer is it lawful in our state to use public money in the classroom to divide America. Other states are now following our example. Mississippi Leadership Academy: Laws are not enough. We need to inspire the next generation of American leaders to think about the United States the way I do. That is why we now run the Mississippi Leadership Academy, inspiring young people in our state to become part of the liberty movement. An antidote to progressive ideology, our Leadership Academy teaches young Mississippians about Life, liberty, & the pursuit of happiness, the principles of a free society and the morality of the free market. It equips young people to be agents for change, including training so that they can make the case on campus. I have never been more excited about what we can accomplish than I am today. If we scale up this initiative—and others like it around the country—we can win! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | Ps. Meeting Tucker Carlson. Right before he left Fox, I ran into Tucker - one of the most articulate conservatives there is. Let’s hope we have not seen or heard the last of him. America needs you, Tucker! | Meeting Tucker Carlson last week | | |

body:
I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=add3f0a063f8452586248607145f13e0&_e=eYfUKD18CIZnR-vdhTJjHL9YrEfpnyWr9FKQz_LEbx2lGV2Tvir4z8eTuUBh0dNm1O8GrEr3h6qsE6Ey_7iKeeeikyKG_wEFU1OsKEDlnF90wg98_s1Zk9VNb-S3bqeNXd-5UVKerAhYuWQf4vPrQTuUYrTwrzELSdxApAYesVwKxmsBcgVOVXFLe_3NgQxXVHwKiLJzHFn0xTuPtzbNhAA4EFB4qctcR6EB50XdHBZAAhcXtqx4qcVjgEf6oi4YW-y4dPZV3-XV5r_Fr6Fx1gxHJiBpq1m3AKzuXO93Hs6hXmatGoaZUTgpMfSD07M-mEP9uKnP0XqIeQRvdWtgG4xHzx8fFYdzAsamZzpIkkT1HNGJxhczLwccefzTVGi7kdLffZRo0otoSMqUdo1KCcT3gc411NI7LAuv2MqA1J_ennQOrY1WdhZwl8X_CLa9 "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next... The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=add3f0a063f8452586248607145f13e0&_e=eYfUKD18CIZnR-vdhTJjHL9YrEfpnyWr9FKQz_LEbx2lGV2Tvir4z8eTuUBh0dNm1O8GrEr3h6qsE6Ey_7iKeeeikyKG_wEFU1OsKEDlnF90wg98_s1Zk9VNb-S3bqeNXd-5UVKerAhYuWQf4vPrQTuUYrTwrzELSdxApAYesVwKxmsBcgVOVXFLe_3NgQxXVHwKiLJzHFn0xTuPtzbNhAA4EFB4qctcR6EB50XdHBZAAhcXtqx4qcVjgEf6oi4YW-y4dPZV3-XV5r_Fr6Fx1q5GJ9N9DUgcyNorY8gAz_osstJebje5m2Bg86QqGJ9mPBhGAbyyBEaka5H_hJVUsBUVwPKzkX8k7rcHBxByUWz2boll9cRJALCx2bdemXKrtkc6BnZ3rNAO4Lsj69QORs0B2kJBz9dFEF4GTMCEv_H3Lymrcx0cwhtd-5cf06dnMaSKdmjydhqf-pHrzeosOg%3D%3D "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. ")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=add3f0a063f8452586248607145f13e0&_e=eYfUKD18CIZnR-vdhTJjHL9YrEfpnyWr9FKQz_LEbx2lGV2Tvir4z8eTuUBh0dNm1O8GrEr3h6qsE6Ey_7iKeeeikyKG_wEFU1OsKEDlnF90wg98_s1Zk9VNb-S3bqeNXd-5UVKerAhYuWQf4vPrQTuUYrTwrzELSdxApAYesVwKxmsBcgVOVXFLe_3NgQxXVHwKiLJzHFn0xTuPtzbNhAA4EFB4qctcR6EB50XdHBZAAhcXtqx4qcVjgEf6oi4YW-y4dPZV3-XV5r_Fr6Fx1q5GJ9N9DUgcyNorY8gAz_osstJebje5m2Bg86QqGJ9mYmk9qbxJXgXH3VgaKuCsB5-QefjuXAvV7lq_CkqIrpmAPAtWnONT5sHO0w5E0s4u3veoEiAcnIxfYvt69m9I8uMdv-SJtRFIXF82FL1HuLN_2AbQcM1tUMVhDO-yOo7Q0DFEY7MTqVEUN67xerokYg%3D%3D "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

clean_body: I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. | | | | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer: With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's really happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again. "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next... " | | | "READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>" The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course. We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024: - Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency - Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House - Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda. But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC. "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. " That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory. We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts. In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before. But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off. So I'll cut to the chase. "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history." Are you in? More from me soon, Sean Spicer | "image" * | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. | Folks,

**Any working mom will tell you how important it is to be prepared – but we can also tell you that there will always be surprises and bumps in the road.**

There are certain things on a re-election campaign that we know we’ll need funding for: advertising to persuade and mobilize voters, paying our campaign staff, and hosting events across the district.

But there are also things we can’t predict – like whatever billboard and television attacks Republicans will use against me in their efforts to flip this seat **RED** and replace me with another rubber stamp for their far-right agenda. **We can’t know everything that’s going to happen between now and Election Day, but we can prepare for it. **_**[That’s why I’m asking you to make a contribution of $10 or more before tomorrow’s April fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62502989/403664923/-43077042?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230429-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYThhOTY5ZC04ZmU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OsCkHOwBbdW1HqBA19hHzfeNr7r1-QlvgEzGp0Krm4k=)**_

But there are also things we can’t predict – like whatever billboard and television attacks Republicans will use against me in their efforts to flip this seat RED and replace me with another rubber stamp for their far-right agenda. We can’t know everything that’s going to happen between now and Election Day, but we can prepare for it. = | = | = With you on my team, I know we can get through anything. Thanks so much, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . To stop receiving all email communications, please

subject: Voter ID Petition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Common Sense
body:
| You need an ID to do almost everything in America - but not to vote?
Elections across the country are just months away, and we STILL don't have nationwide VOTER ID.
It's insane.
[**That 's why we're asking you right here, right now to answer this one question: Do you support voter ID in EVERY state across the country?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62618082:JldkHQIDN:m:1:3371812801:588F07387B659E9B6BA325BBD8A23BF2:r)

But the escalation in attacks against LGBTQ+ leaders like Becca – specifically insinuating that gay and transgender people are “groomers” – are _dangerous_ , and they must stop now.

name: Sen. Tim Kaine
subject: Building a Brighter Commonwealth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
|
---
Derek, I am committed to building a better future for the people of our great Commonwealth. I am proud to work with the Virginia Democrats in our shared mission to make progress on issues like access to quality health care, job creation, protecting our environment, and promoting equality and justice for all. I know we can make a real difference and ensure that every Virginian has the opportunity to succeed. But we've got to work together to ensure our Commonwealth has strong leaders in place fighting for our shared values. **That's why I'm reaching out to you today:[Can I count on you to chip in and split a donation 50/50 between my re-election campaign and Virginia Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62505932/403676332/-891529538?refcode=dpva-em-230429-kaine&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODlkYjgxMy05NGU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HN66tstqyvuIfvt6ihlNhr6zgfb6AmnmVC5i0sl5AS0=)** Your donation will go directly toward supporting Democratic candidates and causes all across Virginia, helping us build a strong and vibrant movement for progress. Whether it's at the local, state, or national level, Democrats need your help to compete and win in both 2023 and 2024. [**Will you make a donation today to support my campaign and Virginia Democrats in our efforts to protect progress and build a brighter future for our Commonwealth?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62505934/403676334/-891529538?refcode=dpva-em-230429-kaine&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODlkYjgxMy05NGU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HN66tstqyvuIfvt6ihlNhr6zgfb6AmnmVC5i0sl5AS0=) Thank you for your support, and let's keep fighting! Tim Kaine | ************[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62505936/403676336/-949666280?refcode=dpva-em-230429-kaine&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODlkYjgxMy05NGU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HN66tstqyvuIfvt6ihlNhr6zgfb6AmnmVC5i0sl5AS0=)************

clean_body: This is years in the making, Peter | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter, We built a grassroots movement from the ground up over three cycles to get a leader like John James in Washington... And the Democrats started targeting John basically on DAY 1. That 's why we're starting EARLY on our 2024 race. Even though John James has only been in Congress for 100 days, it's time to start fighting back. That's why we've set this ambitious April fundraising goal. We know we can hit it -- because we've got a movement that won't back down. Will you stand with John and help us hit our April fundraising goal, Peter? ****** "YES, I WON’T BACK DOWN!"****** Let's Fly! Team John James | | | Paid for by John James for Michigan |

Dear Fellow Patriot,

2023 is a

That's
why we've extended the deadline to activate your membership with

You can

By

million card-carrying constitutionalists who believe in our

But we
cannot do this without your help.

By
activating your membership today, you will ensure Heritage has
the resources to advance conservative policy solutions across the
country while providing aggressive and meaningful oversight and
accountability to the Biden administration and leaders of the
leftist regime.

Join us
today by clicking this secure link before the deadline:
https://secured.heritage.org/activate/

Best,

Kevin D.
Roberts, Ph.D.

in Washington and across the country. Please don't miss out on

subject: Did you see this? 10 Amazing Biden Successes: What You Must Know & Media Won't Tell You
body:

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5c7e74e6-0c7e-42ff-9959-13dba92ab9aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, **_The Blue Letter 4/29/23_** _I'm resending this, Blue Amp Action community, in the hope you'll watch and share with everyone you know.**It's so important we all know about all of President Biden's incredible accomplishments--ones the media simply won't talk about or give him credit for. **_ _You can also use this list to shutdown any MAGA nut in any argument they start. They will simply have no answer to this._ [WATCH! 10 Amazing Biden Successes: What You Must Know & Media Won't Tell You](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6445c446-ece8-4a9d-a532-8895ae7c4768/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [President Biden has been one of the most successful Presidents--EVER--by almost any metric](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbc619435-3c90-4019-b06d-0a9ea18eeb5b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Many don't know because the media won't report it. There [are clips here of GOPers forced to praise Biden](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdad5717c-66ef-4463-8034-aa52b81e9668/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)\-- McConnell!--you won't even remember. Today our sister outlet--[The Blue Amp w/ Cliff Schecter--has produced a Top 10 list of Biden's successes, and it will, honestly, amaze you all he's done](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf264488e-540f-495d-9a12-c31d47de24e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). [WATCH! 10 Amazing Biden Successes: What You Must Know & Media Won't Tell You](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tefb46f38-4e1e-4b49-b054-91357414b93d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We need to get this message out to EVERYONE with Biden announcing his run for reelection this week. [Please watch the video, like it, comment on it, subscribe to the channel and most importantly--Share it far & wide!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0a791e5a-0e45-4737-8272-49c2c0933873/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [WATCH! 10 Amazing Biden Successes: What You Must Know & Media Won't Tell You](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90485198-6e99-4275-9b1d-06e5c3958492/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you. We don't have a right-wing echo chamber. Or mainstream media doing their jobs. [But we have you. Let's all get this out there!](?) [WATCH! 10 Amazing Biden Successes: What You Must Know & Media Won't Tell You](https://default.salsalabs.org/T58bd805a-d8ea-4569-9b72-a5f9193c9b27/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you! Let's win this thing by getting the truth out. PS: 👍🔥Blue Amp Action's expanding! Sponsors, newsletters, petitions, fundraisers! | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9e345b12-3c1a-476e-8388-f3858d31f1f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

The 2024 campaign is going to set the stage for the next round of the fight to secure our democracy and to defend free and fair elections up and down the ballot. The last election solidified Georgia’s position as a swing state. It remains on the frontlines of attacks on our democracy — and Fair Fight’s work directly plays a role in building voter power in this critical state.
It’s going to take a full-scale organizing effort to push back against future anti-voter attacks in the state, to ensure all eligible voters can access the ballot box freely and fairly.
During the past election, our efforts empowered Georgia voters — especially youth voters, first-time voters, and voters of color — to turn out in historic numbers to elect pro-democracy leaders and defy right-wing voter suppression attempts. We’re ready to make history again — but we can’t succeed without your commitment to preserving our democracy and defending it at any cost.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: This isn’t an ordinary deadline email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2150%2E5257348%2EREY5S3 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, I recently sat down with a reporter at the SFGate to talk
about this Senate campaign and an interesting question came up.

As a progressive running for Senate in the most progressive state in the
nation, what do I believe makes me stand out in this election?

And the answer comes down to a matter of record.

Who has the best record of actually making progress? Because being
progressive must mean you’re able to make progress, and get things done.

I believe that my record in this regard is second to none.

I’ve passed dozens of bills with Democratic and Republican governors and
presidents.

Bills establishing and expanding the Metro Gold Line light rail in Los
Angeles.

Legislation establishing our early earthquake warning system throughout
California and the West Coast.

Bills guaranteeing up-to-date textbooks in schools — long before MAGA
Republicans sought to ban books and erase our history.

Bills providing a patient bill of rights and unprecedented funding for
juvenile justice prevention programs.

Bills stopping nuclear proliferation and strengthening press freedom.

I’ve been in the middle of these fights for years and have always worked
to get things done. Especially when it’s hard. Californians expect that in
their Senator.

With the last decade testing our democracy like never before, I’ve led the
fight to defend it. To defend voting rights and our institutions. Our
nation’s most populous state deserves one of our democracy’s greatest
champions. I will always work to carry that legacy forward.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230429_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2150%2E5257348%2EREY5S3 ]Derek, if these values resonate with you, and you are ready
to help me continue to make progress together in the Senate, then I am
humbly asking you to add $10, $25, or even $50 in support ahead of my
crucial fundraising deadline tomorrow. These fights really are important,
and our success depends on whether you choose to be a part of the effort.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=apr2023_abs_em.O2ILzB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230429_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2150%2E5257348%2EREY5S3 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=apr2023_abs_em.2RUxgc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230429_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2150%2E5257348%2EREY5S3 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=apr2023_abs_em.i2ayRH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230429_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2150%2E5257348%2EREY5S3 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=apr2023_abs_em.1_b9xO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230429_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2150%2E5257348%2EREY5S3 ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230429_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2150%2E5257348%2EREY5S3 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you for hearing me out. I’ll keep working every day on this campaign
trail to make you proud.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230429_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2150%2E5257348%2EREY5S3 ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

body:
We want to show strong fundraising $$$ for John
#
Derek, in case you missed it...
**!!️Our end of month deadline is 11:59 PM...TOMORROW !!️**
TBH, this year was off to a slow start, so we want to show strong fundraising $$$ to keep up our support of John's work in the Senate. Grassroots donations are the only way we'll be able to catch up -- and missing our monthly goals is bad news.
Keeping our fundraising up for every deadline matters, even in the off-years. It helps keep us prepared for anything that Republicans and their corporate PAC friends might throw our way.
**[That's why we set a goal of raising $25,000 online before tomorrow's deadline. Derek, it'd mean a lot to John + all of Team Fetterman if you could chip in $15 or whatever makes sense for you right now to power our movement.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230429-1?refcode=em20230429-1-8353&refcode2=8353_434096_EK8_vh&akid=8353%2E434096%2EEK8_vh)**

clean_body: We want to show strong fundraising $$$ for John Derek, in case you missed it... !!️Our end of month deadline is 11:59 PM...TOMORROW !!️ TBH, this year was off to a slow start, so we want to show strong fundraising $$$ to keep up our support of John's work in the Senate. Grassroots donations are the only way we'll be able to catch up -- and missing our monthly goals is bad news. Keeping our fundraising up for every deadline matters, even in the off-years. It helps keep us prepared for anything that Republicans and their corporate PAC friends might throw our way. Thank you, thank you, THANK you!!! -- Team Fetterman HQ 💛 | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: The Final Part
body:
| | | Fellow American,
---
As a Green Beret, the final parts of a mission were always the most critical.

No matter how you performed beforehand, if you slid off in the final moments, the whole mission could come crashing down.

_Right now, we’re in the home stretch of a MAJOR MISSION for our campaign, and I’m depending on the top patriots from my force._

**Our end-of-month deadline is TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT, and right now, we’re still not at our goal.**

[**I need you to do your part to DEFEND America from the radical Left. clean_body: | | | Fellow American, As a Green Beret, the final parts of a mission were always the most critical. No matter how you performed beforehand, if you slid off in the final moments, the whole mission could come crashing down. Right now, we’re in the home stretch of a MAJOR MISSION for our campaign, and I’m depending on the top patriots from my force. Our end-of-month deadline is TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT, and right now, we’re still not at our goal. The Democrat agenda isn’t just bad for America- it’s downright dangerous. From ignoring the threat of Communist China to pushing woke ideology over combat preparedness in our military, our enemies are begging for the Left to win. But I’m not about to let Democrats make a mockery out of my brothers and sisters in arms who made the ultimate sacrifice. It’s time to STEP UP for America, but we’re running out of time. | | In Service, Col. body:
New sticker from the VoteVets Store
#
Derek -
The Grand Old Party. Once upon a time, it was the party of Lincoln, of Teddy Roosevelt and of Dwight Eisenhower.
And now, it is the fringe MAGA party that voted for a budget that would gut health care and support for our Veterans. 217 of them voted for it, and just 4 against. They talk tough when it comes to Military action, but go AWOL when it’s time to take care of those who served.
VoteVets organizers are calling their offices. We’re putting ads together targeting Republicans in swing districts. We’re taking out all the stops to make sure this bill never progresses, and that the American people NEVER forget this vote.
[**And we need YOU to join us. Make a donation of any amount today and we’ll send you this sticker. All the proceeds will go towards holding these liars and hypocrites accountable.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-apr23-gop-sticker.zDIOWA&refcode=em230429-1-15&t=1&akid=8379%2E3013755%2EkMtYF7)

But that’s okay. Because we want this one to be around for a long time. We don’t want anyone to forget that the GOP turned their backs on our Veterans.
[**So today, any donation — even ONE DOLLAR — will get you this sticker.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-apr23-gop-sticker.zDIOWA&refcode=em230429-1-15&t=3&akid=8379%2E3013755%2EkMtYF7)**

Back to work now, there’s plenty more American patriots sent me here to do. I don’t quit, and I’ll never stop speaking the truth! – Troy Nehls id:2023-04-27-12:37:05:560t | | ---|--- | | Paid for by Nehls for Congress | |

PBS has brought free, educational programming into American homes for _over fifty years_ \-- we just CAN'T let the far right threaten this amazing resource!

name: Dave Min
subject: one of the most competitive races in the entire nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Serve, DemocratsServe
body:
| [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62510529/403693780/390144955?source=DS_EM_FR_90DO_230429_1_1&refcode2=c5525837-9ae6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&contactdata=IZZ8xVA5al43iLD++V2/25+VfOMTLSwnLu3CARQr+SB8gEBSqi2VIPBkjfNyNjubTVz0fazDNpFLCMfBTv+soRijRGu1NrxHJn6vIwWxx6YILYpI4cvHubAgoKB02bfVxeiNns0ZQTx0rcI0JcmHEqDDzFuomwAruIOtKdO/zaw=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1NTI1ODM3LTlhZTYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZdS2bM_wCqK44D9LasSxhbZRCNFoJ2flxfPjyEE5V3U=)

Peter —

**I’m Dave Min and I’m running for Congress in California’s 47th district.**

I began my career as a public servant in our federal government, holding Wall Street accountable during the financial crisis and protecting families from foreclosure before going on to serve as a law professor at UC Irvine.

And as a State Senator, I’ve championed legislation to reduce California’s carbon emissions, fight for women’s reproductive rights, prevent gun violence, and support small businesses.

**Now I’m running in one of the most competitive races in the entire nation: pundits are saying this race is a “toss-up” and national Republicans have already put CA-47 on their list of top targets.**

[Will you split a donation between Democrats Serve and my campaign so we can keep this seat blue? I need your help to prepare for the fight ahead.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62510531/403693782/-1872898465?amount=10&source=DS_EM_FR_90DO_230429_1_1&refcode2=c5525837-9ae6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&contactdata=IZZ8xVA5al43iLD++V2/25+VfOMTLSwnLu3CARQr+SB8gEBSqi2VIPBkjfNyNjubTVz0fazDNpFLCMfBTv+soRijRGu1NrxHJn6vIwWxx6YILYpI4cvHubAgoKB02bfVxeiNns0ZQTx0rcI0JcmHEqDDzFuomwAruIOtKdO/zaw=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1NTI1ODM3LTlhZTYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZdS2bM_wCqK44D9LasSxhbZRCNFoJ2flxfPjyEE5V3U=) | | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62510533/403693784/-1872898465?amount=10&refcode2=c5525837-9ae6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&contactdata=IZZ8xVA5al43iLD++V2/25+VfOMTLSwnLu3CARQr+SB8gEBSqi2VIPBkjfNyNjubTVz0fazDNpFLCMfBTv+soRijRGu1NrxHJn6vIwWxx6YILYpI4cvHubAgoKB02bfVxeiNns0ZQTx0rcI0JcmHEqDDzFuomwAruIOtKdO/zaw=&source=DS_EM_FR_90DO_230429_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1NTI1ODM3LTlhZTYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZdS2bM_wCqK44D9LasSxhbZRCNFoJ2flxfPjyEE5V3U=)
---
I'm honored to earn the support of Democrats Serve for my congressional run as they share in my commitment to protect our democracy, strengthen our economy, and beat back right-wing extremism. In Congress, I’ll use my background in public service to fight for our Democratic values.

But first, I’ll need your help to win. With Republicans already targeting this seat, we need to be prepared for anything that comes our way.

clean_body: | = Peter — I’m Dave Min and I’m running for Congress in California’s 47th district. I began my career as a public servant in our federal government, holding Wall Street accountable during the financial crisis and protecting families from foreclosure before going on to serve as a law professor at UC Irvine. And as a State Senator, I’ve championed legislation to reduce California’s carbon emissions, fight for women’s reproductive rights, prevent gun violence, and support small businesses. Now I’m running in one of the most competitive races in the entire nation: pundits are saying this race is a “toss-up” and national Republicans have already put CA-47 on their list of top targets. = | | = I'm honored to earn the support of Democrats Serve for my congressional run as they share in my commitment to protect our democracy, strengthen our economy, and beat back right-wing extremism. In Congress, I’ll use my background in public service to fight for our Democratic values. But first, I’ll need your help to win. With Republicans already targeting this seat, we need to be prepared for anything that comes our way. = Thanks, = Dave Min Candidate for Congress | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Democrats Serve, DemocratsServe.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. | =

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Going toe-to-toe with the wealthy and powerful in this country is not easy.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=118%2E791427%2EKL64Gn)
Hey team, it's Ilhan.
In moments like these, I like to be as direct as possible: **[Can I count on you to make your first $3 contribution to our re-election campaign for Congress today?**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-apr23.QUZUGP&refcode=em230429-1-t2&t=2&akid=118%2E791427%2EKL64Gn)
Let me explain:
Tomorrow at midnight, we're closing the books on our April fundraising, and we have some important goals to reach before then. Goals that we need to hit if we're going to have the resources to fund a successful campaign.
Last year, our movement went up against MILLIONS of dollars in outside spending from the political establishment, from dark money super PACs, and from corporate special interests. Together, we overcame the attacks and the people of Minnesota's 5th district re-elected me to serve my third term.
Like all of my campaigns before it, it was the small-dollar, grassroots support of folks like you that made it possible for that to happen.
**Here's a simple fact: Going toe-to-toe with the wealthy and powerful in this country is not easy. It takes a lot of hard work, and _nobody_ can do it all alone.**
I knew from the day I launched my first campaign that so long as I stuck to my values and kept fighting for working people, our opponents would do and spend whatever it took to defeat us.
If we're going to stand strong and win again — against endless attacks, bigoted threats, and millions of dollars in outside spending — it's critical that we're in this together. So please:
**[Can you make a contribution — of $3 or anything you can — before tomorrow's end-of-month fundraising deadline? The only way we'll do this is together.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-apr23.QUZUGP&refcode=em230429-1-t2&t=3&akid=118%2E791427%2EKL64Gn)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/14?c0=io-em-apr23.Vm2aP6&refcode=em230429-1-t2&t=22&akid=118%2E791427%2EKL64Gn)**

****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-apr23.z2W-vN&refcode=em230429-1-t2&t=23&akid=118%2E791427%2EKL64Gn)**

---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/9?c0=io-em-apr23.8UYSw_&refcode=em230429-1-t2&t=25&akid=118%2E791427%2EKL64Gn)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/10?c0=io-em-apr23.tAnLLf&refcode=em230429-1-t2&t=26&akid=118%2E791427%2EKL64Gn)**

****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-apr23.TzKALD&refcode=em230429-1-t2&t=27&akid=118%2E791427%2EKL64Gn)**
---
****
As always, thank you for everything. Not just for your financial support, but for your passion, your encouragement, and for all that you bring to our movement's fight for justice.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=28&akid=118%2E791427%2EKL64Gn)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=118%2E791427%2EKL64Gn)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=30&akid=118%2E791427%2EKL64Gn)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=31&refcode2=118_791427_KL64Gn&akid=118%2E791427%2EKL64Gn)**.
Ilhan for Congress

Washington D.C., 20033
clean_body: Going toe-to-toe with the wealthy and powerful in this country is not easy. Hey team, it's Ilhan. In moments like these, I like to be as direct as possible: Let me explain: Tomorrow at midnight, we're closing the books on our April fundraising, and we have some important goals to reach before then. Goals that we need to hit if we're going to have the resources to fund a successful campaign. Last year, our movement went up against MILLIONS of dollars in outside spending from the political establishment, from dark money super PACs, and from corporate special interests. Together, we overcame the attacks and the people of Minnesota's 5th district re-elected me to serve my third term. Like all of my campaigns before it, it was the small-dollar, grassroots support of folks like you that made it possible for that to happen. Here's a simple fact: Going toe-to-toe with the wealthy and powerful in this country is not easy. It takes a lot of hard work, and nobody can do it all alone. I knew from the day I launched my first campaign that so long as I stuck to my values and kept fighting for working people, our opponents would do and spend whatever it took to defeat us. If we're going to stand strong and win again — against endless attacks, bigoted threats, and millions of dollars in outside spending — it's critical that we're in this together. So please: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | As always, thank you for everything. Not just for your financial support, but for your passion, your encouragement, and for all that you bring to our movement's fight for justice. In solidarity, Ilhan Omar PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

body:

clean_body: Tomorrow is the last day to meet our end-of-month goal, and the day after that is the voter registration deadline. = | = = Pennsylvania’s 2023 primary elections will determine candidates for crucial offices, including a PA Supreme Court justice, Commonwealth and Superior Court judges, the local officials who govern our communities, and the county board of election officials in charge of running and certifying our elections in 2024. We’re working to empower Pennsylvania’s historically disenfranchised and voters to get out and vote their values in this and every election, twice a year. But one of the most important deadlines – the last day to register to vote in the primary election – is almost here. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to : May 1, 2023 Last day to : May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. | | Peter,

After yet another tragic incident of gun violence in Nashville, people took to the Tennessee House of Representatives to call for common-sense gun measures that will keep their families safe. Democratic lawmakers were right beside them, amplifying their voices.

_And the GOP punished them for doing so._

Here’s what happened...

Make no mistake, billions and billions of dollars will be spent by the Democrats to try and stop us from winning back the White House in 2024.
**And following Biden’s announcement, we have just DAYS left until the end-of-month deadline when our fundraising numbers will be compared head-to-head for the _FIRST TIME_.**

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: I’ll never stop fighting for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | It’s been a tough month. From the tragic shootings in Nashville and Louisville to the attacks on our Democracy in Tennessee, to the Mifepristone ruling in Texas — it can feel as though all hope is lost.

**I’m here to tell you — it’s not.**

**Nine seats**. That’s all we need to take back the House in 2024 so we can get back to the real work of defending Jersey Values and fighting for bipartisan progress.

[I’m fired up and ready to go. But I can’t do it alone. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62513563/403704284/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230429_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTY4YzY4ZDktOWVlNi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sJHb0b8xpef6aVweggtIlp_9mxSPafWVoph5Huh4hwM=)
---
Peter, I thought I should take a moment to address some of the most frequently asked questions I get about HER Time:
1. **Why do you send so many emails?**
These emails are the primary way HER Time raises money to support all the work we do. Whether that’s advocating for our issues, like passing the _SHIELD Act_ or protecting abortion, or boosting women candidates, like Lauren Underwood or Angie Craig. They’re also the most direct way for our team to send critical updates to our supporters — like you!

2. **Does my $3 really make a difference?**
Yes! $3 may seem insignificant, but it speaks to the power of a grassroots team. When you multiply $3 or $5 or $10 over and over by everyone reading these emails, the impact can be _huge_. But grassroots power only works if everyone plays their part.

3. **Do you expect me to donate every time we reach out?**
_Of course not!_ But we do hope you open our emails and give them a read, because they have the most up-to-date information about our work, and your engagement helps us out.

While we don’t expect you to donate to every email, I hope you’ll consider donating to this one. We have an important end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up tomorrow at midnight, and we’re not on track to hit our goal. [_**What do you say, Peter? Have I answered your questions? Could you help us out with a $3 donation today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62513564/403704285/-253429511?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230429_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTY4YzY4ZDktOWVlNi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sJHb0b8xpef6aVweggtIlp_9mxSPafWVoph5Huh4hwM=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62513565/403704286/-253429511?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230429_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTY4YzY4ZDktOWVlNi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sJHb0b8xpef6aVweggtIlp_9mxSPafWVoph5Huh4hwM=)

clean_body: | = Peter, I thought I should take a moment to address some of the most frequently asked questions I get about HER Time: 1. Why do you send so many emails? These emails are the primary way HER Time raises money to support all the work we do. Whether that’s advocating for our issues, like passing the SHIELD Act or protecting abortion, or boosting women candidates, like Lauren Underwood or Angie Craig. They’re also the most direct way for our team to send critical updates to our supporters — like you! 2. Does my $3 really make a difference? Yes! $3 may seem insignificant, but it speaks to the power of a grassroots team. When you multiply $3 or $5 or $10 over and over by everyone reading these emails, the impact can be huge. But grassroots power only works if everyone plays their part. 3. Do you expect me to donate every time we reach out? Of course not! But we do hope you open our emails and give them a read, because they have the most up-to-date information about our work, and your engagement helps us out. While we don’t expect you to donate to every email, I hope you’ll consider donating to this one. We have an important end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up tomorrow at midnight, and we’re not on track to hit our goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, team. — Katie HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Giffords.org
subject: We must keep fighting to prevent future tragedies
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We’re thankful to have you in the fight to end gun violence
#

**January 8, 2013**
This was the day that Gabby Giffords founded Americans for Responsible Solutions, the organization now known as GIFFORDS. Since then, we’ve been working to elect gun safety champions up and down the ballot, help pass gun safety legislation in all 50 states, and organize a community of supporters who are all united behind the common cause of keeping our communities safe from gun violence.
**April 30, 2023**
That’s tomorrow—the date of our April fundraising deadline. When it comes to our fundraising efforts, there is never an opportunity where we can afford to slow down. We still experience far too many acts of senseless gun violence in our country on a daily basis, and there’s so much more we must do to prevent future tragedies.
The choice is yours, but we hope that you’ll consider making your first online contribution of $3 today to help us reach our goals. [**If you’re able, please click here to chip in to GIFFORDS PAC before our end-of-month deadline passes tomorrow at midnight.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr23.fjJHm6&refcode=em230429-1-15&t=1&akid=5350%2E3935704%2EOCCmMa)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
**[DONATE $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-apr23.kgvFSZ&amount=3&refcode=em230429-1-15&t=2&akid=5350%2E3935704%2EOCCmMa)**
Thank you. We appreciate all that you do.
\- The GIFFORDS Team

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=5350%2E3935704%2EOCCmMa) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Team Pramila
subject: Did you catch Pramila on MSNBC?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The Republican party of today is determined to continue not showing up for the American people while prioritizing profits over people and fighting countless manufactured, unnecessary battles
#
Peter, did you catch Pramila on MSNBC? If you missed it, don’t worry — we’ve got you covered!
[****](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41783?refcode=em20230429-2426&t=1&akid=2426%2E420207%2EWEwkZ3)
Pramila took to MSNBC to discuss the truth about Republicans' obsession with creating cruel, extreme, and unworkable proposals to mask the truth: _they don’t have any real solutions to the issues and challenges we collectively face._
**[You can click here to watch the full clip and when you finish, please consider chipping in $3 — or whatever you’re able to give — to help us close the gap on our end-of-month fundraising goal and keep up our good progressive fight.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41783?refcode=em20230429-2426&t=2&akid=2426%2E420207%2EWEwkZ3)**
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41783?refcode=em20230429-2426&t=21&akid=2426%2E420207%2EWEwkZ3)**
**The Republican party of today is determined to continue not showing up for the American people while prioritizing profits over people and fighting countless manufactured, unnecessary battles.** Meanwhile, working class families and everyday people are facing real issues due to inflation, lack of gun control, poor access to healthcare and more.
While Republicans debate hypothetical issues, our children are forced to live in fear of gun violence or persecution for being who they are, families are forced to decide between putting meals on the table or paying exorbitantly high utility costs, and our climate continues to spiral out of control.
**We know that Pramila is determined and dedicated to stand up for not only her district and constituents, but for communities that look just like hers because she knows the urgency of the crisis we face.[If you stand with her and our collective progressive movement, please chip in today to boost our momentum and continue growing this campaign for change.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41783?refcode=em20230429-2426&t=22&akid=2426%2E420207%2EWEwkZ3)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230429-2426-footer&t=23&refcode2=2426_420207_WEwkZ3&akid=2426%2E420207%2EWEwkZ3)**

clean_body: The Republican party of today is determined to continue not showing up for the American people while prioritizing profits over people and fighting countless manufactured, unnecessary battles Peter, did you catch Pramila on MSNBC? If you missed it, don’t worry — we’ve got you covered! Pramila took to MSNBC to discuss the truth about Republicans' obsession with creating cruel, extreme, and unworkable proposals to mask the truth: they don’t have any real solutions to the issues and challenges we collectively face. The Republican party of today is determined to continue not showing up for the American people while prioritizing profits over people and fighting countless manufactured, unnecessary battles. Meanwhile, working class families and everyday people are facing real issues due to inflation, lack of gun control, poor access to healthcare and more. While Republicans debate hypothetical issues, our children are forced to live in fear of gun violence or persecution for being who they are, families are forced to decide between putting meals on the table or paying exorbitantly high utility costs, and our climate continues to spiral out of control. We know that Pramila is determined and dedicated to stand up for not only her district and constituents, but for communities that look just like hers because she knows the urgency of the crisis we face. In solidarity, Team Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

[**Our end-of-month deadline is TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT, and we still need 56 more conservatives to step up.**](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=3ffb6c91586f44b09fd58bc8e9ecd509&_e=Rid3vuF1w5YiskDM2DEWnLYuscUDoTGJAtEFb3xmWC_nHNsFzcpPWmuUlEnQbPzRQD0jJACt-2L6xWD6Qf-7P7Xvd6uorLd0WI6AtK3PnYvchn6AbqxxayqQQwkfCz6UZk6JkL5ynupoq8MXWOx06p1f6ENR6Xdwo_gU5imbS1ddpM_n-wdHAwUzX7G5tnOnsj3w4sA6SM4-ky0SclbKDoHOMkDv8jN3Et5UEtmPVJSoJk1hscrGooyxHe6xd9RSHVJQsnySXhSgdwZ_wUzQMpvjPGIVhEw1HE6RdjWjCgz-VdtklFcNGQ2khkhan5XwIIlBEvM32qMhZPddJCgama_NQlLD8ZmW1w32yXhLvW4%3D)

body:
Thank you in advance.
#
Our April fundraising deadline is just two days away, Peter.
Right now, corporate PACs and dark-money GOP groups are already raising millions of dollars in hopes to take down our progressive movement.
We’re never going to get checks from Big Oil or Big Pharma executives. Cori has always run a people-first campaign, funded by everyday folks like you.
This grassroots team has had Cori's back before, but if we're going to keep the first activist from the movement in defense of Black Lives in Congress, we can't lose your support. **We took a look this morning, and here's what we found next to your name in our supporter records:**

-Team Shapiro

From: Josh Shapiro
Subject: this Special Election could determine the future of abortion rights in Pennsylvania

Hi Derek, this is important:

**In less than one month, there is a Special Election that will determine which party has the majority in Pennsylvania’s House of Representatives.**

If Democrat Heather Boyd wins, Democrats will keep our slim majority and can continue to protect fundamental freedoms like your freedom to choose here in Pennsylvania.

**But if we lose, it will give Republicans the chance to pass an abortion ban.** Because here’s the thing:

As Governor, I can and will veto any _legislation_ that makes abortion illegal. But I’m not able to veto _amendments_ to the Pennsylvania State Constitution. Heather’s opponent is against abortion rights, so if Republicans win this race and take over the State House, they could pass a constitutional amendment to ban abortion – and I won’t be able to veto it.

**[So I’m not exaggerating when I say this is one of the most important races in the country right now. clean_body: | | | Peter, FIRST: Democrats pulled RECORD fundraising numbers last month. THEN: They continued to support the WEAPONIZED justice system going after conservatives. NOW: We have a deadline to help them STOP their power grab, but I need your help. My race is going to be one of the closest in the country, and we need all hands on deck if we’re going to hang onto this vital seat. The Left has created a machine to try and solidify their power at an alarming rate, Peter. They took control of the media and big tech so all the next generation sees is their lies. Now, they’re taking advantage of it by getting millions of Americans to buy into their socialist agenda. I know you’re too smart to fall for their plan, but not everyone is as in-the-know as you, so it’s up to patriots like US to reveal the TRUTH. But right now, we’re running out of time. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

subject: A quick word,
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats
body:
April is almost over and we're far behind. | | | Peter – tomorrow is the last day of the month and we're $1,870 short of our goal. Simply put, we cannot afford to miss our goal by even a penny. Our goals keep our operations going — from candidate endorsements to fundraising for them — and if we miss our goal this month, we may have to make some cuts that would be heartwrenching. We'll explain exactly what's at stake but if you can help URD out by making a contribution — whatever you can afford — today, I would be very grateful. **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/urd](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcFSzUyRzid_9ziDE42MpI4FGfZG3HoeVLYDZZTMv4pboOgXtcE_kYhlxSX5iZXv7_8c3kg1Kk_dUQqCyDtMewXWhCvtBHmM-V38tU5qqxpeRajh7A5MobjNDaMAbngjTztODZ4gXziSoyQcNsOj67i_G-Vkz3g95sxe9f_50dmJc9jmiSpqyA2WwElArYUtshrDZm1e4wUM2E0Aupps0X3JwuRSlERvvFTw7Gq_Qd5n0pzapS5EWNYduqPekbaIVlXOltz7qi-KPhXByiyw7FOw/3vr/BQtCdQPDTumo863ar8HbmA/h0/LGhHvPIVMLYPBwDOFGdo1bLITQo2oxu9iJzj8_jUx2w)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: I’m running for U.S. Senate to replace Josh Hawley and fundamentally change who has power in our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Let me explain how we got here.
#
We’ve had an exciting few months, Peter.
From launching this campaign on January 6th to calling out Josh Hawley on cable news to breaking Missouri fundraising records, your support has helped us put a national spotlight on Missouri’s U.S. Senate race.
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[chip in $10 or whatever you can toward our goal of raising $20,000 before tomorrow at midnight.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31874?refcode=em20230429-3057&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3057%2E614464%2ETgzdDz) But first, let me explain a little more about how we got here.**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31874?refcode=em20230429-3057&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3057%2E614464%2ETgzdDz)**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31874?refcode=em20230429-3057&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3057%2E614464%2ETgzdDz)
I grew up in Central Missouri. And like so many other Americans, my family lived paycheck-to-paycheck. So when my little sister was born with a heart condition, the medical bills bankrupted us. Maxed-out credit cards and no money left, times had never been tougher.
But we weren’t alone — our community took care of us. When my parents had to take my sister to the hospital in St. Louis, our neighbors and friends took my siblings and me into their homes and brought more meals by the house than we could ever hope to eat. **That’s the Missouri I grew up in.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31874?refcode=em20230429-3057&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3057%2E614464%2ETgzdDz)
Their support helped send me to college, and after that I joined the Marines to honor everything they had done for me and my family growing up. Got deployed to Iraq and Afghanistan. Later the Pentagon. I was on the Joint Staff negotiating arms control agreements with NATO and Russia.
When I came home between tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, one of the hardest things was seeing what was happening back in my old neighborhood. It was a community picked for parts — the local corner store boarded up, my first family house bulldozed to the ground. **Here’s all that’s left of it:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31874?refcode=em20230429-3057&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3057%2E614464%2ETgzdDz)
While all of us were risking our lives building up towns like Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Herat, career politicians like Josh Hawley let our country waste away. They spent trillions on bailouts, tax breaks, and subsidies for the industries that stripped our communities for parts — like Wall Street, Big Pharma, and Big Oil — and then told us they can’t figure out how to invest even a fraction of that into building up our own country and investing in our own people.
**I saw what was happening — and I was ready to fight back.**
So in my final year of active duty, I worked to upend the corporate defense monopolies that leave our country less safe. I also joined an organization that fights corporate monopolies — we took on defense contractors, Big Pharma, Big Tech, Big Ag, Wall Street. The people buying off our politicians and leaving the rest of us behind.
**And now, I’m running for U.S. Senate to replace Josh Hawley and fundamentally change who has power in our country** — so everyday people call the shots, not massive corporations or corrupt politicians. I want to abolish corporate PACs, expose lobbyists writing our laws, criminalize war profiteering, ban insider trading among members of Congress, and enact a Marshall Plan for the Midwest — a massive investment and job creation program that will rebuild our forgotten communities and get us off fossil fuels once and for all.
**Without a single cent of corporate PAC money, we’re building a people-powered movement to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat — and I want you on this team.[Please add a donation of any amount toward our goal of raising $20,000 before the end of April right now so we can continue building this movement and finally give power back to working people.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31874?refcode=em20230429-3057&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3057%2E614464%2ETgzdDz)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31875?refcode=em20230429-3057&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=7&akid=3057%2E614464%2ETgzdDz) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31875?refcode=em20230429-3057&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=8&akid=3057%2E614464%2ETgzdDz) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31874?refcode=em20230429-3057&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3057%2E614464%2ETgzdDz)
---
Missourians have already proved that they know how to take back their power at the ballot box. So I’m not just running to make a point — **this is a race we can win.**
Over the last three election cycles, voters approved measures by big margins to raise the minimum wage well above the federal level, expand healthcare under the Affordable Care Act, and legalize recreational marijuana. So if we’re able to get our message in front of voters early in this race, we have a real shot at defeating Josh Hawley in 2024 and flipping this seat.
**But I need you on this team to get it done, Peter.** GOP insiders and even Hawley’s own campaign have already started attacking me — and over the coming months, they’re bound to get even more vicious. That’s why we need to start preparing right now to fight back and deliver our positive message to voters.
**[Will you chip in anything you can right now so we can hit our end-of-month goal and stay prepared for the fight ahead? I don’t take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say anything makes a big difference to our campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31874?refcode=em20230429-3057&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3057%2E614464%2ETgzdDz)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31875?refcode=em20230429-3057&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=11&akid=3057%2E614464%2ETgzdDz) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31875?refcode=em20230429-3057&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=12&akid=3057%2E614464%2ETgzdDz) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31875?refcode=em20230429-3057&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=13&akid=3057%2E614464%2ETgzdDz) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31875?refcode=em20230429-3057&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=14&akid=3057%2E614464%2ETgzdDz) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31875?refcode=em20230429-3057&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=15&akid=3057%2E614464%2ETgzdDz) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31875?refcode=em20230429-3057&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=16&akid=3057%2E614464%2ETgzdDz) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31874?refcode=em20230429-3057&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=17&akid=3057%2E614464%2ETgzdDz)
---
Together, we can take back power from the corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley and finally give it to real, everyday people.
Thanks for helping us get it done,
Lucas Kunce

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=19&akid=3057%2E614464%2ETgzdDz). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
clean_body: Let me explain how we got here. We’ve had an exciting few months, Peter. From launching this campaign on January 6th to calling out Josh Hawley on cable news to breaking Missouri fundraising records, your support has helped us put a national spotlight on Missouri’s U.S. Senate race. In a moment, I’m going to ask you to But first, let me explain a little more about how we got here. I grew up in Central Missouri. And like so many other Americans, my family lived paycheck-to-paycheck. So when my little sister was born with a heart condition, the medical bills bankrupted us. Maxed-out credit cards and no money left, times had never been tougher. But we weren’t alone — our community took care of us. When my parents had to take my sister to the hospital in St. Louis, our neighbors and friends took my siblings and me into their homes and brought more meals by the house than we could ever hope to eat. That’s the Missouri I grew up in. Their support helped send me to college, and after that I joined the Marines to honor everything they had done for me and my family growing up. Got deployed to Iraq and Afghanistan. Later the Pentagon. I was on the Joint Staff negotiating arms control agreements with NATO and Russia. When I came home between tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, one of the hardest things was seeing what was happening back in my old neighborhood. It was a community picked for parts — the local corner store boarded up, my first family house bulldozed to the ground. Here’s all that’s left of it: While all of us were risking our lives building up towns like Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Herat, career politicians like Josh Hawley let our country waste away. They spent trillions on bailouts, tax breaks, and subsidies for the industries that stripped our communities for parts — like Wall Street, Big Pharma, and Big Oil — and then told us they can’t figure out how to invest even a fraction of that into building up our own country and investing in our own people. I saw what was happening — and I was ready to fight back. So in my final year of active duty, I worked to upend the corporate defense monopolies that leave our country less safe. I also joined an organization that fights corporate monopolies — we took on defense contractors, Big Pharma, Big Tech, Big Ag, Wall Street. The people buying off our politicians and leaving the rest of us behind. And now, I’m running for U.S. Senate to replace Josh Hawley and fundamentally change who has power in our country — so everyday people call the shots, not massive corporations or corrupt politicians. I want to abolish corporate PACs, expose lobbyists writing our laws, criminalize war profiteering, ban insider trading among members of Congress, and enact a Marshall Plan for the Midwest — a massive investment and job creation program that will rebuild our forgotten communities and get us off fossil fuels once and for all. Without a single cent of corporate PAC money, we’re building a people-powered movement to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat — and I want you on this team. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Missourians have already proved that they know how to take back their power at the ballot box. So I’m not just running to make a point — this is a race we can win. Over the last three election cycles, voters approved measures by big margins to raise the minimum wage well above the federal level, expand healthcare under the Affordable Care Act, and legalize recreational marijuana. So if we’re able to get our message in front of voters early in this race, we have a real shot at defeating Josh Hawley in 2024 and flipping this seat. But I need you on this team to get it done, Peter. GOP insiders and even Hawley’s own campaign have already started attacking me — and over the coming months, they’re bound to get even more vicious. That’s why we need to start preparing right now to fight back and deliver our positive message to voters. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Together, we can take back power from the corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley and finally give it to real, everyday people. Thanks for helping us get it done, Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: HelenGym.com
subject: Up against billionaires, millionaires, and the clock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
Sunday is the LAST monthly fundraising deadline of Helen’s race, and we’ve set a goal of 500 donors by 11:59 PM tomorrow night. Can you chip in $17 ($1 for each day left in this race) to reach it?
INSTANT DONATE $17 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em?express_lane=true&amount=17]
Donate another amount → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]

We don’t set ambitious goals like this lightly. The truth is that we’ve been outspent from the start of this race, and we need your support to fight every second until polls close:

We’re up against Pennsylvania’s richest man , Jeffrey Yass, a far-right billionaire on a mission to defund Philly schools. He’s tied to a shady political group that is running false TV ads attacking Helen.

We’re up against self-funding multi-millionaires who have dropped fortunes trying to spend their way into the Mayor’s office.

And we’re up against the clock. We only have 17 days to get Helen’s message to voters on TV, online, and face to face in Philly neighborhoods, and because most of our donations come from small donors like you, we need every bit of help you can spare.

Please rush a donation today so we can reach our LAST monthly fundraising goal before Election Day. With just 17 days left in this race, every second and every cent matters!

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em?express_lane=true&amount=10]
CHIP IN $17 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em?express_lane=true&amount=17]

CHIP IN $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em?express_lane=true&amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em?express_lane=true&amount=100]

CHIP IN $250 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em?express_lane=true&amount=250]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]

It will take all of us doing all that we can — talking to neighbors, pitching in, and showing up to vote on Election Day — but if we all step up and stand together, we believe Helen Gym will be our next mayor.

Whatever you can spare is deeply appreciated, team. Thanks for your support of Helen.

— Team Helen
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]
Friends of Helen Gym
PO Box 11766
Philadelphia, PA 19101
United States

clean_body: | | Team, Anti-abortion extremists in the Ohio state legislature have gone on record admitting that their attempts to increase the approval threshold for ballot measures to an undemocratic 60% supermajority is because they don’t want voters to pass a measure to protect abortion this fall. The state Senate just successfully referred this disastrous measure to the ballot, and now a vote is expected any day now from the House — so, we must be ready to fight back. = = Ohio isn’t the only state trying to enact major restrictions on the power of voter-driven ballot measures, team. In Missouri, Florida, South Dakota and Idaho, several proposals have also been introduced to increase the number of districts signatures must be collected from to qualify an issue for the ballot, or to raise the threshold for passing ballot measures. We’re building up the resources to fight back with our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign, but to be successful, we need to know that all of our supporters back this movement. = = Thank you, FP Team Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
