name: Andy Kim
subject: They are showing us exactly who they are
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
Republicans in the House are refusing to raise the debt ceiling without cuts to critical programs. These proposed cuts for things like food aid and clean energy tax incentives would most harm those who are already struggling to make ends meet. And the proposal includes no plans to tax the wealthy or crack down on tax cheats.

Here's some of the damage it would cause:

*30 million veterans would lose access to outpatient visits.

200,000 children would lose access to Head Start slots, and 180,000 children would lose access to child care.

80,000 students would have their Pell Grants eliminated, it would also reduce the maximum award by nearly $1,000 for the remaining 6.6 million students.

10 million Americans would see their food assistance threatened.

70 million seniors and people with disabilities would be forced to endure longer wait times when they call for assistance for both Social Security and Medicare.

640,000 families would lose access to rental assistance.

29,000 Americans would be denied admission to opioid use disorder treatment.

This fiscal irresponsibility is pure cruelty for the sake of it.

We're building up our grassroots movement that puts people over politics. Can you chip in now before our end-of-month deadline and fuel the fight against these cruel policies? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-04-29-eom-republicancuts-national&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a501391c-a5e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73]

Instead of working towards a brighter future for our country, Republican extremists are holding our nation hostage. They are demanding cuts to programs that people in my district and millions more Americans rely on, while simultaneously refusing to tax their wealthy, corporate donors.

They are showing us exactly who they are.

Know that in Congress, I will always stand with hard working Americans, not just those at the top.

Will you support our growing movement against Republicans' heartless policies with a donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-04-29-eom-republicancuts-national&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a501391c-a5e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73]

More soon,

Andy

Some of the most influential figures in the Republican Party have reached out specifically to YOU so that YOUR answers are included in the Official 2024 Presidential Canvass results. With our major April FEC-Mandated deadline TOMORROW, the Official 2024 Presidential Canvass will close. Your answers are VITAL to ensuring we nominate the RIGHT Republican in 2024. He's a failed governor with a downright awful disapproval rating, and he's caught up in one of the biggest public corruption scandals our state's ever seen.

But he's still got the special interests and wealthy folks propping him up.

So I won't sugarcoat it — defeating Tate Reeves won't be easy. But that's why hitting our goal tomorrow is so important.

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: I don’t like asking, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja of Congress
body:
Peter, I don’t like asking hard working folks for money. I hate that taking back the House for Democrats costs so much. [**_But my End of Month Deadline is just 24 hours away -- and I’m still $1,984 short of my goal._ **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62516297/403715184/-1810142053?refcode=20230429_em_fr_b1_raja_30_v1&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWU2OTZmMi1hNmU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1DpZ0bSiJCR6iqlfbrrsKldJs7sY8CGqq5RsBh8tdEQ=) **[_Peter, I’m leading the charge to make sure Kevin McCarthy and his radical MAGA allies can’t buy themselves another term in power. But if I can’t meet my fundraising goal before then, I’ll have to cut back my efforts when I desperately need to be scaling up. | | Democratic pro-choice women are saving abortion rights [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62516176/403714987/1957298150?sourceid=1049980&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTQ3YTZjZS1hNmU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-aE7iYYTZPMoRx_rGs7qn4pZjwHNyB-He1wif5Qpygo=&emci=eb47a6ce-a6e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f547a6ce-a6e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

As an EMILYs List supporter, you know better than anyone that it's been a rough month for abortion rights. **But it's not all doom and gloom.** EMILYs List-endorsed women across the country, at all levels of government, are working hard to protect reproductive rights in their communities.

These women give me hope, because I know that their work is the only way we're going to restore, preserve, and expand abortion rights nationwide.

**[**To help keep these pro-choice champions in office — and to help elect even more — donate toward our $150,000 End-of-Month goal today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62516188/403715003/1957298150?sourceid=1049980&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTQ3YTZjZS1hNmU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-aE7iYYTZPMoRx_rGs7qn4pZjwHNyB-He1wif5Qpygo=&emci=eb47a6ce-a6e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f547a6ce-a6e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) So, as promised, here's some good news for your weekend:
* Last week, the Nevada state Senate — led by majority leader and EMILYs List Rising Star Award nominee Sen.**Nicole Cannizzaro** — passed legislation protecting abortion patients and providers from out-of-state prosecution. (Fun fact: the Nevada Legislature is the first-ever majority-women legislature in the country!) It also advanced a bill that would enshrine abortion rights in the state constitution. Vice President**Kamala Harris** , during a visit to the Silver State, said: "What you are doing at the statewide level is so important... Nevada is showing the way."

* Colorado Democrats — led by EMILYs List-endorsed women including state Sen.**Julie Gonzales** , Sen. **Sonya Jaquez Lewis** , Rep.**Meg Froelich** , and Rep.**Brianna Titone** — recently passed a package of pro-choice bills, including an out-of-state protection law similar to Nevada's. Since abortion is either banned or under threat in most of its surrounding states, this legislation helps cement Colorado as an **abortion refuge** for people across the West and Southwest.

* Finally, in New Mexico, pro-choice champion and longtime EMILYs List candidate Gov. **Michelle Lujan Grisham** recently signed a bill into law that prohibits _any_ interference with an individual's access not only to reproductive care — including abortion — but also to gender-affirming care.

When Democratic pro-choice women have a seat at the table, better decisions get made. That's the whole reason EMILYs List exists, and it's why we work so hard, year after year and cycle after cycle, to elect and reelect women who make our country better. ****Donate now to help fuel this work, hit our $150,000 End-of-Month goal, and support hundreds of women fighting to protect choice nationwide:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Ending-April-Strong](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62516191/403715006/1957298150?sourceid=1049980&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTQ3YTZjZS1hNmU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-aE7iYYTZPMoRx_rGs7qn4pZjwHNyB-He1wif5Qpygo=&emci=eb47a6ce-a6e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f547a6ce-a6e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you and have a great weekend,

Sarah Curmi (she/her/hers)
Vice President of State & Local Campaigns, EMILYs List
** ** ****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62516197/403715012/1957298150?sourceid=1049980&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTQ3YTZjZS1hNmU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-aE7iYYTZPMoRx_rGs7qn4pZjwHNyB-He1wif5Qpygo=&emci=eb47a6ce-a6e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f547a6ce-a6e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** **** ****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62516200/403715015/-42672674?sourceid=1049980&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTQ3YTZjZS1hNmU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-aE7iYYTZPMoRx_rGs7qn4pZjwHNyB-He1wif5Qpygo=&emci=eb47a6ce-a6e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f547a6ce-a6e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** ********

body:
My name is Natalie Jenkins, and I’m proud to introduce myself as Andrea’s campaign manager!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62516610/403716361/-388004332?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.29_b1_njvasfcdc_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmFiNzQ1ZS1hN2U2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygHrHxrPeMNHjOfFvvymeYVRBnOgGCcTnB083JV4dWI=)

Hi there, My name is Natalie Jenkins, and I’m proud to introduce myself as Andrea’s campaign manager! In a moment I’m going to tell you why I’m so excited to be part of Team Salinas, but first, I have an important ask for you. **[Our 2024 race is heating up and garnering attention from the national GOP. Can you chip in today to help us reach our $5,000 April fundraising goal and ensure our team is able to respond to their attacks and reelect Andrea?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62516620/403716363/-388004332?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.29_b1_njvasfcdc_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmFiNzQ1ZS1hN2U2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygHrHxrPeMNHjOfFvvymeYVRBnOgGCcTnB083JV4dWI=)** **Friend, I’m on Andrea’s team because I believe in the vision she has for Oregon and for our country.** I grew up in Oregon and I couldn’t be more excited to be back in my home state working with Andrea as she fights for a stronger, more equitable future. name: Summer Lee
subject: Justice Democrats’ fundraising goal
body:
#
Summer Lee here — Congresswoman for PA-12 and proud Justice Democrat.
Our political system isn’t designed for people like me to run — and win. Justice Democrats recruited me to run for Congress and supported my campaign from the very beginning.
JD is now facing millions of dollars from the political establishment this campaign cycle. Moderate PAC is planning to raise and spend $20 million dollars to try and stop Justice Democrats from supporting more candidates like me.
But JD’s fundraising has declined so far this year and now they need your support to catch up and reach their critical end-of-month goal.
[**Will you rush a $3 donation to help JD fight back against the political establishment that is desperate to keep its entrenched incumbents in power?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134229?refcode=em20230429-28713&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=28713%2E1203867%2E2TGUfp)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134229?refcode=em20230429-28713&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=28713%2E1203867%2E2TGUfp)**
Peter, JD is working every single day to transform the Democratic Party to actually work for the people of this country and not corporations and big donors — and every single grassroots contribution helps to power their work.
We are in a fight for the soul of the Democratic Party and the other side has millions of dollars at their disposal and money from corporate PACs.
We have people like you who are willing to contribute what they can afford because they believe in the issues we’re fighting for. When hundreds of people step up and chip in $5, $20, or even $50 it really adds up.
[**Can you donate $3, or any amount you can, to make sure JD reaches its April fundraising goal before midnight tomorrow?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134229?refcode=em20230429-28713&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=28713%2E1203867%2E2TGUfp)**
Solidarity forever,
Summer Lee
Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=22&akid=28713%2E1203867%2E2TGUfp) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=23&akid=28713%2E1203867%2E2TGUfp) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230429-28713-footer&t=24&refcode2=28713_1203867_2TGUfp&akid=28713%2E1203867%2E2TGUfp)**
---
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

clean_body: Summer Lee here — Congresswoman for PA-12 and proud Justice Democrat. Our political system isn’t designed for people like me to run — and win. Justice Democrats recruited me to run for Congress and supported my campaign from the very beginning. JD is now facing millions of dollars from the political establishment this campaign cycle. Moderate PAC is planning to raise and spend $20 million dollars to try and stop Justice Democrats from supporting more candidates like me. But JD’s fundraising has declined so far this year and now they need your support to catch up and reach their critical end-of-month goal. Peter, JD is working every single day to transform the Democratic Party to actually work for the people of this country and not corporations and big donors — and every single grassroots contribution helps to power their work. We are in a fight for the soul of the Democratic Party and the other side has millions of dollars at their disposal and money from corporate PACs. We have people like you who are willing to contribute what they can afford because they believe in the issues we’re fighting for. When hundreds of people step up and chip in $5, $20, or even $50 it really adds up. Solidarity forever, Summer Lee Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the and your state public health department. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources. JusticeDemocrats.com 10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932 Email us: mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Team Kilmer
subject: Making sure you didn't miss Derek's latest report from D.C.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Re: The GOP's budget proposal

Peter,

Derek wants to make sure you didn't miss yesterday's note.

**[He's working to protect crucial programs from the GOP's senseless budget cuts. Read his message below, then chip in $5 before tomorrow's end-of-month deadline to help Derek fight for Washington families in D.C.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62517082/403718231/1071353790?refcode=em23_230429_eom2_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230429_eom2_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=9ac27553-a8e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWFjMjc1NTMtYThlNi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M0aRcqO-Wv9ddQLr-cCT0QPuirM0MIX5_Qfc8ETtP1Y=)**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Derek Kilmer
Date: Fri, April 28, 2023
Subject: McCarthy and his allies are threatening our economy
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62517083/403718232/1071353790?refcode=em23_230429_eom2_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230429_eom2_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=9ac27553-a8e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWFjMjc1NTMtYThlNi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M0aRcqO-Wv9ddQLr-cCT0QPuirM0MIX5_Qfc8ETtP1Y=)
Team,

If you served this country, Congress should have your back.
If you're a federal worker, a teacher, a senior, or a parent trying to make ends meet for your family, Congress should have your back.
**If you're an American,_Congress should have your back._**

But instead of investing in the people they were elected to serve, D.C. Republicans are trying to cut crucial programs for working families while giving handouts to corporations and the wealthy. **The American people deserve better.**

The GOP's shameful budget proposal is a reminder of what happens when the person holding the gavel doesn't put Americans first. It's why I'm fighting back alongside my Democratic colleagues in the House to make sure Americans' best interests are a top priority.

**And it's why I'm ready to roll up my sleeves and help retake the House majority in 2024. I need to know if you're with me, team.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $5 to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal before Sunday's deadline? Together, we can build up the resources needed to retake the People's House and put the American people back in the driver's seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62517084/403718233/1071353790?refcode=em23_230429_eom2_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230429_eom2_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=9ac27553-a8e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWFjMjc1NTMtYThlNi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M0aRcqO-Wv9ddQLr-cCT0QPuirM0MIX5_Qfc8ETtP1Y=)**

I've _always_ been guided by the principle that I will work with anyone, anywhere, to make progress for the American people. But I refuse to budge on a proposal that could result in three-quarters of a million Americans losing their jobs.

The GOP wants us to forget that they raised the debt ceiling THREE times for the last administration. They want to hold our economy hostage and threaten a default.

These political games have lasting consequences. I refuse to sit on the sidelines when people's livelihoods are on the chopping block.

**[Every penny we raise before important deadlines like this one will go toward helping my re-election and the effort to take back the House majority. If you can afford to, please pitch in $1, $5, or whatever you can to help get Congress working for the people again.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62517085/403718234/1071353790?refcode=em23_230429_eom2_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230429_eom2_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=9ac27553-a8e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWFjMjc1NTMtYThlNi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M0aRcqO-Wv9ddQLr-cCT0QPuirM0MIX5_Qfc8ETtP1Y=)**

I appreciate your support. As always, it's an honor to serve you,

Derek

Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62517086/403718235/1071353790?refcode=em23_230429_eom2_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230429_eom2_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=9ac27553-a8e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWFjMjc1NTMtYThlNi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M0aRcqO-Wv9ddQLr-cCT0QPuirM0MIX5_Qfc8ETtP1Y=)
---

* * *
Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
---
People for Derek Kilmer
PO Box 1381
Tacoma, WA 98402
United States

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Katie could use your help—here’s why:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We’ll cut the BS and tell you exactly why reaching our $250,000 goal is so important.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=22063%2E3422442%2ExocLXR)
Our April end-of-month deadline is coming up tomorrow, 4/30, and Katie could really use your help reaching our $250,000 email fundraising goal.
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230429-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAG29_1_EOM_20230429_V1_F&refcode2=22063_3422442_xocLXR&akid=22063%2E3422442%2ExocLXR)**
It’s Saturday, so we’ll cut the BS and tell you exactly why reaching our $250,000 goal is so important, Derek:
* Recent statewide polls have Katie just two points behind the frontrunner, but they show us leading by nine points in the area she currently represents in Congress. **This shows that when Katie is able to introduce herself to voters, we gain a clear advantage. Your donations help us do that.**
* Running a campaign in the most populous state with some of the country’s most expensive media markets simply takes a lot of resources. **Meeting this goal will help us stay on track and plan for the tough race ahead.**
* There’s a saying in politics. “Early money is like yeast, it helps the dough rise.” Your early contributions will help us make crucial campaign investments, which will have a larger impact if we start now. **That means your donation will go a lot further if you make it today**.

[**Can you chip in $5 before tomorrow’s deadline?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230429-1?refcode=EMAG29_1_EOM_20230429_V1_F&refcode2=22063_3422442_xocLXR&akid=22063%2E3422442%2ExocLXR)
Thanks a ton!
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAG29_1_EOM_20230429_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=22063_3422442_xocLXR&akid=22063%2E3422442%2ExocLXR)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=22063%2E3422442%2ExocLXR)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=22063%2E3422442%2ExocLXR)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Biz, NDRC President
subject: There is literally nothing scarier to Republicans than people being able to vote.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
That should tell you all you need to know.
|
---

Make no mistake team: At this moment, we’re engaged in a fight for democracy against extremists who are pushing for authoritarianism.

GOP politicians across the country are pushing through rigged maps, restricting access to the ballot box, supporting election deniers for key offices, and even ejecting duly-elected lawmakers from office. **It’s clear there is literally nothing scarier to Republicans than people being able to vote – and that should tell you all you need to know.

[_The NDRC is committed to combating these GOP efforts to undermine our democracy, and our work simply would not be possible without this incredible grassroots team. If you’re with us, will you donate today to help us continue fighting for fairness?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62517421/403719383/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230429_FR_4M_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJjNTI1YTA1LWE5ZTYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZlVSVnrFgltkj8jxKzU2N1WYRuP9pfyEe1JYtJCol3I=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Democracy is designed for voters to hold the power to choose their leaders. But when Republicans use tactics like gerrymandering and voter suppression, it silences the people’s voice. After all, politicians don’t feel accountable to the people when they can win majority power with a minority of votes.

**By supporting the NDRC’s democracy-saving work, you can help hand power back to the people – where it belongs. clean_body: | = Here we go, Peter. The first Republican candidate just announced their campaign to challenge Eric Sorensen in Illinois' 17th District! While 2024 may seem like a ways off, the GOP is wasting no time trying to flip this seat red. We had a hunch this was coming, but an early challenge means we'll need to spend even more time defending against attacks. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Experts from all over agree that IL-17 will be one of the closest races in the entire country. In the last election, the GOP's network of super PACs spent millions against us, and we were outraised by our opponent significantly. Eric still came out on top, but only by a few percentage points. We say this a lot, but it bears repeating: grassroots support from individual donors like YOU was our best_ firewall against the GOP’s attacks. It’s literally how we won this seat, and if we’re going to keep it, we’ll need that same level of support. = Let's go, Team Sorensen = | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. Friend, we got to breathe a rare sigh of relief last week when the Supreme Court preserved access to mifepristone for the time being.

But let's be clear: this legal fight is far from over, and the fact we're having a debate about access to abortion medication illustrates just how far the Republicans want to take things.

**Overturning _Roe v. Wade_ wasn't their endgame — their goal is a full nationwide abortion ban, and ending access to commonly-used abortion medication like mifepristone would be the next step towards that. **

**[I will fight for federal legislation to restore the right to choose every day that I'm in office, but I'm going to be facing a tough re-election in my swing district. Will you donate right now to ensure that the people of VA-10 have a champion for reproductive freedom in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62517680/403720170/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230429EOM1_EOM_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTM5MzAwNS1hYWU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i-kZn4WhX9a-_c71Pf6tYxX2n4t8C5Is1anWg8RsMUY=) ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62517681/403720171/-772585877?express_lane=true&refcode=EM_FR_230429EOM1_EOM_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_EB10&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTM5MzAwNS1hYWU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i-kZn4WhX9a-_c71Pf6tYxX2n4t8C5Is1anWg8RsMUY=)**

**The only way to stop them is with a strong pro-choice majority in Congress that can legislatively codify abortion rights.**

The work of winning that majority needs to start now, Friend, and securing a swing district line mine early on in the cycle is a key part of that.

name: Han, Team Lateefah
subject: It’s going to take a lot to win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
We're facing an end-of-month deadline tomorrow at midnight.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=20%2E1163%2E-Qc5or)
Hey, it's Han -- Lateefah's Political Director and the newest member of the campaign.
I've worked on campaigns in the Bay Area before -- knocking on 80,000+ doors in just one election to meet people where they're at and connect with voters to win their support.
**It's going to take a lot to send Lateefah to Congress to fight for all of us. But I know this team has what it takes.**
We're facing an end-of-month deadline tomorrow at midnight, and we need all the resources we can get to plan our ground game and build this movement.
**[So I have to ask: Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help us reach our $17,000 April end-of-month goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230429-1&refcode=em20230429-1?refcode2=20_1163_-Qc5or&akid=20%2E1163%2E-Qc5or)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230429-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230429-1&refcode2=20_1163_-Qc5or&akid=20%2E1163%2E-Qc5or)**
I'm proud to work for Lateefah for myriad reasons -- but especially because when she wins, it'll be a win for every single community in the East Bay. She has a proven record of public service and will bring _all_ of our voices with her to Capitol Hill.
To get her there, we're going to knock doors, make phone calls, and get the word out every way we can. And we'll need your help.
**[So before our deadline in less than 48 hours, rush a contribution to help us hit our end-of-month fundraising goal »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230429-1&refcode=em20230429-1?refcode2=20_1163_-Qc5or&akid=20%2E1163%2E-Qc5or)**
Appreciate all of you -- you'll be hearing more from us soon!
Thank you,
Han Zou, Political Director
Lateefah Simon for Congress

The race to succeed Adam Schiff in CA-30 is shaping up to become one of the most competitive House races in the state -- if not the entire country.

Voters in our community will elect a new representative for the first time in two decades, which gives us a rare chance to set the tone about the type of leadership we need to see in Congress today.

name: Team Tuberville
subject: quick question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Take a stand to protect our liberty and way of life. RESPOND NOW >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/ed95981080860e20/21dfe65cbaeb83eec3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter,

We’ll keep this quick today. We’re reaching out directly because it’s been a while since we’ve heard from you.

The battleground map is set and we have an incredible opportunity to Save the Senate.

**But we need EVERY conservative on board as we lead the fight.**

name: Senator Heidi Campbell
subject: It’s no secret, Peter 🤫
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230428_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230428_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Peter,
It’s no secret that our state government is undermining Nashville’s power.
That’s why it’s more important than ever to elect a mayor who has the knowledge, temperament, and relationships to get the best possible results for Nashville., Peter.
I know that I’m the best candidate to lead Nashville through these challenging times, but I can’t get there alone, Peter.
We are just ONE DAY away from our end of month fundraising deadline and we still need to hit our grassroots contribution target. Can my team and I count on you to chip in to help me fight for Nashville’s working families as mayor? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230428_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
CHIP IN NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230428_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
This is truly a people-powered, grassroots campaign and I’m fighting to make Nashville more inclusive and affordable for all residents.
When I’m not in session, I’m working for our city and having conversations with Nashvillians. Everyone I talk to is concerned about the alarming government overreach from our state.
Our community is ready to get behind a former small-town mayor, a singer/songwriter, and a state senator who will defend our city and lead with compassion and integrity as Nashville’s next mayor.
We’re going to win this election because everyday Nashvillians are fueling our campaign. SUNDAY at MIDNIGHT we hit our End of Month Fundraising Deadline. Whether it’s $5 or $35, will you please be part of our movement to put Nashville first by helping us reach our fundraising goal? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230428_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]

Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.

I know that I’m the best candidate to lead Nashville through these challenging times, but I can’t get there alone, Peter. We are just ONE DAY away from our end of month fundraising deadline and we still need to hit our grassroots contribution target. Can my team and I count on you to chip in to help me fight for Nashville’s working families as mayor? Hi friend —
With less than 48 hours remaining in the month, I am reaching out to you and this team to ask if you can help me reach a critical goal that my team has set.
Yesterday, my finance director came to me in an honest fashion and told me that we are not where we need to be for the month if we want to continue to be running our campaign.
We are tracking behind our April fundraising goal and need to raise $2,000 before the end of the month.
This news was difficult to hear, but I knew what I needed to do.
So I am reaching out to you because I know I can count on you.
[**Will you please make a $3 contribution to my campaign for Congress before my end of month deadline at midnight tomorrow night?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62519272/403726177/28553130?refcode2=1b8f2954-afe6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&refcode=em230429-1-t1a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjhmMjk1NC1hZmU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U6THT3LTa7wSr2jozuAPkKe58Cp8fViK3Q-rpdGwOow=)

This is not the news I wanted to share with you today. But I know that being honest and transparent is the only way we can get where we need to be.
So whatever amount you can give — whether that be $5, $25, or $100 — it will matter. Because each dollar will help me continue to fight for working families in California and support Democrats across the country to win back the House majority.
[**If you can, please make a contribution of $3, or whatever you can afford today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62519293/403726180/28553130?refcode2=1b8f2954-afe6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&refcode=em230429-1-t1a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjhmMjk1NC1hZmU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U6THT3LTa7wSr2jozuAPkKe58Cp8fViK3Q-rpdGwOow=)
Thank you,
Robert Garcia

name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: We're coming up a little short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
With your support, we can keep our purple district blue and win back the Democratic House majority. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62519344/403726265/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDhmMjk1NC1hZmU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l8bPKV2QOts5iGPjs_kmbuyw0t7aagS65c8e-AiHCdQ=&emci=1ff8a0de-e6e5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=108f2954-afe6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Tomorrow at midnight, we'll be closing the books on our April fundraising, but we are still coming up a bit short of our online goal. It's important we reach this goal, and here's why:

After a hard-fought win last year, Republicans are already gearing up to flip Washington's 8th District red in 2024. Already, Kim has one Republican challenger, the NRCC listed WA-08 as a top target, and election experts are saying WA-08 only "leans Democratic" in 2024.

So we're in for another tough fight, and your support is critical to keeping Kim in Congress, Peter.

name: Andy Beshear
subject: We're entering the next phase of the race.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
The May 16 primary is coming up, and I need to be prepared to face whoever comes out on top. Peter — We've been preparing for months for this moment. The GOP primary is right around the corner, and we need to be ready to face whoever comes out on top.

Once the Republican primary is decided, the GOP and their outside groups will rally behind the winner and ramp up their attacks to defeat me. That means millions of dollars flowing into Kentucky, ads flooding the airwaves, and the full power of the Republican party trying to stop the progress we've made.

This is where the rubber meets the road, and I'm calling on this team to make a final push before our final pre-primary reporting deadline. [**Peter, if you can, please chip in any amount and help me prepare for the next stage of this election. subject: Equality for all, women controlling their bodies, voting rights, gun safety and more could be imperiled in a few weeks in Pennsylvania.
body:
May 16th special election
| | | | |

| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2337313a-646f-4b1e-962d-c4559cccc119/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, [**Equality for all, women controlling their bodies, voting rights, gun safety and more could be imperiled in a few weeks in Pennsylvania.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfe43e218-ca8f-4734-b803-39dd975a1342/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Democrats won a majority in the PA House of Representatives this past election, part of a blue tsunami that crashed through The Keystone State in the midterms!_**_It gave us this incredible image of the first woman to become Speaker in PA's 200+ year history._** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5030867a-fd48-4476-ae33-c5bbb568559f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_But in mere few weeks there are 2 special elections for open seats. With only a one-seat margin, if GOPers win both, they take control of the PA House of Representatives. __It would be a disaster, removing our Speaker, shutting down all progressive Governor Josh Shapiro wants to do and harming the 13 million Americans living there. And the_** _ _**_tens of millions who live in surrounding states impacted by how PA regulates guns, pollution of air and water and more. What happens in PA doesn't stay there--air & bullets don't see state lines._** _This is why we must support Heather Boyd, whose campaign centerpiece is "protecting women's bodily autonomy" and Trevor S. Finn, who promises to put the lives of children ahead of allowing criminals to conceal carry guns._ **_We can't let Republicans win back the chamber._** [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Democrats Heather Boyd & Trevor S. Finn to protect 13 million Pennsylvanians and tens of millions of additional Americans from being forced into a hell of MAGA Republicanism?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce698987-e7d7-4cc3-9696-576cdbaa6251/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you for always fighting the fights that matter!** Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tced54da3-dba1-4404-a908-009ede89bfff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Team Durbin
subject: What our progress so far means – and what comes next:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
We have the chance to continue this progress and keep our momentum going, but we need your help.
#
Peter,
**First** , Democrats held the Senate in 2020 and 2022 – thanks to support from folks like you who made it happen and stopped Mitch McConnell from becoming Senate Majority Leader.
**Then** , Senator Durbin and the Senate Judiciary Committee confirmed more than 100 of President Biden’s judicial nominees, bringing an unprecedented amount of experience and diversity to the federal benches.
**Now** , we have the chance to continue this progress and keep our momentum.
**[But first, we’re up against tomorrow’s end-of-month deadline – and we need your help. Will you chip in $5 before midnight Sunday?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62519677/403727030/1431159495?refcode=dd_em_230429_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMThmMjk1NC1hZmU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vAwbwpiWu5AFi_I_yuN8ncBTrJqiX9fOPGmEtFdCqq4=)**
Despite Republican opposition, under Senator Durbin’s leadership the Senate Judiciary Committee has made monumental progress to ensure that our bench is filled with highly-qualified judges who will serve the American people.
But there’s still more work to be done – and if Republicans get their way they’ll end our efforts towards transparency and accountability in our judicial system. If we want to see a fair and balanced system, we cannot let that happen.
**[All of our work – and more – hinges on being able to build on the progress we’ve made so far – which is why we’ve set a goal of raising $10,000 before our end-of-month deadline tomorrow at midnight. If you can, pitch in $5 to help us get there.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62519683/403727048/1431159495?refcode=dd_em_230429_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMThmMjk1NC1hZmU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vAwbwpiWu5AFi_I_yuN8ncBTrJqiX9fOPGmEtFdCqq4=)**
Thank you,

clean_body: We have the chance to continue this progress and keep our momentum going, but we need your help. Peter, First , Democrats held the Senate in 2020 and 2022 – thanks to support from folks like you who made it happen and stopped Mitch McConnell from becoming Senate Majority Leader. Then , Senator Durbin and the Senate Judiciary Committee confirmed more than 100 of President Biden’s judicial nominees, bringing an unprecedented amount of experience and diversity to the federal benches. Now , we have the chance to continue this progress and keep our momentum. = Despite Republican opposition, under Senator Durbin’s leadership the Senate Judiciary Committee has made monumental progress to ensure that our bench is filled with highly-qualified judges who will serve the American people. But there’s still more work to be done – and if Republicans get their way they’ll end our efforts towards transparency and accountability in our judicial system. If we want to see a fair and balanced system, we cannot let that happen. = Thank you, Team Durbin ** ****=**** Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=237%2E35263%2EpTwvjQ ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

With the first end-of-month deadline of Tammy’s reelection campaign about
24 hours away, we wanted to share some critical facts with you:

FACT: Elections in Wisconsin aren’t easily won. Last year, Republicans won
the U.S. Senate race by just one point. And two years earlier, President
Biden won the state by even less than that.

FACT: Mitch McConnell needs to flip just two seats to reclaim the Senate
majority. And with Wisconsin being one of his main targets, we are
preparing for an extremely competitive (and expensive) race.

FACT: This is our first monthly deadline since Tammy announced her
reelection campaign. So our team is working around the clock to ensure we
have the resources needed to take on the GOP and defend Tammy’s seat
through thick and thin.

FACT: Reaching our goals every month is critical if we want to build a
winning campaign. So we need your help to power us to victory.

FACT: If everyone reading this email chips in a little bit, we’ll
definitely reach our end-of-month goal in no time. [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230429_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=237%2E35263%2EpTwvjQ ]Peter,

Americans have been paying into Social Security for _generations, _knowing they could rely on it to support their retirement and help them pay their bills.

**But GOP leaders are scheming to cut funding for Social Security and raise the age for eligibility, leaving millions of Americans in the lurch. **
You read that right, friend. The same party that pushes tax cuts for the megarich ALSO wants to slash everyday Americans' retirement. **Make no mistake:****This is no ordinary budget cut. This is the GOP stealing from those who have paid into the program for _years._**

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Breakfast every Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Please, give what you can right now so Joe and Kamala’s team can make the early investments it will take to win. | | |
---
Peter, I’ve been privileged to work with Joe Biden for more than three decades. **[In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make your first contribution to the re-election campaign, but first, let me tell you why I’m supporting Joe myself.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wWavwmYleM7LIzVMyYnjqxlkygxJ6axlkOHGseOiruPfX9v2OZtGTW4PwObdm9dwx1sbSysmHH6o0_Imvje8fYo8rO417wZgWRzoIwKakh9mRI0ZKBGrPsnswPL6IWfAlGOrGUTlOJ4CZeMeWOUINdmuDAsUYJ6o1Y2jIGuBuB3c65R1JzelS9mtit_h4iU0UTg73RnQsc1SmPl-tOpswJco8L4L2GfnAMwG-hz0m3Ce6DS9ILyJCTqKbSoIMTmneTi0WLuK6Xyj9jkIve8VGD5r-h46QLh6RTcY8U01dm7yYG-KuuStliJnUx-ZY8uf86RhAT4AfyrxxRuCsT1POHiXMoZ65OYwkEjNpzO9huqHNZPrAxT3qKy83D-pPKH1uSdwyWeqCsTu_tUhs9sh9LpCiG_R20ELh3gIPgLVpBLWsvQU6Hw4T-8HxFmaHjGwq7GXe6X_0EGYHFTaXP5OMsjT8bICFreeYwliBITPVeLuQGFBnVBm94L9u9ui1ArWoxvR8HFvAQTyNFbr0ItZSS1ISK-ueWspXogwG5TUbECd7qao-XHKEnE76_O2uHFw8/3vr/vTlJUBtZTuSlNI90dUW6dQ/h0/b3o1yUqWxLDGHYBmtyolPzabHqn6iYfxgKmPYRI8zqo)** When I was Secretary of State and Joe was Vice President, we had a standing date for breakfast every Tuesday. I’d go over to his house, and we’d sit down and talk about what was going on, the challenges we were facing, and what was coming up. We also talked about our families -- both of us with roots in Scranton, Pennsylvania -- and our life stories. So I've been not only a colleague of Joe Biden's, I've also been a friend of his -- and I can tell you that he and Kamala will continue to rise to the challenges of our time. But they need our support to finish the job of making our country a better and more fair place to live, work, and raise a family. **I hope you’ll join me in doing everything we can to get Joe and Kamala reelected. If you’re with me, please make a donation of $25 to become a Founding Donor right now, and the campaign will send your membership card in the mail:**

clean_body: Please, give what you can right now so Joe and Kamala’s team can make the early investments it will take to win. | | | Peter, I’ve been privileged to work with Joe Biden for more than three decades. When I was Secretary of State and Joe was Vice President, we had a standing date for breakfast every Tuesday. I’d go over to his house, and we’d sit down and talk about what was going on, the challenges we were facing, and what was coming up. We also talked about our families -- both of us with roots in Scranton, Pennsylvania -- and our life stories. So I've been not only a colleague of Joe Biden's, I've also been a friend of his -- and I can tell you that he and Kamala will continue to rise to the challenges of our time. But they need our support to finish the job of making our country a better and more fair place to live, work, and raise a family. I hope you’ll join me in doing everything we can to get Joe and Kamala reelected. If you’re with me, please make a donation of $25 to become a Founding Donor right now, and the campaign will send your membership card in the mail: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | I've learned a lot in my years on the campaign trail. One thing will always ring true: Early support from a grassroots team is critical. Having a strong grassroots team behind them will mean that Joe and Kamala can focus on getting their message out far and wide about everything they’ve done to rebuild the middle class, lower costs for families, and more. Thank you -- I’m proud to stand alongside you in this fight. Hillary Hillary Clinton | If you would like to unsubscribe from emails like these, Paid for by Biden for President.

name: News Update
subject: The facts speak for themselves.
body:
| | | _We wanted to bring you an update from Washington, where Republicans are fighting for you. _ This week, House Republicans pushed teachers union president Randi Weingarten on her role in keeping schools closed during COVID. Weingarten coordinated with Biden’s CDC in early 2021 to keep **THOUSANDS** of schools closed and kids at home. **_These school closures have left our children so far behind they may NEVER catch up._** Nearly half of public school students are performing below grade level in at least one subject. But despite her role in the education crisis we’re now facing, Weingarten **COULDN’T EVEN REMEMBER** when she first made contact with the CDC on school reopening guidance. **[WATCH NOW>>](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=4f80aa25023349f492a350f389e348fd&_e=sPCS2UqPGRHHNYG4W8C2E0qiKKfiIYtQkEmKAdWRkhgrIsV-soxw6P82av1xqO6I7_hNjitucbHfZuzCPd3OGGX2fT7GnT8PtRRl9NTdA1kKDPiFVmjeYjIWSXEvJheLJWWsE3yF0z7AHBfbQnLsm6ZBU8k1fcJjogZ_kMXtO2XtO13FBaPVWQC8gCInDx7hMOCgTPBAVfDtCs8iLEUuMZyLR1VW-aoEdRN34PDZm8Cd9gw8J5aDYB1M6avuDyLG)** **_"I'm 65-years-old. I don't remember everything anymore."_** _Weingarten may not be able to remember, but our kids will never forget. Our country and our children deserve better!_
---

name: Collin Steele
subject: Hard to believe, but 3 people have filed to run against Lizzie
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
The Texas primary is less than a year away and three opponents have filed paperwork to run against Lizzie.
It reminds me a lot of the first time I was on #TeamLizzie for her 2018 election. Lizzie won a competitive primary and runoff that year, defeating seven candidates. She went on to flip TX-7 from Red to Blue for the first time ever, delivering a key win for the new Democratic House majority.
We take nothing for granted, and will work just as hard this year as we did then. We’re counting on supporters like you to get involved. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230428?refcode=folf230428]
We need to talk to voters about the great job Lizzie is doing for our district in Congress—like her efforts to protect access to reproductive care and medication and protecting Social Security and Medicare from Republican attacks.
We need to be prepared to run a strong campaign in 2024, and reaching our fundraising goals is key to making that happen.
Our first deadline of the quarter is tomorrow, and I’d really appreciate any amount you can contribute. Contributions—big and small—make a difference as we prepare our campaign for the primary. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230428?refcode=folf230428]
Talk soon,
Collin

name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! Next steps to Raise the Wage state by state, new endorsements, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Raise the Wage with US Rep. Schakowsky | Progressive Power in
Texas with Teri Castillo | OR Board Member Jorden Giger for South Bend
Council | RSVP: Medical Debt Kick-Off | Bernie HELP Poster | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1011&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

Bernie Sanders is taking on Big Pharma, union-busters, and other powerful
special interests as the Chairman of the HELP Committee.

If you agree with Bernie that billionaires shouldn't be able to buy
political power, chip in $15 here (or $10 recurring) to help us have his
back and we'll send you this new Bernie HELP poster!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8634?t=1012&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]GET YOUR POSTER

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1013&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

Our Revolution is mounting a massive campaign to End Medical Debt, and
we’re teaming up with US Rep. Ro Khanna and our coalition of patient
advocates to do it.

Join our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1014&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]Live National Town Hall on May 8th at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT to
hear directly from Our Revolution activists who are bravely speaking out
about their own medical debt and organizing for a cure.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1015&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]RSVP FOR THE TOWN HALL

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1016&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1017&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

As you know, Our Revolution and One Fair Wage are working hard to raise
wages and end the subminimum wage in cities, counties, and states around
the country. And, as wages go up, we don’t want to leave any group of
workers behind!

On Monday, US Rep. Jan Schakowsky (D-IL) and OFW President Saru Jayaraman
spoke to thousands of Our Revolution supporters on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8636?t=1018&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]National
Organizing Call on the next steps in Illinois, Ohio, and beyond!

Earlier that day, they joined our organizers and worker activists in the
Chicago Loop to call out the National Restaurant Association — the leading
opponent of higher pay for restaurant workers.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1019&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

The NYT recently exposed the group’s #ServSafeScam by which it collects
workers’ money through food handling certification and uses it to lobby to
keep their wages low.

“The Restaurant Association should not be taking this money as a
‘not-for-profit’ then spending it as if it was their own and using it to
lobby against fair wages,” Rep. Schakowsky said. “I think we should ask
the IRS to investigate that.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8641?t=1020&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]WATCH REP. SCHAKOWSKY’S CLIP HERE

And now, Saru told us, new info is coming out about the lobby’s push to
weaken child labor laws in order to fill gaps left by thousands of
restaurant workers refusing to work for poverty wages post-pandemic.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1021&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

“We’re hearing stories of 11- and 12-year-olds working,” Saru told us
Monday. “And now, we saw the Iowa Senate bill for minors to handle alcohol
— wholly from the Restaurant Association driving this.”

“As horrible as it is, it’s a sign they’re losing and workers are
winning,” she explained. “They’re resorting to this because adults are
refusing to work for $2 and $3 for the first time since Emancipation when
this wage structure was created.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8645?t=1022&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]WATCH SARU’S CLIP HERE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1023&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

We’re on the winning side! Thanks to your support and activism, our bills
are advancing at the city, county, and state levels across the country.

New Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson — who we helped elect last month! — has
come out in a big way to support our Raise the Wage campaign in the city.
And, US Rep. Schakowsky said the Illinois state legislation looks
promising given the Democrats’ supermajority.

Our organizing work in Maryland is also paying off: “It looks like we'll
have the votes to end the subminimum wage in Prince George’s County,” Saru
said.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1024&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

In Chicago this week, IL Rep. Abdelnasser Rashid and Chicago Aldermen and
Cook County Democratic Vice Chair Mike Rodriguez joined us in addressing
the city council to push a city-wide tipped minimum wage ordinance.

And, Our Revolution Field Director Mike Oles and our crew activated our
Raise the Wage Ohio Team at the State House in Columbus on Monday to
launch a new petition for a higher state minimum wage and an end to
subminimum wages.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8637?t=1025&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]If you’re in Ohio, sign up for paid and volunteer opportunities in
this exciting initiative here!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1026&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

The subminimum wage invites wage theft, harassment, and discrimination.
Everyone needs a full minimum wage. Our bill now has 33 cosponsors in the
NY Assembly, and it’s time for the Empire State to step up to the plate.

“NY is our biggest fight,” OFW President Saru Jayaraman said. “Our big
action is set for May 8th with lots of great moms and me getting arrested
in the state capitol in advance of Mother’s Day.”

Our joint action with One Fair Wage will be held at 11:30 am May 8th in
Albany, and we have some special guests who will be announced soon!
There’s also a bus traveling from NYC for folks who are interested!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8628?t=1027&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]JOIN US IN ALBANY

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1028&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

We’re working hard to pass legislation in 11 states - RI, CA, IL, CO, HI,
PR, MA, AZ, ID, MI, and OH. This fight is national, we’ve got to fight it
in every jurisdiction. Plug in by joining our Raise the Wage Team at the
link below.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8222?t=1029&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]HELP RAISE THE WAGE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1030&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1031&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

“Our Revolution’s executive director, Joseph Geevarghese, said local
progressive organizing, from mayor to school board, is more effective now
than it has been in decades,” The [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8638?t=1032&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]Associated Press wrote.

Thanks to our members and volunteers, our 400k voter contact operation
helped propel Mayor Brandon Johnson to victory in Chicago and elect a
progressive trifecta to lead St. Louis.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1033&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

Now, we’re taking that energy to Philadelphia, where Helen Gym is on the
ballot for Philadelphia Mayor on May 16th- along with progressive city
councilor candidates like Amanda McIllmurray.

A former public school teacher and community activist, Helen said on our
recent [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8610?t=1034&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]Live Call: “When we win on the ground in our cities, that’s the
blueprint, because we cannot wait for Congress.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1035&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

Local races are key to moving the progressive movement forward nationally,
Our Revolution executive director Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8639?t=1036&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]Billy Penn.
“City and local governments are laboratories of policy experimentation,”
he said.

Billy Penn highlighted our work to “turn out progressive super voters in
Philadelphia,” where we’ll be mobilizing our 40k members and making 300k
voter contacts over the next couple of weeks.

“Our theory of change,” Joseph said, “is if we can get that slice of the
electorate out, through multiple contacts, that can be a game changer.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8223?t=1037&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1038&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

We’re also investing resources to elect a more progressive City Council to
work with Helen, including Amanda McIllmurray — a working-class organizer
who would be the first openly queer Council Member ever in the city.

In 2016, Amanda was working as a nanny, a law firm clerk, and a softball
umpire when she got involved with the Bernie Sanders presidential campaign
and later started organizing for local power.

“I’m running to win good jobs, affordable housing, worker’s rights, and
universal family care,” Amanda said. As the daughter of union members, she
knows “everyone deserves the chance to have just ONE job, a
family-sustaining job.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1039&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

Our Revolution Board Member and BLM South Bend Co-founder Jorden Giger is
running for City Council in South Bend, Indiana!

Jorden’s community organizing work has helped secure millions in home
repair for low-income communities, led the city’s first racial wealth
divide study, and provided $400k in rental assistance.

“For six years, we’ve been organizing in South Bend to hold our local
government accountable to our low-income communities, raise wages, win
housing, and rein in tax breaks to the wealthy and well-connected,” Jorden
told us on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8636?t=1040&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]Live Call.

“So we decided to run and now we’ve built this coalition of progressive
champions endorsed by Our Revolution and putting forward a unifying agenda
for the city,” he said

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8646?t=1041&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]WATCH JORDEN SPEAK HERE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1042&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

Early voting has started in Texas, and we’re excited to back community
organizer and San Antonio Council Member Teri Castillo for re-election in
District 5!

Teri helped pass a $17.50 minimum wage in the city and worked with the
community to secure permanent affordable housing measures that passed by
one vote on the council.

“We’re bringing more people into the process for solutions on housing,
workers' rights, development, and more,” she said on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8636?t=1043&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]National
Organizing Call on Monday.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8644?t=1044&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]WATCH TERI’S CLIP HERE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1045&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

Also in San Antonio, Our Revolution is also endorsing Jalen
McKee-Rodriguez for re-election to San Antonio City Council (D-2).

Jalen is a former public school teacher, who is dedicated to housing as a
human right and green building to meet the city’s climate goals.

Election Day is May 6th in Texas! We have to make sure that folks who are
willing to stand up don’t lose their bid for re-election for standing
against powerful interests.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1046&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

We have a chance to build more power in Philadelphia and San Antonio! The
best way to make an impact from anywhere in the country is to sign up to
make calls with our team of volunteers.

We can tip the balance in these key down-ballot races that will have a
direct effect on people’s lives. Help us build local power as part of the
Our Revolution Phonebank Force.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4329?t=1047&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]PHONEBANK THIS WEEK!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1048&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1049&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

Don’t miss our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1050&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]Live Town Hall to End Medical Debt this Monday, May 8th
at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT!

We’ll be organizing directly with US Rep. Ro Khanna and our patient
activists, who are bravely speaking out about their medical debt and how
we can cure this sickening injustice in our healthcare system.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1051&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]RSVP FOR THE TOWN HALL

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1052&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

Bernie Sanders is taking on corporate power as the Chairman of the HELP
Committee. To help us have his back, chip in $15 here (or $10 recurring)
and we'll send you this new Bernie HELP poster!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8634?t=1053&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]GET YOUR POSTER

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1054&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

The new Our Revolution Store is open! We’ve got lots of new items — from
hoodies to coffee mugs, even a baby onesie! Grab some gear, make a
statement, and help fund the movement.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8510?t=1055&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]CHECK OUT OUR STORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1056&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

Join our Elect Progressives Team to grow our influence at the state and
local level, where the policies we pass can change lives and change the
national landscape.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8223?t=1057&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]HELP BUILD LOCAL POWER

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1058&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1059&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]Website |

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230429_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.Mc5p48&t=1007&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230429_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.Rzdbq4&t=1008&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230429_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.F7kWHH&t=1009&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230429_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.CHchDn&t=1010&akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59 ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=4230%2E5885482%2ERF3q59

Schakowsky | Progressive Power in Texas with Teri Castillo | OR Board Member Jorden Giger for South Bend Council | RSVP: Medical Debt Kick-Off | Bernie HELP Poster | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Bernie Sanders is taking on Big Pharma, union-busters, and other powerful special interests as the Chairman of the HELP Committee.
