[ ]GET YOUR POSTER ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution is mounting a massive campaign to End Medical Debt, and we’re teaming up with US Rep. Ro Khanna and our coalition of patient advocates to do it. Join our [ ]Live National Town Hall on May 8th at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT to hear directly from Our Revolution activists who are bravely speaking out about their own medical debt and organizing for a cure. [ ]RSVP FOR THE TOWN HALL ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] As you know, Our Revolution and One Fair Wage are working hard to raise wages and end the subminimum wage in cities, counties, and states around the country. And, as wages go up, we don’t want to leave any group of workers behind! On Monday, US Rep. Jan Schakowsky (D-IL) and OFW President Saru Jayaraman spoke to thousands of Our Revolution supporters on our [ ]National Organizing Call on the next steps in Illinois, Ohio, and beyond! Earlier that day, they joined our organizers and worker activists in the Chicago Loop to call out the National Restaurant Association — the leading opponent of higher pay for restaurant workers. [ ][IMG] The NYT recently exposed the group’s #ServSafeScam by which it collects workers’ money through food handling certification and uses it to lobby to keep their wages low. “The Restaurant Association should not be taking this money as a ‘not-for-profit’ then spending it as if it was their own and using it to lobby against fair wages,” Rep. Schakowsky said. “I think we should ask the IRS to investigate that.” [ ]WATCH REP. SCHAKOWSKY’S CLIP HERE And now, Saru told us, new info is coming out about the lobby’s push to weaken child labor laws in order to fill gaps left by thousands of restaurant workers refusing to work for poverty wages post-pandemic. [ ][IMG] “We’re hearing stories of 11- and 12-year-olds working,” Saru told us Monday. “And now, we saw the Iowa Senate bill for minors to handle alcohol — wholly from the Restaurant Association driving this.” “As horrible as it is, it’s a sign they’re losing and workers are winning,” she explained. “They’re resorting to this because adults are refusing to work for $2 and $3 for the first time since Emancipation when this wage structure was created.” [ ]WATCH SARU’S CLIP HERE [ ][IMG] We’re on the winning side! Thanks to your support and activism, our bills are advancing at the city, county, and state levels across the country. New Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson — who we helped elect last month! — has come out in a big way to support our Raise the Wage campaign in the city. And, US Rep. Schakowsky said the Illinois state legislation looks promising given the Democrats’ supermajority. Our organizing work in Maryland is also paying off: “It looks like we'll have the votes to end the subminimum wage in Prince George’s County,” Saru said. [ ][IMG] In Chicago this week, IL Rep. Abdelnasser Rashid and Chicago Aldermen and Cook County Democratic Vice Chair Mike Rodriguez joined us in addressing the city council to push a city-wide tipped minimum wage ordinance. And, Our Revolution Field Director Mike Oles and our crew activated our Raise the Wage Ohio Team at the State House in Columbus on Monday to launch a new petition for a higher state minimum wage and an end to subminimum wages. [ ]If you’re in Ohio, sign up for paid and volunteer opportunities in this exciting initiative here! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] The subminimum wage invites wage theft, harassment, and discrimination. Everyone needs a full minimum wage. Our bill now has 33 cosponsors in the NY Assembly, and it’s time for the Empire State to step up to the plate. “NY is our biggest fight,” OFW President Saru Jayaraman said. “Our big action is set for May 8th with lots of great moms and me getting arrested in the state capitol in advance of Mother’s Day.” Our joint action with One Fair Wage will be held at 11:30 am May 8th in Albany, and we have some special guests who will be announced soon! There’s also a bus traveling from NYC for folks who are interested! [ ]JOIN US IN ALBANY ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] We’re working hard to pass legislation in 11 states - RI, CA, IL, CO, HI, PR, MA, AZ, ID, MI, and OH. This fight is national, we’ve got to fight it in every jurisdiction. Plug in by joining our Raise the Wage Team at the link below. [ ]HELP RAISE THE WAGE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] “Our Revolution’s executive director, Joseph Geevarghese, said local progressive organizing, from mayor to school board, is more effective now than it has been in decades,” The [ ]Associated Press wrote. Thanks to our members and volunteers, our 400k voter contact operation helped propel Mayor Brandon Johnson to victory in Chicago and elect a progressive trifecta to lead St. Louis. [ ][IMG] Now, we’re taking that energy to Philadelphia, where Helen Gym is on the ballot for Philadelphia Mayor on May 16th- along with progressive city councilor candidates like Amanda McIllmurray. A former public school teacher and community activist, Helen said on our recent [ ]Live Call: “When we win on the ground in our cities, that’s the blueprint, because we cannot wait for Congress.” [ ][IMG] Local races are key to moving the progressive movement forward nationally, Our Revolution executive director Joseph Geevarghese told [ ]Billy Penn. “City and local governments are laboratories of policy experimentation,” he said. Billy Penn highlighted our work to “turn out progressive super voters in Philadelphia,” where we’ll be mobilizing our 40k members and making 300k voter contacts over the next couple of weeks. “Our theory of change,” Joseph said, “is if we can get that slice of the electorate out, through multiple contacts, that can be a game changer.” [ ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] We’re also investing resources to elect a more progressive City Council to work with Helen, including Amanda McIllmurray — a working-class organizer who would be the first openly queer Council Member ever in the city. In 2016, Amanda was working as a nanny, a law firm clerk, and a softball umpire when she got involved with the Bernie Sanders presidential campaign and later started organizing for local power. “I’m running to win good jobs, affordable housing, worker’s rights, and universal family care,” Amanda said. As the daughter of union members, she knows “everyone deserves the chance to have just ONE job, a family-sustaining job.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution Board Member and BLM South Bend Co-founder Jorden Giger is running for City Council in South Bend, Indiana! Jorden’s community organizing work has helped secure millions in home repair for low-income communities, led the city’s first racial wealth divide study, and provided $400k in rental assistance. “For six years, we’ve been organizing in South Bend to hold our local government accountable to our low-income communities, raise wages, win housing, and rein in tax breaks to the wealthy and well-connected,” Jorden told us on our [ ]Live Call. “So we decided to run and now we’ve built this coalition of progressive champions endorsed by Our Revolution and putting forward a unifying agenda for the city,” he said [ ]WATCH JORDEN SPEAK HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Early voting has started in Texas, and we’re excited to back community organizer and San Antonio Council Member Teri Castillo for re-election in District 5! Teri helped pass a $17.50 minimum wage in the city and worked with the community to secure permanent affordable housing measures that passed by one vote on the council. “We’re bringing more people into the process for solutions on housing, workers' rights, development, and more,” she said on our [ ]National Organizing Call on Monday. [ ]WATCH TERI’S CLIP HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Also in San Antonio, Our Revolution is also endorsing Jalen McKee-Rodriguez for re-election to San Antonio City Council (D-2). Jalen is a former public school teacher, who is dedicated to housing as a human right and green building to meet the city’s climate goals. Election Day is May 6th in Texas! We have to make sure that folks who are willing to stand up don’t lose their bid for re-election for standing against powerful interests. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] We have a chance to build more power in Philadelphia and San Antonio! The best way to make an impact from anywhere in the country is to sign up to make calls with our team of volunteers. We can tip the balance in these key down-ballot races that will have a direct effect on people’s lives. Help us build local power as part of the Our Revolution Phonebank Force. [ ]PHONEBANK THIS WEEK! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Don’t miss our [ ]Live Town Hall to End Medical Debt this Monday, May 8th at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT! We’ll be organizing directly with US Rep. Ro Khanna and our patient activists, who are bravely speaking out about their medical debt and how we can cure this sickening injustice in our healthcare system. [ ]RSVP FOR THE TOWN HALL ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Bernie Sanders is taking on corporate power as the Chairman of the HELP Committee. To help us have his back, chip in $15 here (or $10 recurring) and we'll send you this new Bernie HELP poster! [ ]GET YOUR POSTER ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] The new Our Revolution Store is open! We’ve got lots of new items — from hoodies to coffee mugs, even a baby onesie! Grab some gear, make a statement, and help fund the movement. [ ]CHECK OUT OUR STORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Join our Elect Progressives Team to grow our influence at the state and local level, where the policies we pass can change lives and change the national landscape. [ ]HELP BUILD LOCAL POWER ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! name: Juliana at United We Dream Action
subject: This is what we’d lose if we lost DACA:
body:
We just published some new findings from a survey of DACA recipients. Here’s how the program has changed lives for the better: | | | Peter, We just published some findings from our latest survey of DACA recipients, and the results speak for themselves. Of the DACA recipients surveyed:
* **90%** are employed or currently in school
* **59%** got their first credit card, **47%** opened a bank account, and **34%** started a retirement account
* Average salaries or annual earnings **more than doubled** since receiving DACA status
* **Over 50%** of respondents bought their first car, and **18%** bought their first house
* **Over 40%** reported their DACA status allowed them to get their first job, switch to a job they were better suited for, increase their earnings, or get better benefits at work

The DACA program has allowed hundreds of thousands of immigrant youth to work and attend school without the threat of deportation — and the benefits have been immeasurable. But currently, DACA is hanging by a thread with new attacks coming every day. **DACA was always meant to be a temporary band-aid fix, but with so much on the line, now is the time for Congress and President Biden to deliver a permanent solution.** If DACA is shut down, **75%** of survey respondents would fear for the physical safety of their families, **63%** would be less likely to continue their education, and many would be less likely to attend public gatherings, report crimes, open a bank account, and more. Losing DACA would be catastrophic for hundreds of millions of immigrants. **So now we’re calling on Congress and President Biden to act NOW to deliver a path to citizenship for all 11 million undocumented folks. Will you donate now to support our fight for permanent protections?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8mx_5ABkFHmeFViL7NEeBD_AogMf18kAB-piHwjkW8FH6O8FR8epomUoSEVFle6mPM-7owVA9D-XYtp1uVNyQj-rHmdFXzl9rkZoQds_Ody7xVc92O1r-pSliR3wDB-S9ANmQR53PvluNzM-AxIt6u5vQyz_134kLCN0wrFkMvE21C8OP2NLG_VQc18lFcvDGjcFejUatsDxq1zgaDiEtqyN_jq-mvrKtJ6tXNGxpbkdnOszVoGSrm6qoM587yz7qMK41BSWah6EeFhTP1Hdd4Bh51JMxSacEE2x8mKV9ZHr2PRLTQ6bSPhQDKbOJEiLJVFRZel23AoJyojnoDxdhv9zSfRiPdPR12yahV-HSZ41uMzVLv1Gy8-pukwGzBPSSXAeTuEeUnrxNiFAbc-7ltgrehfrAVzTM_wuvJSIFb6pUnye9_yj7xdrFx---onrX/3vr/Y9assjqzTEyPZgj2ZGRR3w/h0/lcAt9hYhVr_Cr3ka7S0SXpq5bsp5pqjqX5Zmtx9kaZk)

name: Patty Murray
subject: Let's get this done
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62523536/403739714/-908392379?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk19-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDMyNTU2Ni1iOGU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-hsglm3vBBxekGciQ1YFnyqmENUPvAs-KFJXyDlYQU=)
---
Hi, Peter –

When I talk to people anywhere in Washington state, one of their top worries is finding affordable child care. **This week, I'm proud to have reintroduced the Child Care for Working Families Act to tackle that problem head-on.**
Child care has become flat-out unaffordable. Right now, most Americans are spending at least a _whopping 20% of their income_ on child care. High prices are also forcing employees – especially women – to leave the workforce and stay at home with the kids. Let me be clear: the child care crisis is a serious economic crisis.
Our child care system is collapsing, and right now our government is telling parents "_you're on your own_ " instead of "_we've got your back._ " That's just not right. My bill would change that by making child care way more affordable for families (to the tune of $10 per day for the average family), helping providers stay open and expand slots, and making sure child care workers can earn a living wage.

**Passing this bill isn't just the right thing to do. It's also a smart and necessary investment in our kids and our economy. [If you're with me, can I count on you to chip in $5 now to support my work in the Senate and fix our country's broken child care system?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62523538/403739716/-908392379?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk19-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDMyNTU2Ni1iOGU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-hsglm3vBBxekGciQ1YFnyqmENUPvAs-KFJXyDlYQU=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62523539/403739718/-908392379?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk19-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDMyNTU2Ni1iOGU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-hsglm3vBBxekGciQ1YFnyqmENUPvAs-KFJXyDlYQU=)

clean_body: | | | = Hi, Peter – When I talk to people anywhere in Washington state, one of their top worries is finding affordable child care. This week, I'm proud to have reintroduced the Child Care for Working Families Act to tackle that problem head-on. Child care has become flat-out unaffordable. Right now, most Americans are spending at least a whopping 20% of their income on child care. High prices are also forcing employees – especially women – to leave the workforce and stay at home with the kids. Let me be clear: the child care crisis is a serious economic crisis. Our child care system is collapsing, and right now our government is telling parents "you're on your own " instead of "we've got your back. " That's just not right. My bill would change that by making child care way more affordable for families (to the tune of $10 per day for the average family), helping providers stay open and expand slots, and making sure child care workers can earn a living wage. Passing this bill isn't just the right thing to do. It's also a smart and necessary investment in our kids and our economy. = | | = None of my work is possible without supporters like you. body:
| Hello,

I just got a call from my fundraising team, and to put it simply, **I need your help.** We’re behind on our 1,000 donor planting season goal and need a serious boost in donations today to catch up.

This is the last thing I wanted to hear since Sharla and I are busy finishing up prepping equipment and getting everything ready to start planting. So unless you're willing to get your hands dirty and spend 16 hours on a tractor with us, I need your help chipping in whatever you can.

[**Any amount you can contribute early in the campaign goes a long way in helping us grow our movement and reach these critical fundraising goals. Can I count on you to chip in today?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44241?t=6&akid=7423%2E878179%2EZ1NWFK) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44242?t=7&akid=7423%2E878179%2EZ1NWFK)

Jon

body:
Peter, our 2024 campaign to defeat Rep. Jay Obernolte is off to an incredible start.

Over 100 supporters came out to our kickoffs in Victorville and Redlands. And, grassroots donors from all across America pitched in to launch our campaign strong.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62523679/403740359/-727517715?amount=10&refcode=pl_20230428_14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjIzNTBlNy1iOGU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hEQ6lxssg7Z7NEmdatHXCy8aH2lQE5kBjjtXzVfsYCI=)

I'm not taking any corporate PAC money as I challenge an anti-choice, anti-equality Trump Republican.

clean_body: Peter, our 2024 campaign to defeat Rep. Jay Obernolte is off to an incredible start. Over 100 supporters came out to our kickoffs in Victorville and Redlands. And, grassroots donors from all across America pitched in to launch our campaign strong. = We’re fighting for Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, and an economy that works for all of us. We’re fighting to bring jobs and education to California’s High Desert and our small towns, so that young folks can stay in our communities. And, we’re fighting right-wing attacks on women and LGBTQ+ Americans. Our campaign will defend our reproductive rights, and seek equality for all. I'm not taking any corporate PAC money as I challenge an anti-choice, anti-equality Trump Republican. = In solidarity, Derek Marshall = Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. = To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 (760) 486-2416 Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62523847/403740907/-2015833092?refcode=mw_em_230429_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTQ5OTQxYi1iOWU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mn4TPed7VMPVQK1ojBWtf9JiS4TCVQD1QWtRox-fSiM=) We know it seems early for us to be writing to you about the 2024 election, but Senator Warner understands that **_[**now is the time to start fighting back**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62523848/403740908/-2015833092?refcode=mw_em_230429_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTQ5OTQxYi1iOWU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mn4TPed7VMPVQK1ojBWtf9JiS4TCVQD1QWtRox-fSiM=)_** against the GOP’s war chest of cash, because every single Senate seat we can hold on to and every Republican held seat we can flip are absolutely crucial. And now that President Biden has announced his re-election campaign, the stakes are even higher. Political pundits are already saying the fight for the Senate is going to be a close call – frankly, too close for comfort – in battleground states around the country. We have no other option but to do everything we can now to support Democrats that are committed to defending a woman’s right to choose, to fighting for commonsense gun control, to championing climate change legislation, and much more. **_[**We have to keep the GOP from capturing the Senate majority. And now we have proof... “Biden’s Donors Haven’t Cut Enough Big Checks Yet, Worrying Allies” [Source: Bloomberg] With less than 48 HOURS until the April end-of-month deadline, we have a REAL SHOT at OUTRAISING Crooked Joe during his announcement month! Wouldn’t that be beautiful, Friend? Could you imagine the faces of CNN’s “journalists” when they’re forced to report that we outraised Biden’s swamp donors? As I’ve always said – Crooked Joe’s special interest donors can cut MASSIVE checks – but there will always be MORE OF US than there are of them. Even $1 can OUTRAISE Biden... name: Rep. John Ray Clemmons
subject: Knoxville on my mind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Gloria Johnson Treasurer
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
Like you, I often worry about our state’s future. There is so much at stake for our families, our children and future generations. Something that always inspires me to keep up the fight is gathering with people across our state who share our vision of a brighter future for all Tennessee families.
Some of my House Democratic colleagues and I traveled to Knoxville this week to visit with fellow Democrats and discuss common sense solutions to better protect our children. We talked about the need to fully fund our public schools and better support our teachers so that our kids can learn factual history, science and civics. It was a much-needed, restorative gathering following one of the most harmful legislative sessions we have experienced.
Knoxville is FIRED UP! They are building the foundation and putting in the hard work necessary to elect more Democrats to the Tennessee House. They are determined to elect people who care about others, focus on the issues that actually matter and sincerely want to improve every Tennesseans’ quality of life.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tnhousedems2023]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/68714/images/4.27_27.jpg] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/68714/images/4.27_26.jpg] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/68714/images/4.27_4.jpg]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/68714/images/4.27_12.jpg] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/68714/images/4.27_17.jpg] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/68714/images/4.27_16.jpg]
My role as Caucus Chair is to raise money so we can adequately fund Democratic campaigns, and I am determined to end this Republican supermajority. Thanks to the hard work of our Knox County Democrats, we have multiple opportunities in Knox County, one of which is District 18. The freshman Republican legislator holding that seat has proven herself wholly unfit to serve. She has made it clear she is more focused on fighting a divisive, culture war than engaging in meaningful policymaking. Knoxville deserves better.
Help us make Elaine Davis a one-term representative. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tnhousedems2023]
My tour around the state continues. Please stay tuned in and join me when I come to your town. I want to hear from you!
-Chairman John Ray Clemmons
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tnhousedems2023]

I know they don’t speak for hardworking Americans like you, but if we’re going to have our voices heard, we need to step up and make sure we’re prepared to win in 2024.

I know November 2024 seems far away, but what we do now WILL decide if we take back the Senate or not next year.

With your help, we can lay the groundwork for success - but first, we MUST meet our goal tomorrow.

They’re riling up their base with socialist schemes and abortion on demand, and it’s paying off. I know they don’t speak for hardworking Americans like you, but if we’re going to have our voices heard, we need to step up and make sure we’re prepared to win in 2024. I know November 2024 seems far away, but what we do now WILL decide if we take back the Senate or not next year. With your help, we can lay the groundwork for success - but first, we MUST meet our goal tomorrow. Thank you, Tyler Team Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

body:
| | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTg2n19ru0yBXyiZTiH7dtUIqCFviRutFmfFMdET7B_5_DpkfLPw04cqBm-6USh6IAGS9zNCHeZxmTU592acMTqcBhPWlmJznI39VlvkE0UD3ZTdbOnJvb9o--8MHHJI6lcK47IODZFYurOB6AOFf70Fn85n9Klir8i52amGfGzg0UptCXMKrfyIGVYDi_qzd6wI0FvaqLEB4P_iJPxi500Ls/3vr/Ko0XHhG_RL-gSwd7ytEmQw/h0/SrwF7payYe2SWA4KIsK3jIgWg9x_CK4GK3XvXqG_1F8) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.

[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yDlvnM2jBW9sbXZMScUxaDDAZib5N3I5cZ-7Y6cDGksPKXTlKvsGpCXSzqyy_eJwH5WRhl4jsOTFLOdM1474NNcth7_S9sR22NmZndwJR3bG1-NqVEgUrJmdn_bVl-Jrc1MOYbdkCwHgiIwVim6KJqgmMKPcDENqEZKUFgyQplSBnCg-b9UKUCp8O3lHHK2s6FDxeMgv4QXtZPcOZp3lquYN2XIIm1-hFyshooBTAAtZ1zJ6sGJC3KHvOrxhFOSVq-AqodhpvMR67bdbQxA632xBfCiTA2Igt8D-K_T-00rFMGfjZzevRWFO5GC3cAODBxsVrWdylx6v3fnI9u3YWSGOAEFZDUm_QHaLdpQtJKuh3gqfW-diNhz1X6VLrO5GQ/3vr/Ko0XHhG_RL-gSwd7ytEmQw/h1/JZG7DPcTFIOjOlHC3SP4-3lJKoFkKHvh1g9N65OZYeI)
Hi folks, it’s Raul.

I know campaigns are flooding your inbox right now with donation requests and desperate pleas. **But I just wanted to take a moment, away from all the noise, and just say thank you.**

Your support means everything to our team. And whether you’ve given $1, $25, or even $100 to this campaign, I can’t thank you enough. Your support allows us to fight back against whatever GOP operatives in DC throw at us.

**But I’ll be honest, we’re in the middle of a fundraising lull, and if we can’t hit Sunday’s end-of-month $5,000 fundraising goal, our campaign could be in trouble.** [**So I wanted to reach out to folks like you, friend. clean_body: Deadline: TOMORROW. | This is crunch time, Peter. Our April end-of-month fundraising deadline is at midnight tomorrow, and we’re urgently reaching out to supporters who haven’t yet made a donation = | = Look, we’ve made so much progress for North Carolina in the past few years. Expanding Medicaid. Growing our clean energy economy. Supporting our public schools and teachers. But it’s all on the line. Republicans are determined to roll back our progress and take on culture war issues to attack and divide us. They’ll ban abortion care, undermine our democracy, and dictate how our teachers can teach and what our students can learn. We’re fighting back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you! name: Gary Sinise
subject: These heroes are counting on you
body:
This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.| [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=6dfab3fbce404f0dbca19d8ebd7fc456&_t=2dqMUR07ANEbGvFes5wCQrLPmDMbRQo1ftZi90WzPnfFZuPWWiu7fgF3SDCQ1GcWWjD5p4IB7j_clM_0bxFSaXxCb5q3kxOcn-tXeRPxCCw%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=6dfab3fbce404f0dbca19d8ebd7fc456&_t=2dqMUR07ANEbGvFes5wCQrLPmDMbRQo1ftZi90WzPnfFZuPWWiu7fgF3SDCQ1GcWWjD5p4IB7j_clM_0bxFSaXxCb5q3kxOcn-tXeRPxCCw%3D)

| | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6dfab3fbce404f0dbca19d8ebd7fc456&_e=mH58bMuBZtkk2RSbJq85dZzkjTpFSHRFpkZGKBu8fxfftiLLywreBxd3V-GQznVAxSpyTz3LFqT_NldoohC_tFCdat-oechKwz6B2TLKNOiAvyuQsw_6xuS7yNAuhzF55Ol3gxM6b6bfbi1ZK4bQ7G_axDtcHMROmYEcOSyOaUXIi4PJ8MVFAl10z3GxiqPCXXJq6tz6rY6UvmjNSP1jgTOuT-O1GiByeJoMf-Tfz7gjFFnD2rL1ORcqhJCJnO0ZV6mWFQhphgnD7TuYy9lM2PoZR5LEPluMGZwlHO5ZLMcoSdLtCm8pPzbGawHMjhaA)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6dfab3fbce404f0dbca19d8ebd7fc456&_e=mH58bMuBZtkk2RSbJq85dZzkjTpFSHRFpkZGKBu8fxfftiLLywreBxd3V-GQznVAxSpyTz3LFqT_NldoohC_tFCdat-oechKwz6B2TLKNOiAvyuQsw_6xuS7yNAuhzF55Ol3gxM6b6bfbi1ZK4bQ7G_axDtcHMROmYEcOSyOaUXpyqIj_qHHhUVonotTwCbn4KC6n_sk3OJK2EaWU2uXSVKtQJLdk5dvY6641p1j2bHopa8chwv6EE6F4L84aOaWgKDIuMnKP9Iv9CAyna-2fGHfBFhtqEh8pGe8vjdsvBAV0woMUgM2uAqngC1QYwly)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6dfab3fbce404f0dbca19d8ebd7fc456&_e=mH58bMuBZtkk2RSbJq85dZzkjTpFSHRFpkZGKBu8fxfftiLLywreBxd3V-GQznVAxSpyTz3LFqT_NldoohC_tFCdat-oechKwz6B2TLKNOiAvyuQsw_6xuS7yNAuhzF55Ol3gxM6b6bfbi1ZK4bQ7G_axDtcHMROmYEcOSyOaUWf9YLttYZM1YO_bVswkpmpKaM1forMySWx3MbwlaGopsAYJYI40dsN7KhODNJsNBpkeZrVQRYW140-5mg_mWZGo0fQKpChUs3CXzgWxwoQwbxiAWfY0d-1DyMpJxUIGUqjntWmB8bCPzZm8sNjL-l2)
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6dfab3fbce404f0dbca19d8ebd7fc456&_e=mH58bMuBZtkk2RSbJq85dZzkjTpFSHRFpkZGKBu8fxfftiLLywreBxd3V-GQznVAxSpyTz3LFqT_NldoohC_tFCdat-oechKwz6B2TLKNOiAvyuQsw_6xuS7yNAuhzF55Ol3gxM6b6bfbi1ZK4bQ7G_axDtcHMROmYEcOSyOaUXQMDlr3wO1jCgPe10G58eKqHRRbZx5jgudjw_pMmkOJvJB2oFoGDGltoTzwaUJjAYUZGa0S09qHi2UmGlbgP73I_ox9EmZc8KsQKJocXujWTUm8-2zgMW91oPvLIBtKFxvAadhJTInlRB3W8n0YXQo)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6dfab3fbce404f0dbca19d8ebd7fc456&_e=mH58bMuBZtkk2RSbJq85dZzkjTpFSHRFpkZGKBu8fxfftiLLywreBxd3V-GQznVAxSpyTz3LFqT_NldoohC_tFCdat-oechKwz6B2TLKNOiAvyuQsw_6xuS7yNAuhzF55Ol3gxM6b6bfbi1ZK4bQ7G_axDtcHMROmYEcOSyOaUVV4kIO2izZLZSmXMQh4wqgKaunuvhimShpyflZdQtoG5QFAO4sPVhIf5cb-7FdxRGhqE1NM3pZOWlBKCeZ2Vb1lt3-Hho_OYDVRShKjXC-Mu9SiavXkwU0pybkcUtf_0KA1d1sd8NWHQyEwDKofeo5)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6dfab3fbce404f0dbca19d8ebd7fc456&_e=mH58bMuBZtkk2RSbJq85dZzkjTpFSHRFpkZGKBu8fxfftiLLywreBxd3V-GQznVAxSpyTz3LFqT_NldoohC_tFCdat-oechKwz6B2TLKNOiAvyuQsw_6xuS7yNAuhzF55Ol3gxM6b6bfbi1ZK4bQ7G_axDtcHMROmYEcOSyOaUWHCCI8gRWrWuFJqByypVntN9mqlaMHEIDyx_-X_ko0mvUeon08QdOZrwRKOXTxx1g1c474EzqwHrjX4MT_ZAj3Ttmhwd45ynpbhBTjaoS__xv5heeGfh3vSUXsh6epVUmPeIYjjB3vT-aSTRSXKVjn)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6dfab3fbce404f0dbca19d8ebd7fc456&_e=mH58bMuBZtkk2RSbJq85dZzkjTpFSHRFpkZGKBu8fxfftiLLywreBxd3V-GQznVAxSpyTz3LFqT_NldoohC_tFCdat-oechKwz6B2TLKNOiAvyuQsw_6xuS7yNAuhzF55Ol3gxM6b6bfbi1ZK4bQ7G_axDtcHMROmYEcOSyOaUWlwbBRuSUeRpkq1ZXpSn9GHU4aDQeVuHELayacJb7VL8jMQghAqh6AU88VwOqasyXomu1To13MR0R00gVdFQB3p69-aOZhN_eYSZnfwzMaP6pM-Acx5tP8z2PhcO-p4nZC-42_hjnXHYGcIEaED9O2) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6dfab3fbce404f0dbca19d8ebd7fc456&_e=mH58bMuBZtkk2RSbJq85dZzkjTpFSHRFpkZGKBu8fxfftiLLywreBxd3V-GQznVAxSpyTz3LFqT_NldoohC_tFCdat-oechKwz6B2TLKNOiAvyuQsw_6xuS7yNAuhzF55Ol3gxM6b6bfbi1ZK4bQ7G_axDtcHMROmYEcOSyOaUVXH_VSNACP4RfT3kfz7hbDVmL1EmcKvDbv7Rf4NE14vWvxAcyflGsXOWnNpVs8WIKu6zv2QqDjfGYfKvM9Ho1PZGL-d1rhu3R3DpJ2spBkxcGELa4f8oV0pF66m5kUOEXfKJr-ZvQGbvEcrz05P73G)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6dfab3fbce404f0dbca19d8ebd7fc456&_e=mH58bMuBZtkk2RSbJq85dZzkjTpFSHRFpkZGKBu8fxfftiLLywreBxd3V-GQznVAxSpyTz3LFqT_NldoohC_tFCdat-oechKwz6B2TLKNOiAvyuQsw_6xuS7yNAuhzF55Ol3gxM6b6bfbi1ZK4bQ7G_axDtcHMROmYEcOSyOaUU70TQ5xOjMZvAYlsJX-kP88yZFJp5gLF3YUXlC_gqNW_tfbHYv3IEkWwBfO_fENWN5AtcTXVTYwiIOQss20VZfiXixsqPO8SF02WqhIA3YyDYmoAQdvIXFCU76FJ1u6ssUvbubJafNqQNzty4qWhTb)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6dfab3fbce404f0dbca19d8ebd7fc456&_e=mH58bMuBZtkk2RSbJq85dZzkjTpFSHRFpkZGKBu8fxfftiLLywreBxd3V-GQznVAxSpyTz3LFqT_NldoohC_tFCdat-oechKwz6B2TLKNOiAvyuQsw_6xuS7yNAuhzF55Ol3gxM6b6bfbi1ZK4bQ7G_axDtcHMROmYEcOSyOaUUcu70sKL6zlAryInm464-UPQ0i5eGdEGJN1PuJe94MJV6xEP8Y_llthB8ykkm9fJypi2PGIqkopycXtulqYBpgHJQT45gOi8ZnYIzknXenKcUnbPuyzsz6RS2sAi3q2EJzca0n7chNuZTMfPs78xfU)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is more important now than ever — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever. Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. * Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom. But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honorary Grand Marshal National Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

name: Pam Harder
subject: our daughter's future
body:
I’m writing to you from our living room which is currently filled with Lillian’s menagerie of stuffed animals and books (she is now a one-year-old!). I also hear Josh doing some sort of call with his team right now? | | Hi Peter, it’s Pam! I’m writing to you from our living room which is currently filled with Lillian’s menagerie of stuffed animals and books (she is now a one-year-old!). I also hear Josh doing some sort of call with his team right now? With President Biden announcing his campaign this week, the 2024 election has officially started and it’s very evident here in the Valley. Josh officially has a GOP opponent and Republicans have started their negative campaigning in the press. It’s... tiring and frustrating. But, I continue to feel hopeful as I see how hard Josh works every day. In just the past few months he’s fought for flooding victims here at home, he's worked with regulators on lowering utility bill costs, and he’s been a vocal opponent of the Republican’s attacks on women’s healthcare rights. I’m so thankful that Lillian will be able to grow up and see that her mom and dad are fighting for a better future for her. Think about all the things we can achieve by electing people like Josh - universal childcare, paid family leave, climate action, gun reform, and the list goes on. **Josh can’t do any of this without you. Josh is once again running in one of the most competitive seats in the country and it’s so important he has the support to push back against the GOP’s latest attacks against him.** **[So, I’m hoping you will please chip in anything you can right now to help reach Josh’s end-of-month goal and continue fighting for the future our kids deserve!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62524952/403744497/369747357?refcode=E21351-20230429-PamSurrogate-SL-SurrogateLocal-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWI3NGFmMTMtYzBlNi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zc1HOVPLTNGs7U54F2z1OO2ylGpCCnN7nNa3BwH_Inw=)** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $10 →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62524961/403744500/369747357?express_lane=true&refcode=E21351-20230429-PamSurrogate-EL-SurrogateLocal-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWI3NGFmMTMtYzBlNi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zc1HOVPLTNGs7U54F2z1OO2ylGpCCnN7nNa3BwH_Inw=) | [DONATE $25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62524962/403744511/369747357?express_lane=true&refcode=E21351-20230429-PamSurrogate-EL-SurrogateLocal-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWI3NGFmMTMtYzBlNi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zc1HOVPLTNGs7U54F2z1OO2ylGpCCnN7nNa3BwH_Inw=)

subject: following up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Hey there, friend, it's Stefanie, Kirsten's finance director. I wanted to follow up on Kirsten's last email.
I'll start with the bad news. To put it bluntly, we have just one day left before our end-of-month deadline, and we're projected to fall about $5,500 short of our goal.
But there's some good news too. **If just 10 people from your area made even just a $15 donation, we could make up the gap and reach our goal. Are you able to help Kirsten out? Here's that personalized donation link that she sent earlier:[ https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_fr_defend-senate-2023](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62543378/403766799/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4067-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWYxOTRiOC1lMmU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7xZSQTHnFCcfaJYGjlTuotVRZl-ETDst3yrV4LtMK8M=)**
I know how much you care about defending our Senate majority. But to defend this seat, we need folks like you to stand with Kirsten during critical moments like tonight.
Sending Kirsten back to the Senate and keeping Senate control out of Mitch McConnell's hands starts right now. So please, friend, will you make a donation of $15 or $5 or whatever you can spare before this make-or-break deadline? ➡️ [**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_fr_defend-senate-2023**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62543379/403766800/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4067-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWYxOTRiOC1lMmU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7xZSQTHnFCcfaJYGjlTuotVRZl-ETDst3yrV4LtMK8M=)
Thank you,

Stefanie
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62543380/403766801/1575385346?refcode=jtk4067-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWYxOTRiOC1lMmU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7xZSQTHnFCcfaJYGjlTuotVRZl-ETDst3yrV4LtMK8M=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62543381/403766802/1575385346?refcode=jtk4067-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWYxOTRiOC1lMmU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7xZSQTHnFCcfaJYGjlTuotVRZl-ETDst3yrV4LtMK8M=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62543382/403766803/1575385346?refcode=jtk4067-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWYxOTRiOC1lMmU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7xZSQTHnFCcfaJYGjlTuotVRZl-ETDst3yrV4LtMK8M=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand
---

To put it bluntly, we have just one day left before our end-of-month deadline, and we're projected to fall about $5,500 short of our goal. But there's some good news too. If just 10 people from your area made even just a $15 donation, we could make up the gap and reach our goal. Are you able to help Kirsten out? Here's that personalized donation link that she sent earlier:= I know how much you care about defending our Senate majority. But to defend this seat, we need folks like you to stand with Kirsten during critical moments like tonight. Sending Kirsten back to the Senate and keeping Senate control out of Mitch McConnell's hands starts right now. So please, friend, will you make a donation of $15 or $5 or whatever you can spare before this make-or-break deadline? ➡️ = Thank you, Stefanie | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Matt Barr
subject: About my wife, Callie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress
body:
| Peter, I wanted to take a moment to tell you about my wife, Callie. While I was in Fallujah — one of the bloodiest battles of the Iraq War — Callie was trying to get her education, waitressing, and praying I’d survive. We lost a lot of friends in that war. By a miracle of God, I came home to Callie. Twice. Back in the early 2000s, **_there wasn’t much information about traumatic brain injuries and post-traumatic stress_** , but with time, we realized that’s what I was experiencing. Callie was already juggling raising our two daughters and navigating moving our family 5 times in 15 years, but now she had to take care of me, too. **Every day, my wife went to bat for me.****** When we were blocked or hit a dead end, it was Callie who stood up against red tape and bureaucracy to get me the help I needed from the military and the VA. During this time, she met other spouses who were going through similar experiences. Many were looking at the harsh reality of caregiving for the next 60 years of their lives for partners who experienced severe mental and physical wounds in the Iraq War. All while Congress left us behind. **But Callie is not one to give up when the going gets tough — she’s got that Northern Michigan grit.** She became an advocate to break down barriers that held military families back and get veterans access to the care we needed. | While we were living on base in Quantico, Virginia, Callie would get up each morning, and in between nap times and preschool, she worked with non-profits for the benefit of military and veteran families. **And she didn’t shy away from grabbing her stack of notes with stories from wounded veterans, and heading to Capitol Hill to meet with members of Congress.** I remember the day she told me that it just wasn’t enough – she needed to go to law school to be taken seriously. And, so, she _did_. With two kids under six years old. **I was the one who fought for our country in Iraq, but Callie made it her mission to fight for me and my fellow veterans.** **Now, she’s taking on the do-nothing, extremist politician who “represents” us here in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula.** I’ve seen Callie in action, and I know no one will fight harder for us.
---
[Peter, my wife’s first major fundraising deadline is tomorrow at midnight and we’re just barely short of hitting her goal. Can you chip in any amount to Callie's campaign before tomorrow’s critical deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62525859/403747286/556261575?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230429matt_mb_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDYzNTk0NDgtYzRlNi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Njfwx6NT698-zliFfjB-RGJsckb_6qI0YwkiKBlXygM=)

clean_body: | Peter, I wanted to take a moment to tell you about my wife, Callie. While I was in Fallujah — one of the bloodiest battles of the Iraq War — Callie was trying to get her education, waitressing, and praying I’d survive. We lost a lot of friends in that war. By a miracle of God, I came home to Callie. Twice. Back in the early 2000s, there wasn’t much information about traumatic brain injuries and post-traumatic stress , but with time, we realized that’s what I was experiencing. Callie was already juggling raising our two daughters and navigating moving our family 5 times in 15 years, but now she had to take care of me, too. Every day, my wife went to bat for me.** When we were blocked or hit a dead end, it was Callie who stood up against red tape and bureaucracy to get me the help I needed from the military and the VA. During this time, she met other spouses who were going through similar experiences. Many were looking at the harsh reality of caregiving for the next 60 years of their lives for partners who experienced severe mental and physical wounds in the Iraq War. All while Congress left us behind. But Callie is not one to give up when the going gets tough — she’s got that Northern Michigan grit. She became an advocate to break down barriers that held military families back and get veterans access to the care we needed. | While we were living on base in Quantico, Virginia, Callie would get up each morning, and in between nap times and preschool, she worked with non-profits for the benefit of military and veteran families. And she didn’t shy away from grabbing her stack of notes with stories from wounded veterans, and heading to Capitol Hill to meet with members of Congress. I remember the day she told me that it just wasn’t enough – she needed to go to law school to be taken seriously. And, so, she did. With two kids under six years old. I was the one who fought for our country in Iraq, but Callie made it her mission to fight for me and my fellow veterans. Now, she’s taking on the do-nothing, extremist politician who “represents” us here in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula.** I’ve seen Callie in action, and I know no one will fight harder for us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you for listening. — Matt Barr = | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. She’s running to take on extremism and do-nothing politicians in D.C. that are leaving rural America behind. Can you help send Callie to Congress by donating today? | = | Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress Callie Barr for Congress PO Box 6921 Traverse City, MI 49696 United States Callie Barr is an advocate for veterans and spouse to a former U.S. Marine. We cannot do it alone, and we need all hands on deck to elect climate champions, hold right-wing climate deniers and fossil fuel allies from every party accountable, and build a sustainable future.

I’ve dedicated my career to fighting corporate corruption and Big Oil’s lies about the climate crisis. I’m proud to continue my work with the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and overwhelmed by our strong momentum. The Jane Fonda Climate PAC is dedicated to electing candidates who will tackle the climate crisis head on. That means more than just talking about the problem, or supporting alternative energy sources. That means being willing to take on the number one driver of the climate crisis: the fossil fuel industry.

Your support helped the Jane Fonda Climate PAC support climate champions at every level of government in the pivotal 2022 election cycle, and to fight back against the corrupting influence of the fossil fuel industry and their elected allies on both sides of the aisle.

As we gear up to elect more in 2023 and beyond, I hope you will continue to help us grow our program.

clean_body: The science is clear – we must phase out our use of fossil fuels before the next decade to protect ourselves from the catastrophic consequences of climate change. | I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this special message from my friend and mentor, and Jane PAC Co-founder, Annie Leonard. Annie is right, the science is clear – we must phase out our use of fossil fuels before the next decade to protect ourselves from the catastrophic consequences of climate change. We cannot do it alone, and we need all hands on deck to elect climate champions, hold right-wing climate deniers and fossil fuel allies from every party accountable, and build a sustainable future. = | = Read more from Annie here: = Hi, my name is Annie Leonard, one of the co-founders of the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. I’m reaching out today to share a few thoughts on the future of the climate crisis. But first, = | = I’ve dedicated my career to fighting corporate corruption and Big Oil’s lies about the climate crisis. I’m proud to continue my work with the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and overwhelmed by our strong momentum. The Jane Fonda Climate PAC is dedicated to electing candidates who will tackle the climate crisis head on. That means more than just talking about the problem, or supporting alternative energy sources. That means being willing to take on the number one driver of the climate crisis: the fossil fuel industry. Your support helped the Jane Fonda Climate PAC support climate champions at every level of government in the pivotal 2022 election cycle, and to fight back against the corrupting influence of the fossil fuel industry and their elected allies on both sides of the aisle. As we gear up to elect more in 2023 and beyond, I hope you will continue to help us grow our program. = | | | = | = | = | = | = With Gratitude Annie Leonard Former Executive Director, Greenpeace USA Co-Founder, Jane Fonda Climate PAC | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: The Final Part
body:
| | | Peter,
---
As a Green Beret, the final parts of a mission were always the most critical.

No matter how you performed beforehand, if you slid off in the final moments, the whole mission could come crashing down.

_Right now, we’re in the home stretch of a MAJOR MISSION for our campaign, and I’m depending on the top patriots from my force._

**Our end-of-month deadline is TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT, and right now, we’re still not at our goal.**

[**I need you to do your part to DEFEND America from the radical Left. The Democrat agenda isn’t just bad for America, Peter - it’s downright dangerous.

From ignoring the threat of Communist China to pushing woke ideology over combat preparedness in our military, our enemies are _begging_ for the Left to win.

_But I’m not about to let Democrats make a mockery out of my brothers and sisters in arms who made the ultimate sacrifice._

clean_body: | | | Peter, As a Green Beret, the final parts of a mission were always the most critical. No matter how you performed beforehand, if you slid off in the final moments, the whole mission could come crashing down. Right now, we’re in the home stretch of a MAJOR MISSION for our campaign, and I’m depending on the top patriots from my force. Our end-of-month deadline is TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT, and right now, we’re still not at our goal. The Democrat agenda isn’t just bad for America, Peter - it’s downright dangerous. From ignoring the threat of Communist China to pushing woke ideology over combat preparedness in our military, our enemies are begging for the Left to win. But I’m not about to let Democrats make a mockery out of my brothers and sisters in arms who made the ultimate sacrifice. It’s time to STEP UP for America, but we’re running out of time. | | In Service, Col. Mike Waltz Special Forces Green Beret U.S. Congressman (R-FL) | | Paid for by Servant Leadership Fund, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Michael Waltz for Congress, Warrior Diplomat, Frontline Patriots, and NRCC. | | 824 S Milledge Ave Ste 101, Athens, GA 30605 Contributions to Servant Leadership Fund, or any of its participating committees, are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. body:
| I’ll cut right to it: I just got off the phone with my campaign manager, Mohona. We’re a little behind on our April budget goal and I need your support to catch up.

**Last cycle, millions of dollars were spent to try to flip our district red, but our grassroots organizing was strong, so we were able to etch out an impressive victory.**

Now, we’ve already been named a top GOP target for 2024, which means our race is going to be just as critical as it was in 2022. And starting our work early is essential.

Once again, we have zero margin for error in this race. But Mohona just shared with me that right now, we're still $4,500 short of our big April budget goal — and we have just 24 hours left to close the gap.

**So please, I'm asking: Will you rush $20 or more now to help us hit our important goal and take back the House?

clean_body: | I’ll cut right to it: I just got off the phone with my campaign manager, Mohona. We’re a little behind on our April budget goal and I need your support to catch up. Last cycle, millions of dollars were spent to try to flip our district red, but our grassroots organizing was strong, so we were able to etch out an impressive victory. Now, we’ve already been named a top GOP target for 2024, which means our race is going to be just as critical as it was in 2022. And starting our work early is essential. Once again, we have zero margin for error in this race. But Mohona just shared with me that right now, we're still $4,500 short of our big April budget goal — and we have just 24 hours left to close the gap. So please, I'm asking: Will you rush $20 or more now to help us hit our important goal and take back the House? Here's the best link to donate: = Thank you for coming through. — Sharice * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. Right now, Democrats are making moves to make DC the **51st state in America.**

This would give them a **permanent blue majority** that they could use to do _anything they want _to our country, no matter what hardworking Americans say.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: The real obscenity is parents giving their lives to shield their children from bullets in American neighborhoods, like they were living in a war zone.
body:
How much longer?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2ce7c29c-ee86-4b88-977b-a59027288da8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [**_UPDATE:_** **Friends, sometimes all I can do to keep from being distraught is try to make a difference in a world that seems like it's gone mad.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3331abb5-192b-49f0-868c-f2ff6bc9b7c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Since we sent you the below email, in Cleveland, TX, a family whose baby was trying to sleep asked their nextdoor neighbor to please stop shooting his AR-15 late at night. He reportedly said "I can do whatever I want." They returned home. Shortly thereafter, the man, Franscisco Orepeza, walked into their house and tried to murder the entire family._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T88b5b951-5d01-4ad7-b844-cd2f3249fa5a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Like Rep. Landsman, whom I wrote about in the below email, the only words I could think of were obscene--because they described an obscenity. This "person" executed an 8-year-old boy. As the father of boys, it's hard not to break down writing that. The bodies of 2 women were found on top of 2 surviving children. They gave their lives for their kids._ **_How did we get to where adults must give their lives like they're in a war zone just to save their children? It's so heartbreaking, so barbaric, and, yes, only exists because the Republican Party values guns over children's lives. _** [**_All I can think of to do at this moment is try to make things better. So, I ask you again to support someone who desperately wants to end this. Please join Blue Amp in giving Congressman Landsman $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to reelect a good one. We can be sure he'll fight to pass the laws to end our gun insanity._ **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d260273-ed10-4ea7-a19c-7c38972bc67b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I thank all of you for doing all you can to make sure that someday soon we won't have to live like this. Cliff \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action** <info@mail.blueampaction.com>
Date: Fri, Apr 28, 2023 at 1:56 PM
Subject: “I dropped the F bomb. This is what happened.” Peter, [**“I Dropped The F Bomb. This Is What Happened.”**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T44c37641-0187-405a-b0f0-32f9191ce727/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _This recent message was from Rep. Greg Landsman, who won a swing seat in Ohio's First District, _**_becoming the ONLY Democrat to beat a multi-term GOP incumbent last cycle. Nobody had been able to beat seditionist Steve Chabot in 14 years._** **Why Did Landsman curse? The natural reaction of a father to the Nashville shooting where children were murdered. **_When clueless reporters asked him if he represented his constituents by using this language, he was just as shocked._ **_Greg responded by asking what was obscene, using the word "fuck" when kids are murdered or voting to let someone with a violent history get an assault rifle to murder our children? Worse, Republicans saying they'd do NOTHING to stop the next mass murder as kids still lay where they abruptly & tragically lost their lives._** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc628f910-fa23-4e52-90d6-ad9a25c018cb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Landsman's the kind of leader we need in Congress--someone who finds Republicans' protecting guns over children obscene, Republicans taking control of women's bodies obscene, the Republican he beat in 2022, Chabot, voting to decertify electoral votes and overthrow our republic obscene. _** _Most of our media may not have their priorities straight, but Landsman sure does._ [**__This seat is a toss-up, and EXACTLY the kind of district we MUST hold to have any chance of taking back the House. Will you join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to courageous Congressman Greg Landsman?__**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta1708d25-daa9-41bb-a68d-4074a1fd583d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting to win back the House from its real Speaker, Marjorie Taylor Greene._ Cliff
---
|

| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/landsman-therealobscenity-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1db490d3-5f23-4f64-92a2-47a8dd1dda5a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Friend, I need to explain something.

Donations to this email are extremely important - maybe more important than most other campaign emails. **[I’ll explain more below but if you’re able to be one of the 17 folks we need to donate, I’d be very appreciative.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62526898/403752064/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2264-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDUwMzU3Ni1jOGU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YlP8gNha6YmhTXKbEWai4CUhABRXDOTnOvsZ2kwWRf8=)**
In the days ahead of the election, pundits moved our race to a toss-up and other Senators called me concerned that we couldn’t win. Not only that, but far-right outside groups were pouring money in to defeat us and prop up our election-denying opponent.

We had to take on debt in order to win. The good news is that it worked and I was elected to a second term.
The bad news is that we are still paying down our bills. name: Team Vasquez
subject: Tomorrow's deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS

| We're gearing up for a crucial election season. **There are a lot of reasons why your grassroots support is crucial to our efforts, but we want to bring you just three important election targets that can be impacted with your support:**

1\. Our state is a critical battleground in the upcoming presidential election, and a blue Arizona could mean a national victory.

2\. We're facing a tough challenge from GOP candidates in the upcoming highly competitive Senate race.

3\. The GOP currently controls our state legislature, but we're determined to flip it and get to work with Dems in charge.

**[This is why it is so vital that we raise $10,000 before our deadline on Sunday. We can accomplish all of this and much more – we just need to go into the next month with our goal met and ready to win. clean_body: | | | | | | We're gearing up for a crucial election season. That's why we're taking a moment to reach out to you for your support. There are a lot of reasons why your grassroots support is crucial to our efforts, but we want to bring you just three important election targets that can be impacted with your support: 1\. Our state is a critical battleground in the upcoming presidential election, and a blue Arizona could mean a national victory. 2\. We're facing a tough challenge from GOP candidates in the upcoming highly competitive Senate race. 3\. The GOP currently controls our state legislature, but we're determined to flip it and get to work with Dems in charge. name: Chuck Schumer
subject: Some distressing numbers -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, it’s Chuck. The team showed me some distressing numbers just now.

As we always expected, the Republicans are starting off strong. The election experts at FiveThirtyEight say winning in 2024 will be _even tougher_ for us than it was in 2022. Early polls show statistically TIED races in multiple states, and right now the donations we need to pull Democrats ahead have NOT picked up as much as we need them to.

**I’m sorry to say our window of opportunity to take an early advantage is closing. The situation is so critical that I've just authorized an _extremely rare_ TRIPLE-Impact Match to help close the fundraising gap before tomorrow's end-of-month deadline.**

**[Please, I’m personally asking you to make a matched $5 donation today to help protect our Democratic Senate majority. This is one of the most consequential elections in our lifetimes, and your gift will have TRIPLE the impact until our _crucial_ fundraising deadline tomorrow night. >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/13146?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230429-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortofGoalRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230429-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortofGoalRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10567%2E9716520%2E_URzN9)**

The good news is, meeting our $250,000 end-of-month goal would improve our position by leaps and bounds -- but it's going to take a team effort.

It is _vital_ that we meet our goal. If we fall short, the next set of polls I review will almost certainly be worse.

President Biden and all of our Senate candidates are counting on this grassroots team, so I hope you'll help make a difference today. _**Don't let this rare Triple-Impact Match expire before we OFFICIALLY reach this must-hit goal!**_

**[Please, I’m counting on you -- step up today with a TRIPLED donation of $5 or more to defend and expand our Democratic Senate majority:](https://go.dscc.org/go/13146?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230429-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortofGoalRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230429-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortofGoalRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10567%2E9716520%2E_URzN9)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairwoman=20Kristina=20Karamo?=
subject: Important Reminder: Early Bird Pricing Ending Soon for Michigan Leadership Conference
body:
Register today for the 35th biennial Mackinac Republican Leadership Conference! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8dd3bae254f5/important-reminder-early-bird-pricing-ending-soon-for-michigan-leadership-conference?e=a2af77507c)
---
| |
---
| |

Patriots,

I am writing to remind you that the special early bird pricing for registration to the 35th Biennial Michigan Republican Leadership Conference will end on May 1st. Don't miss this opportunity to register at a special discounted rate by visiting [https://migop.org/mackinac](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=0aba5fc3e1&e=a2af77507c).

I also want to highlight some of the benefits of reserving your stay at the illustrious Grand Hotel, the historical venue where all the conference activities will take place.

Staying at the Grand Hotel will provide you with unmatched convenience, as all conference activities will be held on the premises. This will make it easy for you to stay close to the action and maximize your conference experience.

Moreover, booking a room at the Grand Hotel will give you the chance to network with other attendees and personally engage with our esteemed national speakers. The Grand Hotel's unique charm and character has made it a beloved destination for over a century, and its rare opportunity to enjoy American history in a unique way.

In addition, by booking your room at the Grand Hotel, you will have breakfast and dinner included for two people, an exceptional value.

Don't miss out on this unique opportunity to fully engage with the 35th Biennial Michigan Republican Leadership Conference. Book your room at the Grand Hotel today and take advantage of all the benefits that come with staying at this historic venue.

We hope to see you at the Michigan Republican Leadership Conference, and thank you for your interest and participation.

In Liberty,

Kristina Karamo
Chairwoman
Michigan Republican Party
---
| | [DONATE HERE](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=21f7a5870a&e=a2af77507c "DONATE HERE")
---

3450 Alpine Ave. NW
Box 332
Grand Rapids, MI 49544

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f72dfc23a2&e=a2af77507c&c=23538cddd9) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f72dfc23a2&e=a2af77507c&c=23538cddd9).

subject: If we can do this, we have a chance at winning…
body:

Many aspects of politics are confusing, convoluted, and complicated – but one thing that couldn’t be more simple is this:
Whoever raises the most money, usually wins.
I hate to say it, but it’s true.
So if we don’t pick up the pace to combat the millions being spent against me, we could lose – and if I lose Republicans will almost certainly lose control of the House as well.
We can’t let that happen, Peter. The fate of this country hangs in the balance.
You’ve never let me down before, I hope I can count on you to stand with me now.
