clean_body: | | Hi there, Every day, our newsfeeds are inundated with stories about censorship in our public schools and attacks on teachers, librarians, and students. MAGA extremists claim they are protecting our children, while seeking to strip them of the basic freedoms essential to a good education – the freedom to speak, to ask hard questions, and to learn. But across America, people who don’t want to see their libraries defunded, or books about the Holocaust or America’s civil rights movement pulled from school shelves, are starting to organize. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = We’re taking it into our own hands to protect our kids and schools from the MAGA culture wars. Our mission is to encourage reasoned public debate on these issues, hold school board members and elected officials accountable, recruit and support candidates committed to democratic values and to opposing book bans and censorship. We’re almost at the end of April, and there is no more important time than now to lay the critical groundwork for success. = Thank you for standing up for what matters, Tom Malinowski * | Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States. = = Paid for by Districts for Democracy Districts for Democracy P.O. Box 01 Ringoes, NJ 08851-0001 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: FWD: I have a personal request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
Hi Peter – I wanted to make sure you saw this note I sent a few
days ago. [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230429_PM2_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=239%2E35263%2E2SGKvY ]I’m hoping you can pitch in ahead of our first end-of-month
deadline since we launched this reelection campaign.

Thank you so much,

Tammy

---------Forwarded Message----------
From: Tammy Baldwin
Date: April 27, 2023
Subject: I have a personal request

[2]Tammy Baldwin for Senate

Hi team, I have a personal request: [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230429_PM2_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=239%2E35263%2E2SGKvY ]Will you make a contribution ahead
of the first monthly fundraising deadline of my reelection campaign? I’ll
explain more in just a moment.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-launch23.kLC5-H&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230429_PM2_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=239%2E35263%2E2SGKvY ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-launch23.l0WzBv&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230429_PM2_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=239%2E35263%2E2SGKvY ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-launch23.zrlp7O&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230429_PM2_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=239%2E35263%2E2SGKvY ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-launch23.xa76pe&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230429_PM2_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=239%2E35263%2E2SGKvY ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2158?c0=tbe-em-launch23.Givb53&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230429_PM2_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=239%2E35263%2E2SGKvY ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230429_PM2_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=239%2E35263%2E2SGKvY ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I’ve been working hard in the Senate for the past few years to pass
legislation that addresses the issues that matter most to Wisconsin’s
working families. From lowering the cost of insulin and other life-saving
prescriptions to protecting marriage equality, I’m proud of the positive
change we’ve made in the Senate.

But there’s more to be done, and it's clear now more than ever that we
need to hold onto our Democratic Senate majority to keep up the progress
our working families are counting on.

You see, Senate Republicans’ agenda has become more and more extreme.
They’re threatening cuts to Social Security and Medicare, and even voting
to limit reproductive healthcare access for veterans. It’s unacceptable.

That’s why we need to protect our Democratic Senate majority. But
Democrats will be on defense across the country next year — including here
in Wisconsin. You can bet dollars to donuts Mitch McConnell and his
right-wing allies will do and spend whatever it takes to flip my seat and
reclaim the Senate majority.

But this team is no stranger to a tough fight. We’ve proved over and over
again that the strength of our grassroots team is no match for right-wing
special interests and dark money groups.

Now, we all need to step up to be victorious once more. We’ve done it
before, and I know we can do it again. That’s why I’m humbly asking:

name: CaucusRoom
subject: ☀️ CaucusRoom Weekend Edition
body:
How Low Will Joe Go? No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-quhthhl-trhiujldw-jl/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **

### ** Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared:**
* Biden has **[no plans to rescue](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-y/)** Americans in Sudan.
* Cartels are **[finding new ways to hide drugs](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-j/).**
* Stop thinking about it and**[charge Hunter Biden!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-t/)**
* The WSJ say**s[Biden is too old](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-i/) **to run for reelection.
* **_Tu_[cker Carlson](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-d/)** and Fox News parted ways.
* **[Don Lemon](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-h/)** was fired by CNN.
* DNC will not have **[primary debates](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-k/)**.
* Biden pushing for **[digital currency.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-u/)**
* **[_Ray Epp_ s](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-o/) **was on 60 minutes.
* **[Bad Actors.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-x/)**
* Biden**r[efuses to talk about](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-m/) **cutting spending.
* **[Ultra Right Beer](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-c/) **giving Bud Light a run for its money.
* Jimmy Kimmel finally **[made fun of Biden](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-q/)**.
* Nashville police will **[release the manifesto](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-a/)**.
* LA Times **[denies giving Biden question](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-f/)** for a cheat sheet.
* Washington says [**this class is racist**.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-z/)

### **Fact Checked by a Child**
During a 'Take Your Child to Work' event at the White House, **[Biden was fact checked by a little girl](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-v/)** in the audience.
### **ABC News Censors RFK Jr.**
ABC News interviewed Democratic presidential candidate Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and **[censored part of the interview in real-time](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-e/)** , claiming RFK Jr. made "false claims" about the experimental COVID-19 shot. **How Low Can Joe Go?** **[Biden's approval rating has plummeted to 37%](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-s/)** -- the lowest since he's been in the Oval Office. [**Here For The Laughs**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-w/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-yd/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-yh/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-yk/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhthhl-trhiujldw-yu/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
1100 Johnson Rd #18546Golden, CO 80402 You are receiving this email because you are a member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-quhthhl-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-jr) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-u-quhthhl-trhiujldw-jy/)
---

body:
is critical in our effort to re-elect Joe Biden

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62543364/403766756/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWM3Mzc5Ni1lMmU2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xEk0yqLQwhGwJxKgqo0MBIYYFBnl3wNlvOxekH7Bhh0=&emci=5dc0b7de-aae3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=0ec73796-e2e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

Let us tell you about what’s going to happen tomorrow.

Tomorrow will be our first end-of-month deadline since Joe Biden officially began his re-election campaign.

Joe Biden, Donald Trump, the DNC, and so many others will be watching for our fundraising totals, asking themselves– _do Georgia Democrats have a grassroots movement that can deliver our state for Joe Biden in 2024?_

Georgia will be _**the most important state**_ in 2024, and both Democrats and Republicans know they can’t win the presidency without it!

So, we need to make it clear that our grassroots movement _**will**_ show up, we _**will**_ crush our end-of-month fundraising goal tomorrow, we _**will**_ win Georgia in 2024, and we _**will**_ consign Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis’s toxic MAGA extremism to the dustbin of history where it belongs.

[**_But all of this comes down to you, Peter. clean_body: is critical in our effort to re-elect Joe Biden | | | Peter, Let us tell you about what’s going to happen tomorrow. Tomorrow will be our first end-of-month deadline since Joe Biden officially began his re-election campaign. Joe Biden, Donald Trump, the DNC, and so many others will be watching for our fundraising totals, asking themselves– do Georgia Democrats have a grassroots movement that can deliver our state for Joe Biden in 2024? Georgia will be the most important state in 2024, and both Democrats and Republicans know they can’t win the presidency without it! So, we need to make it clear that our grassroots movement will show up, we will crush our end-of-month fundraising goal tomorrow, we will win Georgia in 2024, and we will consign Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis’s toxic MAGA extremism to the dustbin of history where it belongs. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, thank you, thank you. –The Democratic Party of Georgia | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. name: Jon Tester
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Reaching our goal of 1,000 grassroots donors is vital.

| Peter,

I just got a call from my fundraising team, and to put it simply, **I need your help.** We’re behind on our 1,000 donor planting season goal and need a serious boost in donations today to catch up.

This is the last thing I wanted to hear since Sharla and I are busy finishing up prepping equipment and getting everything ready to start planting. So unless you're willing to get your hands dirty and spend 16 hours on a tractor with us, I need your help chipping in whatever you can.

[_**Any amount you can contribute early in the campaign goes a long way in helping us grow our movement and reach these critical fundraising goals. Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62543419/403767010/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230429-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyNDIxNzNiLWUzZTYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=S6l10Nts45aY6BWq4r_iT3LfA5iWv6Q1t3RAIelmq3A=)

I'm incredibly grateful for your support and am fired up to win so I can keep fighting for all Montanans in the U.S. Senate.

Alright, I'll get back to prepping for planting before Sharla starts wondering where I am; thanks again!

| Friends,

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: Josh Hawley: The most vulnerable Republican U.S. Senator in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
From his own former mentor to reliable GOP mega-donors, Josh Hawley’s support base has abandoned him.
#
Peter,
Josh Hawley did more than just prove that he’s a fraud and a coward when he ran away after raising his fist at the Capitol on January 6th — **he made himself the most vulnerable GOP senator up for re-election in 2024.**
**FIRST:** Hawley’s mentor, three-term U.S. Senator Jack Danforth — a Missouri GOP icon who cleared the field for Hawley in 2018 — says supporting him was _“the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life.”_
**THEN:** Missouri GOP mega-donor David Humphreys, whose family and network gave a combined $4.4 MILLION to Hawley’s statewide campaign in 2016, called him “undemocratic” and a “political opportunist” who “should be censured by his Senate colleagues.”
**AND NOW:** Just this week, Big Tech billionaire Peter Thiel — who’s donated hundreds of thousands of dollars to Hawley’s campaigns over the years — announced he won’t support _any_ Republicans this election cycle because of their out-of-touch culture wars.
**Almost all of Josh Hawley’s support base has abandoned him** — and a poll last month showed him facing “intensely negative sentiments” in Missouri, with 39% of voters holding STRONGLY unfavorable views.
**We have a real opportunity to defeat Hawley and take Missouri’s Senate seat back for the people next year, but none of this means it’s going to be easy.**
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31878?refcode=em20230429-3058&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3058%2E614464%2E9T8Keb)**
**GOP insiders at the National Republican Senatorial Committee are already working overtime to make Josh Hawley look strong.** They’ve launched a string of desperate attacks at Lucas and — on the very last day of the most recent FEC fundraising quarter — used their joint committee with Hawley to transfer _$250,000_ directly to his campaign.
If these are the kind of resources they’re willing to spend in the off-year, it’s only a matter of time before they start spending even more to ramp up their attacks and put Hawley’s campaign in the position to win.
**That’s why we need your help today, Peter.** Lucas launched this campaign early so we’d have time to raise the kind of money we need to mount a serious challenge to a corrupt, incumbent politician like Hawley and get our positive vision for Missouri in front of voters as soon, and as often, as possible.
**[So please, will you rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to our grassroots movement to elect Lucas Kunce? Our best shot at building a winning campaign is keeping up our record-breaking momentum — and we need your support to do it.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31878?refcode=em20230429-3058&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3058%2E614464%2E9T8Keb)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31879?refcode=em20230429-3058&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=3058%2E614464%2E9T8Keb) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31879?refcode=em20230429-3058&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=3058%2E614464%2E9T8Keb) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31879?refcode=em20230429-3058&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=3058%2E614464%2E9T8Keb) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31879?refcode=em20230429-3058&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=3058%2E614464%2E9T8Keb) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31879?refcode=em20230429-3058&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=3058%2E614464%2E9T8Keb) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31879?refcode=em20230429-3058&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=3058%2E614464%2E9T8Keb) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31878?refcode=em20230429-3058&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3058%2E614464%2E9T8Keb)
